entries.name: Ossia
entries.title: Bewitching Devil
entries.description:
Due to the size of the gap between her physical and mental age, or maybe due to the enormous power dwelling in her body, her mind is trying to catch up abnormally fast. But there is a price for defying the natural order, that is how this world works. And the price for her rapid growth—or rather evolution—was ethics and morals.
"Will you play with me...? No, I will make you my playmate myself, hahaha..."
What makes people unable to look away is that hint of childishness mixed with all the seductiveness, that bit of charm among all the innocence. It shows in her looks, her words, and seems to monopolize the thoughts of those who meet her.

entries.name: Sun Wukong
entries.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
entries.description: Sun Wukong is a mountain rogue, and all the mountain animals are her underlings. However, at first, she was just a weak little child, abandoned by her parents. And the Monkey God up on the mountain just couldn't leave her like that, so he took her in and raised her. Now she has grown pretty big, but her curiosity is even bigger, so she was sent on a journey with a new Master called Tang Sanzang.

entries.description: During the journey, some bandits targeted Master Sanzang. But that's exactly what Sun Wukong the bodyguard is for! She hadn't been raised by the Monkey God for nothing. She rounded the bad guys up in no time, with the techniques learned from the Monkey God and her trusty size-changing staff. At first glance, it looks like she's unbeatable, but the truth is, even she has a weak point...

entries.name: Dark Alice
entries.title: One More Nightmare
entries.description:
One day, a mysterious hole opened in the fabric of the world of dreams. As holes in worlds go, this one was quite small, inconspicuous—just a lonely, dark hole.
Inside it there was a hidden room, and in that room there was a girl—another Alice, caught up in the darkest of nightmares.

entries.description: She paints white roses red, without anyone's knowledge or permission—she just wants to make her favorite garden pretty. So that it is ready when someone comes to visit. So that she can be the best host there ever was. But such a day never comes, and Alice's heart breaks into dark, lonely pieces—or maybe it has already been broken long ago.

entries.title: Bunnygirl Assassin
entries.description: Tasked with an undercover mission, Elmina infiltrates an underground bar—and with her honed skill in charming people, she immediately winds all the customers around her finger. She never lets her guard down though, and whenever they try to pursue her, she replies with, "Sometimes the sweetest honey can be the deadliest poison... Remember this for later♪"

Life has emerged from the sea, and in the sea it will meet its end.
When the great flood comes and swallows the land, the goddess will descend upon the world. Holding her pure hand up to the clear sky, she will create all life anew.

entries.description: What she deems "good" does not align with humanity's perception of the word. Her eyes look beyond—upon all beings, the world, and the universe. If humans seek to destroy the natural order, she will not hesitate to erase their civilization.

entries.name: Lancelot
entries.title: Twin Blades of the Round Table
entries.secondName: Twin Blades of the Round Table
entries.description: A Knight of the Round Table raised by a faerie known as the Lady of the Lake—that was the original Lancelot. The path this one is walking, and the paths she refuses to follow are not the same as her predecessor's. Her mind is as open as a wide lake, her appearance and expressions ever changing like a water surface that reflects the sky. And still, just like the waters of an inland lake do not ebb and flow with the tide, so does her swordsmanship stay ever unwavering. She withstands every attack and launches her own special move. She bears the title of the strongest like it's nothing, for she is the current Lancelot.

entries.secondName: Twin Blades of the Round Table
entries.description: She is aware of the first Lancelot's sin, and of the fact that it can never be forgiven. Nevertheless, she believes that sinners aren't forbidden from doing what's right or following their principles. That's why she won't ever lay down the burden of sin she has inherited along with her name—even though it is not hers personally, she feels it is her to bear as another Lancelot.

entries.name: Gawain
entries.title: Round Table Knight of the Sun
entries.secondName: Round Table Knight of the Sun
entries.description:
At dawn, a lone knight stands with his back to the rising sun, facing a hostile army. Soon he is surrounded by tens, hundreds of enemies—and yet, by the time the sun has reached the zenith, the knight is alone once again, countless bodies lying at his feet.
That was the routine for the original Gawain, the Knight of the Sun. The current one still draws her sword when the sun is the furthest from the moon, she as well a match for a thousand-man army.

localization.name: Royal Helioslash
localization.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. 500% damage if the user has defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefield, 600% if the user has defeated 2+ units. Usable if the user has not defeated any units while on the battlefield, or if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

localization.name: Mace Mastery

entries.name: Gawain
entries.title: Round Table Knight of the Sun
entries.secondName: Round Table Knight of the Sun
entries.description:
Just like there is no rain that never stops, there is no sun that never sets. However, her—no, any Gawain's—loyalty towards their king will never wane, no matter how different each new bearer of the name is. In that sense, she is Gawain through and through.
But just like there is no sun that never sets, there can be no moon that never rises.

entries.name: Jeanne d'Arc
entries.title: Bride of Salvation
entries.description:
Two voices echo through a quiet church.
"M-Mikaela... I'm really not made for this kind of outfit..."
"I told you it suits you, Jeanne! You're the prettiest girl in the world today!"
When the church doors creak open at last, Jeanne instantly turns her eyes to them—still bashful, but a little hopeful too.

Mikaela's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

entries.name: Jeanne d'Arc
entries.title: Bride of Salvation
entries.description:
Mikaela has been praying for this day to come for a long, long time. For her sweet little sister to forget her guilt—even if it's just for a day—and finally be happy.
"You have to be happy, Jeanne... Your happiness is my happiness too."

entries.name: Mikaela
entries.title: Angel of Celebration
entries.description:
On this radiant day, Mikaela finds herself thinking—what if she had managed to avoid her fate, if she was still walking this world as a human? Would she find someone to love her too, someone to want a selfish girl like her—
"None of that! Today's Jeanne's day, and I'm going to give her a celebration she deserves!"

entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Red Dragon Race Queen
entries.description: Oh, good, you're here! Yes, it's me, Ludmilla. Why am I wearing this outfit? Hahaha! Always with the funny questions. It's because my heart is craving speed, obviously! All right, here I go! Full throttle! The race has already started—!

localization.name: Vengeance Queen

This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, and the effects of skin passive skills.

localization.name: Command & Combo
localization.description:
Targets 1 enemy, and another ally with the highest current TU. 500% damage to the targeted enemy, then gives that ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

- The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy.
- Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

entries.title: Red Dragon Race Queen
entries.description: The way I see it, life is a race. Tough rivals, sharp turns, steep mountain roads—you must overcome them all and reach the finish line..! Go on then, go! Set your heart free, let it blaze up the way it desires!

After each turn this unit gets, all charges it has stored will be removed and allies gain Spirit equal to the charges removed. This unit is not affected by Quicken effects. entries.title: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
entries.secondName: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
entries.description: Apollo and Artemis, the Sun and the Moon. The fierce goddess of the arts and the pure goddess of the hunt. Different as they are from the Primordials, they are revered and feared throughout Erden.

localization.name: Attack & Stealth
localization.description: Damage to 2 enemies. The user is also granted the Stealth status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. If damage is dealt, the user is healed for 50% of max HP. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

Stun Wards cannot stack.

entries.title: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
entries.secondName: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
entries.description: The twins couldn't be more different in disposition—one capricious, short-tempered and hard to please, the other virtuous and gentle, valuing harmony above all else. However, at their core lies what they share—their unfathomable love for each other and the wish for peace they have for the people of Erden.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Summertime Mecha Girl
entries.description: A promise to spend time with her big sister was enough to make her heart leap. She made her preparations: a swimsuit and sandals, a beach ball, waterproof coating for her machine parts, her list of 100 Things To Do At The Beach With Astri... She wasn't prepared, however, for her first encounter with the majesty of the sea. "Aegis, deploy a swim ring—I-I mean, naval shields!"

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Summertime Mecha Girl
entries.description:
"Today, I went to the beach with the Red Dragons. Astri said my swimsuit looked nice. It made me very happy. Astri taught me how to swim, too. I don't like water very much, but I'm not scared when I'm with Astri. Luna made Kazuto mad again, even though we were supposed to be taking it easy. I hope we can go again next year, and the year after that too... I want to make a lot of fun memories, so that I can forget the past."

—from Anya's summer vacation diary

entries.name: Gyurelle
entries.title: Myriadmask Aeon Lord
entries.description: Dragonkin, a race descended from the Great Dragon God, has inherited its ancestor's power of transmutation—one that can change dirt into gold and turn their skin into impenetrable armor. With their horns and tails, they were often shunned by humans, but there was one village that welcomed them—a village saved thanks to their special abilities, one where the two races could peacefully coexist.

localization.name: Doppelganger Raid
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is another Earth ally Gyurelle on the battlefield.

localization.name: My Turn
localization.description: Immediately give all Earth ally Gyurelles the next turns by reducing their current TU, and remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from them. This skill becomes locked for 300TU after use for all Earth ally Gyurelles, so long as the user remains on the battlefield. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turns (e.g. Counter Stance and Stuns targeting the lowest TU target). The chance of adding another Gyurelle increases depending on the size of this unit's team, up to 100% when this unit's last ally is defeated (so long as that ally was not conjured). entries.description: One day, a dragonkin girl was born in the village. Gifted with exceptional power as she was, she seemed to only destroy everything she touched, and so she became an outcast. Eventually, she got locked in a dark sanctuary, where she spent long years all alone, always gazing out of the window—as if waiting for the day a light would shine in to save her.

entries.name: Ossia
entries.title: Plaguebearer Aeon Lord
entries.description: She was created to end the Pandemonium, a being superior to all denizens of Erden. Though designed as a weapon with nothing but combat abilities, she was born as a life form with feelings. Like any newborn child, she had no sense of good and evil, as susceptible to the former as she was to the latter. Likewise, like any newborn child, there was only one thing she sought—and so, she took the scientist who created her to be her mother.

localization.name: Combo Reaper
localization.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Heals the user for 50% of max HP if the user is below 50% of max HP and damage is dealt. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Aeon Bane
localization.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user has the Stealth or Counter Stance status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

localization.name: Sleeping Death Mk2
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 300TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This sleep cannot be overwritten by Poison. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Usable only if the user's party has 1 or less Spirit, and only once per battle.

localization.name: Aeon Plaguebearer+
localization.description: Whenever damage reduces this unit's HP to below 50%, each enemy that is not Sleeping or Burning has a 75% chance to become Poisoned. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. If this unit also survives until after the end of the turn it was damaged, it will gain the Stealth status effect, become Enraged (its Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn) and Allies will gain 3 Spirit. This skill cannot trigger again until this unit recovers to above 50% of max HP.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Hunter Lv3

entries.name: Ossia
entries.title: Plaguebearer Aeon Lord
entries.description:
Her creator could not decide if she should be treated as a weapon or as a person until the very end. However, after Ossia died, she was resurrected by a man eternally devoted to forging arms. A woman made to be a weapon and a man only interested in weapons, both equally twisted—perhaps their paths were destined to cross.
"Who does not work shall not eat," he would always say, so she started helping with gathering materials for his creations, learning all about the world, life, and the give-and-take of trade in the process. Therefore, if there is anyone that can be called her father, surely—
"I think I've heard quite enough of these conjectures, thank you very much."

This unit heals 30% of its max HP whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn.

entries.name: Astrid
entries.title: Red Dragon Heiress
entries.description: In a regal outfit befitting the occasion and the dignity of her new position, Astrid appears in the great hall, where the inauguration ceremony is held. She is the center of attention today—the one to be appointed Commander of the Red Dragon Knights. As she steps down the stairs, her movements stir a gentle breeze that plays with her long hair and coat before drifting away, carrying a flowery scent. Just a soft, faint breeze—and yet, it feels like the wind of change, ready to sweep through the country, or even the entire world.

localization.name: Burning Spirit
localization.description: Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Guard Incinerator
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. The user and the target are granted the Burn status effect if the target was a Guardian. This will overwrite other status effects on both units. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Burning Blaze
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Ignite All+
localization.description: All non-sleeping allies are granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. All allies that already had the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills.

localization.name: Blaze of Glory
localization.description:
When this unit or a Burning ally gets a turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

Other allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills gain the Burn status effect and a Stun Ward. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Stun Ward prevents Stun from being applied once, then is removed. Stun Wards cannot stack.

entries.name: Astrid
entries.title: Red Dragon Heiress
entries.description: Just as expected, the dreaded question was asked during the interview: "Is there anyone special in your life?" "Duty first," she answered, but the journalist wouldn't drop the topic. Just as she finally budged and revealed what her type is, the door opened and a certain young man entered the room. "Astrid? I have the documents you asked for..." The sight of a flying teacup and spilled tea, undignified as it was, proved memorable, as later the journalist's article read, "The young Commander remains single, and yet—"

entries.name: Cinderella
entries.title: Princess in Glass Slippers
entries.description: As the Princess of Fresalia, Cinderella seemed out of anyone's league. Though domineering, sharp-tongued and extravagant, she had her pride and never discriminated against anybody, regardless of their standing. For that, she was loved by everyone.

localization.name: Hypno Blast
localization.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 25% chance of granting that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Sleep cannot be applied to a unit that Has Slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Hold Ground+
localization.description: If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

localization.name: Veil Breaker
localization.description:
Each time this unit damages an enemy that has the Stealth or Armor Status Effect with an attack, this unit will immediately get the next turn. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

- The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).
- This cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

entries.name: Cinderella
entries.title: Princess in Glass Slippers
entries.description: Orphaned as a small child, she grew up in a poor household, under the eye of her wicked stepmother. She was forced to do everything around the house all by herself, and wasn't allowed to go out to play. The townsfolk always frowned at the dirty rags she wore, always gave her pointed looks. She was never loved by anyone—aside from one person.

If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Sleep cannot be applied to a unit that Has Slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.description: 1000% damage to 1 enemy. The Hold Ground+ passive skill is reset for the user and can be triggered again. The user is healed for 100% of max HP. Usable if the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill has been triggered while on the battlefield and only once per battle.

entries.name: Sleeping Beauty
entries.title: Princess of Thorns
entries.description:
Once upon a time, in the northernmost part of Erden, there was a kingdom called Fresalia. Small as it was, it had significant influence over its neighbors, thanks to its formidable royal couple.
And Talia—Sleeping Beauty—was their only child.

localization.name: An Ashen Garden
localization.description:
Heals all non-burning allies for 500% of the user's Attack and grants them Sleep Thorns. When an ally with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that ally's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Usable if there are no Sleep Thorns on allies and the user is not burning.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

localization.name: Thorn Raid
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. That enemy will also become Poisoned if they were not burning, this will overwrite any other status effect on that unit. Consumes Sleep Thorns from a random ally that has them after dealing damage. Usable if an ally has Sleep Thorns or if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

localization.name: Dream Devourer
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are sleeping. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. If damage is dealt to a sleeping target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max and steals up to 3 Spirit from enemies. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Cursed Sleep Strike
localization.description: Damage to all enemies. Each non-burning enemy damaged by this attack has a 15% chance to be granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Thorn Wall
localization.description: If this unit has Sleep Thorns, this unit will become a Guardian and will have 50% damage reduction from attacks until it loses Sleep Thorns. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Sleeping Beauty
entries.title: Princess of Thorns
entries.description:
Her childhood was marked by strict discipline and thorough schooling—in addition to regular education, she had to master etiquette, the art of socializing, and all the other skills that make a proper princess. She was never allowed to play with her peers, and didn't have a single friend. She saw herself as something akin to a doll rather than a human, and in an act of self-torment she made dolls in her free time. However, they were all taken from her too.
She was alway all alone—that is, until a certain girl came into her life.

When an ally with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that ally's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Usable if there are no Sleep Thorns on allies and the user is not burning.

localization.name: Thorn Mastery
localization.description:
If any ally has Sleep Thorns, this unit cannot be defeated and is immune to Stun effects.

Whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, a random ally that does not have Sleep Thorns and is not burning will be granted Sleep Thorns. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

When this unit enters battle, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack. This Endure will not be consumed while an ally has Sleep Thorns.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Endless Rizette
entries.title: Angel of the Sleepless City
entries.description: A city where the lights seem to never go out, with countless buildings crammed together, and a sea of people as far as the eye can see. A place she doesn't know, customs she doesn't understand. Illuminated by flashing neon lights in every color imaginable, she felt more afraid than in the depths of the blackest, moonless night. That is, until she saw it. An elegant form and a roaring engine resonating with the beat of her heart. Speed like nothing she ever experienced in her own world, the thrill of outrunning the wind. It was called "a motorcycle," they told her. Once she got on, the city didn't seem so threatening anymore, and she found out just how addictive speed can be.

localization.name: Poison Scourge
localization.description: Damages 1 enemy and then Mega Poisons them for 100TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. 300% damage if the user is a conjured unit. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Poison Carnage
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are poisoned. If damage is dealt to a poisoned target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max and gains the Counter Stance status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

localization.name: Instant Mega Poison
localization.description: Grants the Mega Poison status effect to 1 random enemy for 100TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with an Attack.

localization.name: Endless Resolve
localization.description:
This unit gains Counter Stance, Endure, and a Burn Ward. Cannot be used if the user already has the Counter Stance status effect or has gotten the current turn from Counter Stance.

Counter stance will overwrite other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

A unit with Endure will endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Burn Ward prevents Burn from being applied once, then is removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Endless Revenge
localization.description:
If this unit is not conjured, revives this unit to a random place in allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit.

If this unit is conjured, it immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements, and TU costs for all of its skills are reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.axe Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Greataxes.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Endless Rizette
entries.title: Angel of the Sleepless City
entries.description:
After losing so much, she finally gained something—a new life. She decided to spend it atoning for her sins. Having parted ways with the other Finn, she started surveying the city for any remaining undead, to prevent this world from ending up the way her own had.
He thinks she should stop blaming herself.
He thinks she should enjoy herself more. After all, life shouldn't be lived for the past, but for the present and the future.
Her co-workers in this new world seem to understand that, though, so he thinks she should be all right, in the end.
"Yo, Endless! Let's hit the pool next!"

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Mastery

entries.name: Ludmilla & Clarice
entries.title: Red Dragon Sisters
entries.description:
After the incident with Alastor, with all the misunderstandings and distrust between Ludmilla and Clarice cleared, their paths merged together again. Ludmilla couldn't be happier about that development.
However, the ten years they spent apart were still a gaping wound in Clarice's heart.

localization.name: Knockout Strike
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy. 35% chance of forcing that enemy to Sleep for 200TU, even if it has already slept or is sleeping. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Instant Nightmare
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up the enemy. If damage is dealt to a sleeping target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Savage Knockout
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Forces those enemies to Sleep for 200TU if they are left with 25% or less of max HP and are not already sleeping, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Deadly Guard
localization.description:
When this unit defeats an enemy unit with an attack while it is not a Guardian, it will become a Guardian. While this unit is a Guardian, it cannot be defeated by non-attack damage. If this unit would be defeated by an attack while it is a Guardian, this unit will stop being a Guardian and be healed for 100% of max HP.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery

entries.name: Ludmilla & Clarice
entries.title: Red Dragon Sisters
entries.description:
Seeing Ludmilla find reliable companions and sense of fulfilment at the Academy, Clarice couldn't help but wonder—
Maybe Ludmilla has forgotten all about the time they spent together as children.
Maybe she would be happier if Clarice disappeared from her life for good.

localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy. 35% chance of forcing that enemy to Sleep for 200TU, even if it has already slept or is sleeping. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Instant Nightmare
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up the enemy. If damage is dealt to a sleeping target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Savage Knockout
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Forces those enemies to Sleep for 200TU if they are left with 25% or less of max HP and are not already sleeping, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Deadly Guard
localization.description:
When this unit defeats an enemy unit with an attack while it is not a Guardian, it will become a Guardian. While this unit is a Guardian, it cannot be defeated by non-attack damage. If this unit would be defeated by an attack while it is a Guardian, this unit will stop being a Guardian and be healed for 100% of max HP.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

localization.name: Dual Prodigies
localization.description:
While this unit is a Guardian, it has 65% damage reduction from attacks.

While this unit is not a Guardian, its Attack is increased to 1.5x (this will not stack with Enrage effects) and it will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Rolotia
entries.title: Sorceress of Time
entries.description: After the Gru Grim were defeated, Rolotia parted ways with the Red Dragon Knights and set off to roam the world in her new, human form. And though she finally had the freedom she longed for back when she was confined to the Temple, deep in her heart there was a wound, an aching void she could not fill.

localization.name: Poison Shock
localization.description: Grants the Poison status effect to 1 enemy and Stuns them for 50TU. Poison will overwrite other status effects on that unit. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers.

localization.name: Chrono Chaos
localization.description:
Stuns all enemies for 150TU. Then if there is no enemy Stun Absorber, all other allies are Purified, granted Sleep Wards, Quickened by 30%, Stunned for 100TU, and then this skill becomes locked while this unit remains on the battlefield.

-This Quicken will overwrite the effects of previous quicken skills on those allies.
-Any ally Stun immunities and ally Wards are ignored, and ally Stun Absorbers do not redirect this Stun.
-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Giga Time Strike
localization.description: 500% damage to all enemies if they have 100TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Allies lose 1 Spirit for each enemy at 100TU or more hit by this attack. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use if Allies would lose more Spirit than they have in this way. Other effects that would cause Allies to lose Spirit may apply before Spirit lost by this skill.

localization.name: Savage Step Back
localization.description: Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Denmoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Heal Entry
localization.description: Stuns 2 random enemies for 150TU and this unit is fully healed. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery

entries.name: Rolotia
entries.title: Sorceress of Time
entries.description:
She promised herself she would never use time reversal magic again. It is no wonder then that she felt nervous when Chronos herself ordered her to do so. And so, with the weight of the past and the future on her shoulders...she stammered during the incantation. Badly. And the botched spell had a noticeable effect on her body.
"Th-This isn't how it was supposed to work..."

After each enemy turn, there is a 50% chance for negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison to be removed from 1 random ally that has a negative status effect.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Endure. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

A unit with Endure will endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

entries.name: Snow White
entries.title: Dazzling White Bride
entries.description:
If she had met the seven dwarfs, if she had eaten the poisoned apple, if she had fallen into eternal sleep, she might have ended up being "her".
Instead, she met an awkward mother and a fantasy prone little sister, she shared warm, hearty meals with them—and yet, a tragedy still struck, although the one who never woke up wasn't her, but someone she held dear. The one who helped her was a true prince, as strong as he was kind—that still happened, too.
A little bit different, a little bit the same; Snow White and "Snow White"—
Unlike the fairy tale, Snow's story is going to continue past "they lived happily ever after."

localization.name: Double Spirit
localization.description: Doubles current Ally Spirit. If Ally Spirit is 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.

localization.name: Little Bright Garden
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if all allies on the battlefield are at max HP.

localization.name: Instant Restoration
localization.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 1 ally, and heals them for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.description:
When this unit enters battle (including at the start of battle or from transformation), Ally Spirit is doubled. If Ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.

entries.name: Snow White
entries.title: Dazzling White Bride
entries.description:
Snow Black despised the Prince who saved Snow White from her dark influence. She watched them act all lovey-dovey, even though she was right there, inside—and her patience was running out. So, she put her plan into motion: she separated the pair, and by keeping the Prince to herself, she stripped Snow White of all hope. But that was only the surface. Deep inside, Snow Black also had feelings for—
"As if! I just wanted to take away everything Snow White ever loved!" she claims, but even in her anger, her face seems even more fickle than before.

Snow Black will start with full HP, will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, or until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Snow White cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

entries.name: Snow Black
entries.title: Ebony Black Bride
entries.description: Whatever you do, do not ask her where she got that dress. It's the surest way to put her in a nasty mood. She won't ever admit it, but the dress looks just like the one she got from him—the person who once was her real family, even if only in a dream.

entries.name: Nobunaga
entries.title: Demon Queen of the 6th Heaven
entries.description: When the fierce Nobunaga was born, her future realm was still a lawless, violent place. With oni and samurai drifting from the central part of the country, and bandits running rampant, there was not much space for the peaceful folk to settle.

localization.name: Spark Blast
localization.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 

25% chance of reducing the user's active skill TU costs by 50% on its next turn. Effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU cost reduction is in effect.

Also grants the user the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

localization.name: Crimson Ward
localization.description: Burns 1 Ally and grants them either a Stun Ward if they are a Fire or Earth unit, a Sleep Ward if they are a Storm or Dark unit, or a Poison Ward if they are a Water or Light unit. Burn will overwrite other status effects on that ally. Wards will prevent their named effect from applying to that ally once, then be removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.name: Demon Hellfire
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, this attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of skin passive skills. The user and the target are immediately granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on both units. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

localization.name: Stroke of Death

Unlocked each time this unit gains the Burn status effect. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.description: Each time an ally gets the turn while Burning, they will heal for 20% of their own max HP and then allies will gain 1 Spirit after that turn so long as this unit remains on the battlefield.

entries.name: Nobunaga
entries.title: Demon Queen of the 6th Heaven
entries.description:
One day, a first-rate samurai wandering the world—Nobunaga's father—arrived in the area. Unable to just watch the disarray in silence, he built a castle and devoted his life to establishing law and order in the land.
At one point, his path crossed with a young woman from a nearby town, and so he was blessed with a daughter.

This unit is not affected by stun effects.

entries.name: Honnoji
entries.title: Flame-Catching Streamer
entries.description:
"Hello, my Honnos!☆" is her chosen way to start a stream. 150,000 is her subscriber count. Getting flamed in the comments is her speciality, and her efficiency rate in putting out her own fires stands at an astonishing 0%...
Why does it always happen to her? Who knows. It's always a surprise, and it always makes her fall apart in an instant. And then it happens again, in no more than two days! It's just one of life's great mysteries.
She's a singer, she's a streamer, she's a legend—she's Honnoji!

localization.name: Raging Charge
localization.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted 1 Charge and becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Honnoji Bazooka
localization.description: Targets all enemies and ignores the Stealth status effect. Deals either 100%, 200%, or 400% damage, chosen at random for each target. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

localization.name: Instant Bazooka
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, heals the user fully and grants 1 Charge to the user. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect. 500% damage and gain 2 Charges instead if there are at least 4 units with the Burn status effect. 600% damage and 3 Charges if there are at least 6 units with burn.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU for each Charge stored by the user after use, up to 150TU for 3 Charges stored.

localization.name: Honnoji Missile
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. The user gains the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and a Stun Ward. Usable only if the user does not have Healing Burn already and has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

-Stun Ward prevents Stun from being applied once, then is removed. Stun Wards cannot stack.
-A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

entries.name: Honnoji
entries.title: Flame-Catching Streamer
entries.description: Honnoji was already a pretty popular singer and dancer when she debuted as a songwriter with "Dark Clown Smiles" (currently unavailable to the public), a work absolutely overflowing with the essence of youth. It wasn't received well, though—its cringeworthy lyrics and overall low quality earned Honnoji a barrage of criticism and a crushing blow to her self-esteem. However, her trademark casual charm was met with a warmer reception in a later release titled "Honnoji! Revolution," and little by little her subscriber count started to grow.

entries.name: Alice
entries.title: Dreamy Magical Girl
entries.description: Alice was a clumsy, mediocre student at the Magic Academy, until one day she found a wounded, rabbit-like animal lying by the roadside. She treated it with a healing spell—the only type of magic she was any good at—and the creature perked up immediately. It turned out to be a familiar of the God of Sleep. She gave Alice her thanks, along with a very special power.

localization.name: Swift Strike+

localization.description: Adds Morphie next in line of allied reinforcements, then exchanges 1 other ally with it if there are already 4 allies on the battlefield. Usable only if there is at least 1 other ally on the battlefield, and there is not already an ally Morphie on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. This skill becomes locked once Alice is in Starlight Champion form.

localization.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance and Stealth status effects, revenge passive skills, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

localization.name: Magical Drain

localization.name: Hold Ground+
localization.description: If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3

localization.name: HP Up Lv3

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Alice
entries.title: Dreamy Magical Girl
entries.description:
Thanks to the creature's gift, Alice became a first-rate magical girl, capable of using any kind of magic she could think of, though for a limited time only.
True to her kind heart, she used her new powers to help people. She went to school by day and fought monsters by night—and before she knew it, she gained quite a reputation. They called her a superhero—one who appears when all hope is lost.

localization.name: Magical Knockout
localization.description: Enemies hit by this unit's attacks have a 30% chance of falling asleep for 200TU, Sleep will overwrite other status effects if applied in this way. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

entries.name: Morphie
entries.title: Dreamy Familiar
entries.description: A rabbit-like little creature, as mysterious as she's cute. She understands human speech, and can even say a couple of words herself. Though at first glance she might look helpless, her tiny body hides incredibly powerful magic.

localization.name: PurifyHealDoubleBMagicalRabbit
localization.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies, and heals them each for 25% of their max HP.

localization.name: Morphie Forcefield
localization.description: Until the end of the user's next turn, the user will become a Guardian and cannot be defeated. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable once each time this unit is conjured.

localization.name: Starlight Sacrifice
localization.description: The user is sacrificed to grant "Alice, Dreamy Magical Girl" her Starlight Champion form. When Alice enters Starlight Champion form her Hold Ground+ is reset so it can trigger again, she will be purified, healed for 100% of her max HP, Quickened by 20% (this will overwrite the effects of other quicken skills), and will immediately get the next turn by having her TU reduced to 0. While in Starlight Champion form, Alice will heal 15% of max HP on every ally and enemy turn, has a 50% chance to gain 1 Spirit after every ally and enemy turn, has her Attack increased to 1.5x (this will not stack with Enrage effects), and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Only usable when an ally "Alice, Dreamy Magical Girl" unit on the battlefield no longer has Hold Ground+ active.

localization.name: Meet Morphie!
localization.description:
When this unit enters battle all allies become Enraged, having their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turns, and allies gain 3 Spirit.

This unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.

entries.name: Lancelot
entries.title: Swordmaster Bride
entries.description: A pure white dress seems appropriate for this Lancelot—an honest young woman so unlike her ancestor, a man steeped in suspicion and rage. Keen on—that is, accustomed to pain and battle-hardened as she is, she can't help but feel anxious about wearing a wedding outfit.

localization.name: Purify Stun
localization.description:
Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies. Stuns 1 random enemy for 50TU for each time a non-Burn status effect is removed by this skill.

If the user is in Battle Trance, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this skill will become locked until the user leaves Battle Trance. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Bonds of Agony
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. The user becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills. Usable only if this unit is in Battle Trance.

localization.name: Thunder Guard
localization.description:
Every time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. Every second time this unit takes damage from an attack, the attacker will be stunned for 100TU (this is not considered a Skin effect).

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from the Burn or normal Poison status effects (stronger poisons such as Super Poison or Mega Poison can still defeat this unit).

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Ultimate Defiance
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills on the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Lancelot
entries.title: Swordmaster Bride
entries.description:
When the Knights of the Round Table were asked to choose one member to model a wedding dress, the king passed the task on to Gawain, and Gawain—to Lancelot. "This kind of thing is not exactly what I'm into..." she protested, but when she tried to find someone else to do it, all the other knights were mysteriously absent.
When Gawain, haunted by her guilty conscience, went to the photoshoot venue later, she found Lancelot entangled in the ribbons decorating the place, with a deep flush on her face.

localization.name: Purify Stun

Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies. Stuns 1 random enemy for 50TU for each time a non-Burn status effect is removed by this skill.

If the user is in Battle Trance, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this skill will become locked until the user leaves Battle Trance. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. The user will also recover HP by 100% of its own max the next time it survives an attack. (The user must survive until after the end of the turn it is attacked for this to trigger.) This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less and the user is not in Battle Trance.

entries.name: King Arthur
entries.title: Ruler of the Round Table
entries.description:
In Camelot, the Knights of the Round Table inherit their names from generation to generation, along with their curse. The third King Arthur, known as Arthur Leidram, was no exception.
Armed with her sacred sword, she dominated every battlefield she appeared on—and no one could tell if what she'd set her sights on was a world of peace or one of ruin.

localization.name: Regal Pressure
localization.description: Grants the Super Poison status effect to 2 enemies and adds 2 Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements if there was no normal Kuromori at the very end of allied reinforcements already. Otherwise adds 1 Kuromori. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

localization.name: Regal Fangsbane
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.

localization.name: Regal Cometflare
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. If the target has not defeated any units and there are any allied reinforcements, instead the last unit in the allied reinforcements is sacrificed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.name: King's Dawn
localization.description:
This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50%.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot be sent away from the battlefield during an ally turn.

-This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.
-This will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Cursed Hold Ground+
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack or Regal Eclipse, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Whenever a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains 1 Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Hammer Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Hammers.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: King Arthur
entries.title: Ruler of the Round Table
entries.description: She didn't turn evil, not exactly—she merely revealed who she had always been deep down. A ruthless absolute monarch. She'll stop at nothing to achieve her goals, and now that she has obtained the power to bend anything and everything to her will, she is sure to take the shortest path to make a new world—her new world—become reality.

This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.name: Regal Eclipse
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has not defeated any units with attacks while on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges, and only up to 3 times per battle. Consumes all Charges on the user.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Clarice
entries.title: Full-Throttle Racer
entries.description:
At a sunlit race course, the spectators' eyes are not on the state-of-the-art cars lining the pits, but on a certain silver-haired woman—one fitting the role of a race queen so seamlessly, you would never guess her day job is a maid.
Head to toe in cool blue to complement Ludmilla's deep red, Clarice stands by her mistress's side, and the venue bursts into deafening applause.

localization.name: Rallying Queen
localization.description:
Damage to 1 enemy. Allies on the battlefield with active skills that can Stun or Combo Burst type active skills are granted Sleep Wards and become Enraged (this will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies). Combo Burst type active skills also become unlocked for allies on the battlefield.

-Active Attack skills that unlock for one use when their user deals damage with an attack are considered Combo Burst type skills. They will still lock again after use or if their user leaves the battlefield.
-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Combo Drain+
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Deadly Command
localization.description: Immediately give 2 other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU, and remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from them and the user. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turns (e.g. Counter Stance and Stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not reduce the user's TU if they are targeted.

localization.name: Queen's Momentum
localization.description:
This unit gains 3 Charges and a Sleep Ward. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Other skills may also be affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

Each time this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn and gain 3 Charges.

-Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Turbo Gear
localization.description: This unit's active skills all cost 20% less TU for each charge it has stored, up to 60% less max with 3 charges. This unit is not affected by Quicken effects.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Clarice
entries.title: Full-Throttle Racer
entries.description:
As a matter of fact, today Clarice is neither a maid, nor a race queen—she's a driver, and she's here to win. The way her heart resonates with the engine of her car from the moment the green flag is waved, and the breakneck back-and-forth with other competitors... For her, racing is just like love.
She won't stop her car or let her heart slow down, no matter what—not until the victory is hers.

entries.name: Dark Jeanne
entries.title: Summertime Fallen Angel
entries.description:
They say a savior has descended from the heavens to shine light on wicked deeds and help the needy of the northern lands—one called Saint Jeanne.
Little do they know, however, that there is another, not so radiant Jeanne living here in Erden as well.

localization.name: Dark Spirit
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Otherwise, allies gain 2 additional Spirit.

localization.name: Stealth Zone
localization.description:
Each ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill is healed for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack, becomes Enraged, and gains Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each other affected ally. Cannot be used if the user already has both Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

-Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.
-Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.
-Stealth will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on affected units.

localization.name: Stealth Ravager
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

localization.name: Shadow Dash
localization.description:
Allies gain 3 Spirit. This unit is healed for 99.9% of Max HP, gains the Stealth status effect, and will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. These effects are all triggered whenever this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 40% while this unit has the Stealth status effect. Other allies on the battlefield with Stealth Strike type active skills are Quickened by 30% whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken effects on those allies.

-Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU Cost reduction is in effect.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Earth Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Earth units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Jeanne
entries.title: Summertime Fallen Angel
entries.description:
She remembers the flames consuming her body just as well as she remembers the abuse hurled at her by the same people she had once saved.
Even after she was reborn, the deep wounds in Jeanne's heart remained, preventing her from letting her guard down with anyone.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

localization.name: Shadow Dash
localization.description:
Allies gain 3 Spirit. This unit is healed for 99.9% of Max HP, gains the Stealth status effect, and will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. These effects are all triggered whenever this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 40% while this unit has the Stealth status effect. Other allies on the battlefield with Stealth Strike type active skills are Quickened by 30% whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken effects on those allies.

-Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU Cost reduction is in effect.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Mikaela's Rescue
localization.description:
The first time this unit would be defeated by an attack while on the battlefield, it will instead survive the turn on 1HP. Then if this unit has not used Survivor's Rush while on the battlefield and there are any other non-conjured allies on the battlefield, this unit will be sent away from the battlefield to be next in line of allied reinforcements. If there are no allied reinforcements to replace this unit, enough Kuromoris (up to 3) will be added to the ally team so that it can still return to reinforcements.

If this unit survives on 1HP in this way and has used Survivor's Rush while on the battlefield, it will instead heal to full HP, gain the Stealth status effect (this will overwrite other status effects on this unit), and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack.

This passive skill will be disabled if there is another ally "Dark Jeanne, Summertime Fallen Angel" on the battlefield or in ally reinforcements.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Earth Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Earth units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Himiko
entries.title: Priestess of the Sun
entries.description:
A long time ago, a woman descended from the sky into a wild, unexplored part of Erden. She promised herself that she would live there doing nothing. However, one day she met the native inhabitants of the land—a nation weak and simple, yet gentle and peaceful at heart.
She gave them the rice plant she brought with her from her birthplace. She taught them how to cultivate it. She brought rain to end droughts.
They saw her power and revered her, and soon she was known as their "Lady Himiko."

localization.name: Divine Reflection
localization.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack and Purifies them. Allies other than the user also become Enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and their current TU is reduced by 50 if their current TU is 50 or more.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. When any unit gets the turn after this lock expires, the lowest TU enemy will be stunned for 50TU, and then the user will be Purified (even if sleeping) and get the next turn instead by having their TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Wall Breaker
localization.description:
Each time this unit damages an enemy that has 100% of their max HP with an attack, this unit will immediately get the next turn.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all allies are purified.

- The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).
- The extra turn cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Mace Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Maces.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Himiko
entries.title: Priestess of the Sun
entries.description: Her people don't know that she makes the rain fall not with prayer, but with brute force. That the age she told them she was actually converted from her actual age into something more acceptable by Erden's standards. But they know how much she cares for them, and when they see how gloomily she stares at the sky sometimes, they know her homeland must be far, far away.

localization.name: Thunder Blast
localization.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 30% chance of stunning another random enemy for 100TU if the target is not defeated by this attack. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Time Dominator
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. If the target has 100+ TU, deals 500% damage and the user gains a Power Charge. If the target does not have 100+ TU but the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

localization.name: Thunder Breaker
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Stuns another random enemy for 200TU if the target was a Guardian and survives this attack with 35% or less of max HP. This skill will be locked after use until the end of the user's next turn.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. When any unit gets the turn after this lock expires, the lowest TU enemy will be stunned for 50TU, and then the user will be Purified (even if sleeping) and get the next turn instead by having their TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).
