- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).
- The extra turn cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

localization.name: The Power of Rice!
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit deals damage to an enemy with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of total damage dealt.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit has a 60% chance to heal for 30% of max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Mace Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Maces.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kaguya
entries.title: White Rabbit Princess
entries.description:
"Kaguya, the Shining Princess" is what everyone called her, quite fittingly for such a radiant beauty. A never-ending line of suitors vied for her attention every day.
She rejected them all, though—all because of the dark secret she was hiding.

localization.name: Moonlight
localization.description: 75% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to targets that are sleeping. Allies gain 1 additional Spirit for each sleeping target hit.

localization.name: Gravity Cannon
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

localization.name: Lunar Veil
localization.description: The user gains the Stealth status effect with a Stealth shield. This will overwrite other Status effects on the user. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth or Burn status effects. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shield prevents the next non-stealth status effect the user would gain while Stealthed from applying.

localization.name: Survivor's Barrage
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

localization.name: Lunar Knockout
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever an enemy survives an attack from this unit with 25% or less of max HP they will be granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU unless this unit is Burning.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack, 1 random non-sleeping enemy is granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kaguya
entries.title: White Rabbit Princess
entries.description:
Her body contained a deadly toxin developed in order to wipe out all intelligent life on Erden, and she was created with the sole purpose of delivering it to its target. Her beauty was supposed to captivate as many human men as possible, and they in turn were supposed to become the next carriers of the toxin.
However, the plan failed. Kaguya didn't want anyone on Erden to get hurt, so she decided to prevent that by avoiding human contact altogether.

localization.name: Lunar Curse
localization.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

When this unit enters battle (whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements) it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery

entries.name: Odin
entries.title: Goddess of All Laws
entries.description: Among the many gods of Asgard, Odin is known as the supreme deity, one who's been around ever since the world's conception. Her "Eye of All Laws," bestowed on her by the wise Mímir, perceives all and inspires awe in those caught in its gaze.

localization.name: Time Blaster
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy and deals 100% damage minimum. If the target has 50+ TU, deals 300% damage and steals 1 Spirit from enemies. 500% damage and 2 Spirit stolen instead if the target has 100+ TU.

localization.name: Supreme Stun
localization.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 500TU. The user is fully healed and purified (any negative status effects such as Sleep, Burn, or Poison are removed from the user). Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Eyes of Odin
localization.description:
Add a number of Winged Shades to random places in ally reinforcements equal to the number of Awakenings this unit has plus 1, up to 5 max when fully awakened. Triggered when this unit enters battle (whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements), so long as this unit is not conjured and there are at least 5 non-conjured units in the ally team (including reinforcements). The number of Winged Shades added by this effect will be doubled if there are at least 10 non-conjured units in the ally team, up to 10 max when fully awakened.

If this unit is not conjured, this unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Every Winged Shade conjured by this unit will have its Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory match this unit.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Odin
entries.title: Goddess of All Laws
entries.description:
She is always calm, collected, and magnanimous. Even during Ragnarok, the war that almost destroyed this world long years ago, she would never miss her afternoon tea time.
After the war came to an end, she solemnly handed out forgiveness to those who deserved it, and eternal punishment to those who did not. And sometimes, she would even let them see her smile.

localization.name: Time Blaster
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy and deals 100% damage minimum. If the target has 50+ TU, deals 300% damage and steals 1 Spirit from enemies. 500% damage and 2 Spirit stolen instead if the target has 100+ TU.

localization.name: Supreme Stun
localization.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 500TU. The user is fully healed and purified (any negative status effects such as Sleep, Burn, or Poison are removed from the user). Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Gungnir
localization.description: Sacrifices the ally Winged Shade on the battlefield with the highest current TU for 600% damage to 1 enemy, then adds 2 Winged Shades to random places in ally reinforcements. The user is healed fully and is purified. This does not prevent new status effects from applying to the user. Usable only if there is an ally Winged Shade on the battlefield.

localization.name: Ragnarok
localization.description: Sacrifices the user to deal 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Adds 1 Winged Shade to a random place in ally reinforcements for each Awakening the user has, up to 4 max when fully awakened. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

The number of Winged Shades added by this effect will be doubled if there are at least 10 non-conjured units in the ally team, up to 10 max when fully awakened.

If this unit is not conjured, this unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Every Winged Shade conjured by this unit will have its Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory match this unit.

localization.name: Supreme Will
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Sleep Ward.

If this unit is conjured, it immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Whenever an ally Winged Shade gets the turn or enters the battlefield, this unit will be healed for 50% of max HP, will wake up if it is Sleeping, and will gain a Sleep Ward.

-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

entries.name: Winged Shade
entries.title: Bringer of Bad Omens
entries.description: Odin's raven servants. When seen flocking together in the night, they bode disaster and strike fear into people's hearts.

localization.name: Go for the Eyes!
localization.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). This attack cannot be redirected by enemy Guardians. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

localization.name: Stun Bolt
localization.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 100TU. Usable once per battle and only if there is an ally "Odin, Goddess of All Laws" on the battlefield.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

localization.name: Supreme Revival

Usable if there is not already an ally "Odin, Goddess of All Laws" on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. The revived Odin will be considered a conjured unit and will have use limits on active skills reset.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

localization.name: Bad Omen
localization.description: Steals 1 Spirit from the enemy team. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

entries.name: Loki
entries.title: Goddess of Lies and Betrayal
entries.description: She's been around since ancient times, but not a single person has ever truly known her. She comes and goes as she pleases, changes appearances on a whim, and always keeps her cards close to her chest. Some say that even the form everyone knows as "Loki" is actually fake.

localization.name: Dark Hypnosis
localization.description:
Hypnotizes a random enemy (20%+ chance) and Mega Poisons them for 200TU (100% chance). A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. The chance of Hypnosis applying increases by 20% for each awakening the user has, up to 100% max when fully awakened.

Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the user is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use and cannot be used if an enemy is already Hypnotized. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units.

localization.name: Devil's Dance
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies, and each enemy hit has a 50% chance to be Mega Poisoned for 200TU. This attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

localization.name: Reaping Scythe
localization.description: Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. 400% damage instead against poisoned targets and steals 1 Spirit from enemies for each poisoned enemy hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

localization.name: Survivor's Edict
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy then Mega Poisons them for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

localization.name: Valshamr
localization.description: This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets unless Survivor's Edict is unlocked by this unit (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Loki
entries.title: Goddess of Lies and Betrayal
entries.description: One theory claims she is not fully divine, but the child of a cursed giant and a god. Her unwillingness to settle down is supposed to stem from the fact that she feels like she doesn't belong with either of her parents' races—or anywhere, for that matter.

localization.name: Godly Endurance
localization.description:
When this unit enters battle (whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements) it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP.

Whenever this unit takes damage and survives until after the end of the turn with below 50% of max HP, this unit will be healed fully, will gain Endure, and this effect will become locked for 100TU or until this unit defeats an enemy with an attack.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit will be healed fully and gain Endure. Endure effects cannot stack.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Radiant Mecha Bride
entries.description: As her moment in the spotlight approached, Anya was reminded of her lonely past—long days spent on the verge of death in a hospital bed, with only the hope to see her sister again keeping her alive.

localization.name: Dream Weaver
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if there is a sleeping enemy (even if the target is not sleeping). If there are no sleeping enemies, 50% damage instead and allies gain an additional 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill.

localization.name: Lights Out
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. For each targeted enemy that does not fall asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 2 Spirit. Usable only if no enemies are sleeping.

localization.name: Demolition Raid
localization.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

localization.name: Aegis Overload
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies and heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. All allies will become Enraged and all enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The user will also have their Power Barrier passive skill reactivated and gain a Power Charge. Usable only if the user's Power Barrier passive skill is deactivated and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

- Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
- Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
- Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Power Barrier
localization.description:
This Barrier will be activated whenever this unit enters battle.

While this unit is on the battlefield and this Barrier is activated:
- Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.
-If this unit would be defeated by an attack, this Barrier will be deactivated and this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP.

If this unit's Barrier is deactivated and it would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Radiant Mecha Bride
entries.description: When Anya finally stepped into the white wedding venue, her eyes were immediately drawn to the silhouette of Astrid standing by the altar. Dressed in an exquisite outfit, she radiated sheer beauty that simply took Anya's breath away. And when Astrid noticed her in turn, the same stunned admiration was reflected on her face too.

localization.name: Dream Weaver
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if there is a sleeping enemy (even if the target is not sleeping). If there are no sleeping enemies, 50% damage instead and allies gain an additional 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill.

localization.name: Lights Out
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. For each targeted enemy that does not fall asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 2 Spirit. Usable only if no enemies are sleeping.

localization.name: Demolition Raid
localization.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

localization.name: Aegis Overload
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies and heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. All allies will become Enraged and all enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The user will also have their Power Barrier passive skill reactivated and gain a Power Charge. Usable only if the user's Power Barrier passive skill is deactivated and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

- Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
- Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
- Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Power Barrier
localization.description:
This Barrier will be activated whenever this unit enters battle.

While this unit is on the battlefield and this Barrier is activated:
- Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.
-If this unit would be defeated by an attack, this Barrier will be deactivated and this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP.

If this unit's Barrier is deactivated and it would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

localization.name: Adaptive Circuit
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 20%+ chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

The chance of these effects triggering increases by 20% for each Awakening this unit has, up to 100% when fully awakened. Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Cleopatra
entries.title: The Last Pharaoh
entries.description:
Once, she had it all.
She was born in the Kingdom of Kemet, a land favored by the great river, blessed with rich, black soil—just like she was blessed with an abundance of talents. She didn't let herself rely solely on her gifts, though, but used them to gain as much knowledge as possible. Unmatched in skill, she was more than qualified to take on any number of duties. However, there was only one role she had her eyes on...

localization.name: Snake Bite
localization.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The damaged enemy also becomes Poisoned, with a 25% chance of becoming Mega Poisoned for 200TU instead. Poisons will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Mirage Serpent
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. If they are poisoned, deals 600% damage, and Mega Poisons them for 200TU. This will overwrite existing Poison on that enemy.

localization.name: Checkmate
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if there is an Imposter among enemies on the battlefield.

localization.name: Dusk Mirage
localization.description: Exchanges 1 enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. If there are no enemy reinforcements, add enough Imposters to the enemy team to still send the targeted enemy to reinforcements (max 3). Usable only if there are at least 2 non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield and becomes locked for 200TU after use. This skill will have no effect if the targeted enemy is Immovable.

localization.name: Soul Substitute
localization.description:
While there is an Imposter among enemies on the battlefield:
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit would be defeated by an attack while it does not have Endure, this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP, and then an enemy Imposter will be sacrificed.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Endure. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

A unit with Endure will endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cleopatra
entries.title: The Last Pharaoh
entries.description:
Once, she lost all she had.
She was too brilliant for her own good. Those she devoted her life to turned their backs on her, those she thought loyal suddenly sang a different tune—and they crushed her love under their feet. Seeking death, she turned to venom, but what she ended up embracing was deadlier than any toxin—lethal enough, in fact, to leave death behind and receive eternity. And it was with venom that she then purged her beloved, poisoned country.

localization.name: Queen's Domain
localization.description:
The first damage this unit deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements.

Whenever an enemy Imposter on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source (including Soul Substitute), all non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield that are not sleeping will become Mega Poisoned for 200TU and will be stunned for 50TU.

entries.name: Gilgamesh
entries.title: Lion Queen of the Desert
entries.description:
There once was a girl from the slums. Everything she had had been taken from her—her parents, her home, all her possessions. Until one day, she was finally given something; a gift quite unexpected and unique—the crown.
She could have stopped at being a figurehead. It would have been enough to provide her with everything she'd always lacked, and more. But she chose to become a genuine queen instead.

localization.name: Royal Flame
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy if the user is burning. Otherwise, damage to 1 enemy and the user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

localization.name: Royal Ignition
localization.description: Burns all units on the battlefield, this will overwrite other status effects on those units. All allies are fully healed. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each other ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Royal Judgment
localization.description: 750% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if all units on the battlefield are burning. This is considered a Burn Drive type active skill.

localization.name: Majestic Focus
localization.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

If this unit would be defeated while it has the Burn status effect, it will instead survive with 1HP. Then if this unit survives until after the end of the turn it will be healed fully and Burn will be removed from this unit.

This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50% while it has the Burn status effect. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Spear Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Gilgamesh
entries.title: Lion Queen of the Desert
entries.description:
And so fortune smiled on the girl, and she inherited the throne. But the throne was just a vessel for greatness. The effort made to fill it, the time spent tirelessly pushing forward in order to be recognized as a true queen—that was all her.
Soon enough, her domain echoed with voices praising her. But she didn't rest on her laurels. She kept on learning and improving herself, all to see the ones who had recognized her as their queen smile.

This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50% while it has the Burn status effect. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Explosive Velocity
localization.description:
After this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all other units on the battlefield are stunned for 150TU. Ally Stun Absorbers do not redirect this stun, and allies will not be stunned by this effect if there is an enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield.

Other burning allies will have their TU costs reduced by 20% while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with Quicken effects and weapon skills with diminishing returns, but will not apply to allies that have other TU reduction passive skills.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all other allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will become Enraged, this will overwrite previous Enrage effects on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Spear Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Rizette
entries.title: Cerulean Bride
entries.description:
The sunlight pouring into the chapel makes all the whites even brighter as Rizette looks up at her intended, slightly taller than her even though she's wearing high heels. She can feel everyone gently watching over her—her beloved little brother who walked her down the aisle, her companions who fought by her side on countless battlefields...
She hears the big question, "Do you?" and the answer is so obvious, has been for ages, really. And as the bells start ringing, she thinks to herself that it all feels like a dream.

localization.name: Dual Toxins
localization.description:
The first time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, the user will get the next turn by having their TU reduced to 0.

Targets 2 enemies. If they are not burning, poisoned, or sleeping, they are randomly granted either Noxious Sleep for 100TU or Mega Poison for 200TU. 

Noxious Sleep can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage. A unit with Noxious Sleep will be granted Mega Poison for 200TU when Noxious Sleep expires.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. These status effects will overwrite other status effects if applied.

localization.name: Cerulean Bride
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a sleeping target.

localization.name: Endless Bride
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a poisoned target.

localization.name: Final Vows
localization.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy, 400% if there is any poisoned or sleeping enemy on the battlefield, or 600% damage if there are both (even if the target is not poisoned or sleeping). If the targeted enemy is not burning, poisoned, or sleeping, they are randomly granted either Noxious Sleep for 100TU or Mega Poison for 200TU.

These status effects will overwrite other status effects if applied. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.name: Noxious Aura
localization.description:
Each time an enemy damages this unit with an attack there is a 50% chance that they are immediately granted Noxious Sleep for 100TU unless they are burning or using an attack that will cause burn. This is not considered a skin effect.

Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy, that enemy will be granted Noxious Sleep for 100TU. Each time this unit damages a sleeping enemy (including Noxious Sleep), that enemy will be granted Mega Poison for 200TU.

This skill's status effects will not spread if this unit is burning.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Rizette
entries.title: Cerulean Bride
entries.description: She doesn't notice it really is a dream, not until an unexpected visitor points it out—another Rizette, dressed in black, visibly angry at the one who dreamed up this happy world. "It's not fair that only you get to have this," that Rizette says. But she drives away all the evil things lurking around nevertheless. Perplexed, Rizette in white can't help but ask, "Have you come to destroy my dream, or to protect it?"

localization.name: Undying Love
localization.description:
This unit gains 3 charges. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Whenever a poisoned or sleeping enemy gets the turn, this unit gains 1 charge after the end of the turn. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

This unit will have their TU costs reduced by 25% while there is a poisoned or sleeping enemy, or 50% instead if there are both. This unit cannot be quickened.

entries.name: Dark Sun Wukong
entries.title: The Great Menace, Hell's Equal
entries.description:
Heralded by a roar of laughter, a golden-haired girl appears in the moonlight. She holds Ruyi Bang in her hand and wears Jinguer on her head...but she is not Sun Wukong. She is a different troublemaker, born from within Wukong. Her name is Vajra.
For you see, a girl with a dangerous mix of Yin and Yang personalities was once abandoned on Mount Huaguo...

localization.name: Combined Forces
localization.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each other "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" in the ally team, including reinforcements (800% max). Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Doubling Arts
localization.description:
Adds another Dark Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements. This Dark Sun Wukong's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user.

Then if 4 allies are on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the Dark Sun Wukong added to allied reinforcements. Usable only if the user doesn't have the Counter Stance status effect. This skill is locked if there are 4+ conjured copies of "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" among allies on the battlefield and allied reinforcements.

entries.name: Dark Sun Wukong
entries.title: The Great Menace, Hell's Equal
entries.description:
When the Monkey God took Wukong in, he was well aware of the two personalities dwelling in her. And so, he didn't only raise one of them, he raised both.
When Vajra finally emerged, she could wield Ruyi Bang, fly Nimbus, and use Monkey God's techniques just as well as Wukong could—because she trained just as hard, though hidden the whole time.

These effects cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

entries.name: Otohime
entries.title: Ruler of the Dragon Palace
entries.description:
The young lady of the Dragon Palace leads her people as skilfully as she can lead their traditional dance. You would be ill-advised to praise her for accomplishing so much at such a young age, though—unless you want to become the next target of her exceptionally sharp tongue.
Because you see, she despises nothing more than being considered a child.

localization.name: Knockout Hit
localization.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user's Drowning Blossom active skill has reached its usage limit. If no enemies are sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Drowning Blossom
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, this damage will not wake up the enemy. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if 2 or more enemies are sleeping. This attack ignores skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable 3 times per battle.

localization.name: Nightmare Dragon
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each sleeping target hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

localization.name: With the Fishes
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Turning Tides
localization.description:
Sleeps the non-sleeping enemy with the highest current TU for 200TU, then Sleeps the non-sleeping enemy with the lowest current TU for 200TU, even if those targets have already slept while on the battlefield. This unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. These effects are triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements.

Until this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, or if this unit is conjured:
-This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
-When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Otohime
entries.title: Ruler of the Dragon Palace
entries.description:
She is sharp in performing her duties as well, always making sure the residents of her domain are safe and provided with sufficient amount of dream pieces to sustain themselves. However, when faced with unforeseen situations, she tends to get overwhelmed and freeze up.
No matter how much she pushes herself to act mature, she's still a child in some respects—but her subjects love that side of her too.

localization.name: Knockout Hit
localization.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user's Drowning Blossom active skill has reached its usage limit. If no enemies are sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Drowning Blossom
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, this damage will not wake up the enemy. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if 2 or more enemies are sleeping. This attack ignores skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable 3 times per battle.

localization.name: Nightmare Dragon
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each sleeping target hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

localization.name: With the Fishes
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Turning Tides
localization.description:
Sleeps the non-sleeping enemy with the highest current TU for 200TU, then Sleeps the non-sleeping enemy with the lowest current TU for 200TU, even if those targets have already slept while on the battlefield. This unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. These effects are triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements.

Until this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, or if this unit is conjured:
-This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
-When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Deadly Revival
localization.description:
If this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, revive this unit to the very front of allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit and cannot be revived again. Use limits on active skills will be reset for the revived unit. This is not a Revenge passive skill.

If this unit is conjured, its attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, until it defeats an enemy that isn't a Mori or Imposter with an attack.

This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cinderella
entries.title: Black Rose of Fresalia
entries.description:
If Cinderella never met her fairy godmother, if she stayed at the ball past midnight, if she lost her best friend, if, if, if—
She doesn't wait for someone to grant her happiness, she reaches out and takes it for herself. She doesn't bother with promises, she just chooses whichever option looks interesting at the moment.
"And if anyone threatens Talia, I will crush them, no matter who or what they are."

localization.name: Shatter Blast
localization.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield.

After damage is dealt the user becomes enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and has a 50% chance to immediately get the next turn. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Spirit Crash
localization.description: The Enemy team loses all Spirit. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

localization.name: Savage Storm
localization.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also gain a power charge and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

localization.name: Oppressive Ground
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can be triggered once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit uses Spirit Crash, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Steals 1 Spirit from the enemy team whenever this unit deals damage with an attack. Attacks that target multiple enemies will trigger this once for each enemy they damage.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks unless this unit has defeated an enemy while on the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cinderella
entries.title: Black Rose of Fresalia
entries.description:
Once she wrapped herself in darkness, she tried to act accordingly. However, despite the fact that on the surface she seemed to have turned sadistic, at heart she was still the same kind girl she'd been before. Even when she was about to take away another person's power, she was courteous enough to explain the risks and get their consent.
The truth is, when she embraced darkness, she was secretly a bit happy that she was going to match her best friend now.

localization.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield.

After damage is dealt the user becomes enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and has a 50% chance to immediately get the next turn. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can be triggered once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit uses Spirit Crash, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Steals 1 Spirit from the enemy team whenever this unit deals damage with an attack. Attacks that target multiple enemies will trigger this once for each enemy they damage.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks unless this unit has defeated an enemy while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Berserker's Requiem
localization.description:
Every time an ally starts their turn with 10 Spirit, or an enemy starts theirs with 0 Spirit, this unit enters Berserker Form at the end of that turn.

While in Berserker Form, this unit's active skill TU costs are reduced by 40%, and this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Berserker Form ends when this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, and can then be triggered again.

Whenever this unit is defeated by an enemy, steals Spirit from the enemy team until either ally Spirit reaches 10, or enemy Spirit reaches 0.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cerberus
entries.title: Guardian of the Underworld
entries.description:
The self-proclaimed "future Ruler of Hell" was in fact just a gatekeeper. She was fired, however, and after trying to find her place for a little while, she became a Red Dragon Knight... Well, to be more precise, a Red Dragon Squire.
"Hey!!! I wasn't fired! I quit!"
Oh, and her dog ears? They're fake.

localization.name: Scorching Spirit
localization.description:
Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

localization.name: Burning Claw
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy and Burns all other Allies. Burn will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Underworld Burn
localization.description:
The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. Also heals each other ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill for 50% of their max HP. 

This skill is unlocked either:
- Each time the user defeats another unit with an attack.
- When this unit enters battle, if 2 other allies are either Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill. 

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Hellhound
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies, 500% if the user is below 50% of max HP.

Each unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being stunned for 100TU. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Hell's Guard Dog
localization.description:
This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks.
This unit is not affected by stun effects.
Burns all units on the battlefield when this unit is defeated by an enemy, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cerberus
entries.title: Guardian of the Underworld
entries.description:
After springing into existence, she immediately had two fated encounters: first with a dog—a creature destined to become her arch-nemesis—and then with a boy who came to her rescue.
Convinced that what's scary to her must also be scary to others, she dons dog ears in order to give herself a menacing aura. And as for the boy, she keeps the memory of their meeting safe in her heart.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

300% damage to all enemies, 500% if the user is below 50% of max HP.

Each unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being stunned for 100TU. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Hell's Guard Dog
localization.description:
This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks.
This unit is not affected by stun effects.
Burns all units on the battlefield when this unit is defeated by an enemy, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: 3 Headed Defense
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will:
- Gain Endure if it didn't have Endure when it was attacked.
- Gain Healing Burn if it does not have Healing Burn, or a Sleep status effect (excluding Cursed or Noxious).
- Heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 50% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Red Dragon of the East
entries.description:
In her life, Ludmilla's shared a bond with countless people. A lot of them were other knights—the superiors who taught her ins and outs of being a knight, the subordinates she taught in turn, the comrades she felt at ease with. All these bonds made her stronger, but at the same time...
As a matter of fact, the outfit she's wearing right now was obtained due to a certain bond too.

localization.name: Weakening Drain
localization.description:
100% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 200TU on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Friendly Evasion
localization.description: Grants the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield to 1 other ally. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

localization.name: Dawn of Spring
localization.description:
Immediately give all other allies that are at max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Then heals all allies other than the user for 100% of their max HP, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Recovery Mist for 200TU. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Flower Shower
localization.description:
Randomly grants each non-burning ally either a Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, or Poison Ward and Purifies them.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

Weakens all enemies.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Evasive Guard
localization.description:
This unit has a 20% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets, plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings). Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored. If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield for 200TU after entering battle.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Red Dragon of the East
entries.description:
Some of the bonds she established were severed, despite her best efforts.
She was a knight and so were they. Protectors of their country, they were no strangers to conflict. She trained them to protect each other too, but still, she couldn't stop their blood from being spilled. 
She thinks of them as she looks outside, wishing that at least the extraordinary snowy landscape before her would stay forever unchanged.

localization.name: Weakening Drain
localization.description:
100% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 200TU on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

Then heals all allies other than the user for 100% of their max HP, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Recovery Mist for 200TU. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Flower Shower
localization.description:
Randomly grants each non-burning ally either a Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, or Poison Ward and Purifies them.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

Weakens all enemies.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Evasive Guard
localization.description:
This unit has a 20% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets, plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings). Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored. If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield for 200TU after entering battle.

localization.name: Unrelenting Defense
localization.description:
The first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will enter Enduring Stance for 150TU. While in Enduring Stance, this unit cannot be defeated by damage unless it is burning, and cannot be granted Poison, Sleep, or Stuns.
Once Enduring Stance ends, this unit will enter Recovery Stance for 150TU. While in Recovery Stance, this unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks, and heals for 40% of max HP at the end of each turn. Whenever this unit is at max HP after this healing triggers, it will be Purified and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. These stances can trigger once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

When this unit enters battle all enemies will be granted Rage Wards. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Percival
entries.title: Forsaken Round Table Knight
entries.description:
A black castle tower looms over a remote island in the middle of the open sea, marking the place of exile of the disgraced Knights of the Round Table.
Normally, a prison would be rife with foul words and even fouler deeds, but here, there are none. Because from the very beginning, the one keeping this place in order was Percival, a knight recognized for his sense of justice by King Arthur himself.
The current Percival, the third warden of the prison, is just as dedicated to upholding justice, and just as feared by the inmates.

localization.name: Blastwave
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies. 250% damage instead and stuns each enemy for 100TU if they are dealt damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Royal Blightburst
localization.description:
The user becomes Enraged, and is granted either a Stun Ward or Sleep Ward at random. Heals all allies for 400% of the user's Attack and Weakens all enemies. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Royal Void
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. 500% damage to targets that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, or to any target if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Elemental Eruption
localization.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Enemies damaged by this attack will be granted one of the following effects:
- Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are a Fire or Light unit.
- Mega Poison for 200TU if they are a Storm or Earth unit.
- Stun for 200TU if they are a Water or Dark unit.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again after each use. After the first use, unlocks each time the user damages an enemy with a different attack. Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

localization.name: Forsaken Knight
localization.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects until its first turn since entering the battlefield.
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of this unit's attack when this unit is defeated by an enemy.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks for 150TU, is healed to max HP and becomes Enraged. Then all other allies gain the Armor status effect and become Enraged. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Water Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Water units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Percival
entries.title: Forsaken Round Table Knight
entries.description: Dedicated to her mission as she was, after spending years under the constant stream of insults from her prisoners, Percival's composure finally snapped. "I'm a Knight of the Round Table, aren't I? And yet I haven't even seen the Round Table once! All I do is sit here and deal with criminals, day in, day out... I'm doing a good job, right? Right!?" "Can someone please praise me...?"

localization.name: Blastwave
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies. 250% damage instead and stuns each enemy for 100TU if they are dealt damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Royal Blightburst
localization.description:
The user becomes Enraged, and is granted either a Stun Ward or Sleep Ward at random. Heals all allies for 400% of the user's Attack and Weakens all enemies. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Royal Void
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. 500% damage to targets that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, or to any target if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Elemental Eruption
localization.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Enemies damaged by this attack will be granted one of the following effects:
- Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are a Fire or Light unit.
- Mega Poison for 200TU if they are a Storm or Earth unit.
- Stun for 200TU if they are a Water or Dark unit.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again after each use. After the first use, unlocks each time the user damages an enemy with a different attack. Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

localization.name: Forsaken Knight
localization.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects until its first turn since entering the battlefield.
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of this unit's attack when this unit is defeated by an enemy.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks for 150TU, is healed to max HP and becomes Enraged. Then all other allies gain the Armor status effect and become Enraged. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

localization.name: Unyielding Warrior
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, and cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or other status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Fire or Light, 2 random enemies gain the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- Storm or Earth, 2 random enemies that are not sleeping gain the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.
- Water or Dark, 2 random enemies are stunned for 200TU.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Water Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Water units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Mordred
entries.title: Rebel of the Round Table
entries.description:
The girl is defiant. Her name is listed among the Knights of the Round Table, but she has no intention of serving any ruler. If she ever meets King Arthur again, she will immediately go for the kill.
The girl is unfilial. The first Mordred was her grandfather, but she couldn't care less about the remorse he felt. She only wishes she could have slain him herself.
The girl is a rebel, and she's determined to take on the entire damned world.

localization.name: Royal Bloodbath
localization.description:
Immediately give all other allies that are burning the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Grants the user Healing Burn for 300TU. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. This skill cannot be used unless there is at least 1 other burning ally on the battlefield.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

localization.name: Heated Strike
localization.description:
100% damage to 1 enemy, 400% damage if the user is burning, 600% damage if there are at least 4 units with the burn status effect. The user is granted Healing Burn for 300TU and 1 Charge after damage is dealt.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Royal Crimsonsting
localization.description: 300% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each each charge stored by the user (600% max). This attack does not consume charges and ignores the Stealth status effect. The user is granted 1 Charge after damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect or if the user is alone on the battlefield.

localization.name: Burning Blood
localization.description:
The user is granted the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU, and is healed for 100% of max HP. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. Mega Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Ashes to Ashes
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit uses Burning Blood, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while burning and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Earth Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Earth units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Mordred
entries.title: Rebel of the Round Table
entries.description:
Mordred's curse makes its bearers weak to sunlight. In return, they can gain strength by sucking other people's blood.
Bonds of blood helped keep the Round Table unified over the years. Is it a surprise, then, that the knight inclined to steal blood ended up exiled and forsaken?
