localization.name: Blood Reaping
localization.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

Whenever a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit heals 100% of its max HP, becomes Enraged, gains 1 charge and the Healing Burn status effect.

This will overwrite other Status Effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Earth Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Earth units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Sleeping Beauty
entries.title: Lakeside Reverie
entries.description: The new season brings along sleepy warmth—but the earthy smell of plants and the early summer breeze tickling Talia's skin tell her this is not a dream. She hears a voice calling her name, and when she turns around, she sees Cinderella. She calls her best friend back, like she always does, and hurries to her side, relieved to know that the world around her is indeed the real one.

localization.name: Hypno Blast+
localization.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 25% chance of granting that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Mass Sleep
localization.description: Targets all units on the battlefield other than the user. Grants all Fire, Earth and Dark targets the Sleep status effect for 200TU and all Water, Storm and Light targets the Sleep status effect for 50TU. This Sleep will be applied even to targets that have already slept while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 300TU after use.

localization.name: Piercing Nightmare
localization.description:
400% damage to all enemies, 600% instead to all sleeping enemies. Each non-sleeping enemy hit has a 50% chance of being granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Usable if there is a sleeping enemy on the battlefield. Allies lose 1 Spirit for each sleeping enemy hit by this attack. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use if Allies would lose more Spirit than they have in this way. Other effects that would cause Allies to lose Spirit may apply before Spirit lost by this skill.

localization.name: Hat Trick
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield after this attack.

localization.name: Sleeping Beauty
localization.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1HP, this unit grants a random non-sleeping enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This is not a Skin passive skill.

Allies gain 1 Spirit each time a sleeping unit on the battlefield gets the turn.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Sleeping Beauty
entries.title: Lakeside Reverie
entries.description:
Lanterns rise up to the night sky, carrying the hopes of those who lit them. Nightmare Beauty looks at them and wonders why people wish for things beyond their reach, as if her own past had faded from her memory.
"Sometimes the dreams you thought were unattainable do come true. And since a miracle like that has already happened here, I think my work is done. Even so... Would you mind if I came to see you every now and then, on a fleeting summer night?"

Allies gain 1 Spirit each time a sleeping unit on the battlefield gets the turn.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

localization.name: Dream Defense
localization.description:
When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 40% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP, plus 15% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings).

Each time a sleeping ally gets the turn, they will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken, Weaken and Enrage skills on that ally.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Rapunzel
entries.title: Lady of the Tower
entries.description:
In her tower in the woods, Rapunzel is waiting for her soulmate. She doesn't know his name nor his face, but she knows she is bound to meet him one day. She lets her lovely song unfold from the top of her tower, wishing he would hurry up and find her already.
When Rapunzel's true love finally arrives, perhaps her long, beautiful hair will act as the hand of fate, bringing them together at last.

localization.name: Surgical Strike
localization.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If no enemies are sleeping, deals 100% damage, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If an enemy is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead, Weakens the target and grants the user a Power Charge.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. Weakening will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

localization.name: Golden Purify
localization.description:
Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 2 other allies and grants them either a Sleep Ward or Poison Ward at random. If a status effect is removed by this skill, the user is Enraged. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each status effect removed by this skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not remove negative status effects from the user if they are targeted.

localization.name: Golden Bolts
localization.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 750% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Removes Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) from the user and grants the user Recovery Mist for 100TU. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable if the user has a Power Charge or a Burn or Poison status effect.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.

localization.name: Crackling Smite
localization.description: This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Golden Shield
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or other status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit will heal 30% of max HP on every ally turn.

Each time a sleeping enemy gets the turn, removes Sleep status effects from this unit and this unit is Enraged.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Axe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Axes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Rapunzel
entries.title: Lady of the Tower
entries.description:
She often climbs to the top of her tower. The night sky seems so close from there... But she still can't reach the stars, and with the additional distance from the ground, she feels even more lonely than usual; painfully aware that she won't be leaving this place, not today.
She wonders if her beloved stars watch her sometimes, just like she watches them.

localization.name: Grand Takedown
localization.description:
When this unit defeats 1 or more enemy units with an attack, it grants:
- This unit a Power Charge.

- Recovery Mist for 100TU to a random ally that doesn't already have Recovery Mist.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Axe Mastery

entries.name: Lü Bu
entries.title: Master of Treachery
entries.description:
She was a girl with no name, just a number carved into her skin. Until one day she killed the adults that chained her, burned the walls that confined her, destroyed everything that stood in her way to freedom.
She did whatever she needed to stay alive, and threw away what she didn't need anymore without hesitation. And people called it duplicity, they called it betrayal. Before she knew it, she had gained a name, and the name had gained notoriety.
Perhaps the number on her skin has been an evil omen from the start...

localization.name: Dragonfire Dance
localization.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and this unit will immediately get the next turn if this was not the last attack used by this unit while on the battlefield. This attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heatwave is not considered an attack.

localization.name: Heatwave
localization.description:
The user is granted the Burn status effect and is fully healed. Each other unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being burned and then stunned for 100TU. Burn will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Then allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning allies on the battlefield.

Usable if the user is not burning or if allies have 1 or less Spirit. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Hellfire
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, 600% damage if the target has 100TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Scorched Earth
localization.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 200TU after each use.

localization.name: Flames of War
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

While this unit has the Burn status effect, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Lü Bu
entries.title: Master of Treachery
entries.description:
She doesn't have any positive emotions left now, but she used to have them once. She used to have someone she cared about.
Lü Bu often thinks about the girl who shared her fate as a child; wonders where she might be now, what she's doing these days... Constant enemy attacks have left her with no illusions, though—with too many betrayals on her record, Lü Bu doesn't have anywhere to go anymore.
Except for the land across the sea.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

While this unit has the Burn status effect, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.

localization.name: Fuel to the Fire
localization.description:
This unit and all enemies are granted the Burn status effect, then all burning non-Water enemies are stunned for 100TU. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack, this unit gains Endure, a Poison Ward and becomes fully healed.

Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Musashi
entries.title: Oni Slayer
entries.description:
She was a girl with no name and no memory of her past. A certain samurai found her washed up on the shore and gave her the name Musashi, along with his own surname, Miyamoto. In return, she called him "Master." She mimicked his techniques in a naive, earnest way, befitting a child with no past to rely on.
She made new memories every day, while the old ones stayed forgotten.

localization.name: Lone Wolf
localization.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

localization.name: Glacial Slash
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Absolute Zero
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

localization.name: Dual Heaven Style
localization.description:
The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, will enter Dual Heaven Stance for 200TU and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. While in Dual Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack.

localization.name: No Mercy
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
 -This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.
 -Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Musashi
entries.title: Oni Slayer
entries.description: A certain girl calls Musashi by a number. She is surrounded by scary adults, with nowhere to run, nowhere to hide— "You get lost in dreams as easily as in the waking world, kid," her master's words used to wake her from her nightmares, his smile soothing her fears. And now, he has left her too, gone where she cannot follow, before she could gain the full mastery of his teachings. Luckily, he left behind The Book of Five Rings, a treatise to guide her steps.

localization.name: Glacial Winds
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack or Absolute Zero, this unit cannot be defeated by damage for the next 100TU, and gains Sleep and Poison Wards.

After this unit's first turn on the battlefield, 1 random enemy Guardian on the battlefield will be sent to next in line of enemy reinforcements. This will fail if there are no enemy reinforcements, or if the target is immovable.

entries.name: King Arthur
entries.title: Seaside Monarch
entries.description:
Dusk was gathering across the sandy beach, mingling light with darkness. The waves were low, as if groveling, and even the sea breeze had gone quiet as the ruler of the Round Table took a leisurely walk.
Her mind wandering, she realized she had never been to the seaside before, even though Camelot had access to the sea. Watching the waves break on the shore and retreat only to come back again, she thought about her past and her future.
"It is quite pleasant here, I must admit."

localization.name: Regal Barrage
localization.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has stealth. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

localization.name: King's Shield
localization.description:
Heals the user fully. The user is granted a Power Charge, Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Usable 5 times per battle.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. 

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

localization.name: Regal Wavemaster
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 150TU or more in the turn order. If this damage does not defeat the target, allies gain 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Regal Cornobble
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). Heals the user fully. The user is granted Stealth. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge. This does not consume the Power Charge.

Weak will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

localization.name: Absolute Monarch
localization.description:
Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit cannot be defeated. Afterwards, if this unit would be defeated while it has a Power Charge, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. The Power Charge will be consumed when this effect is triggered.

At the end of each of this unit's turns, or when a non-conjured enemy is defeated, a random enemy with more than 50TU will be stunned for 50TU plus 50TU for each other Storm ally on the battlefield.

When this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Stuns 2 random enemies for 100TU.
- This unit will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: King Arthur
entries.title: Seaside Monarch
entries.description:
A familiar figure appeared over Kay, blocking out the sun and his view of the clear skies. Judging by the menacing aura he could sense, he concluded that it must be his former king, changed after obtaining the power of Avalon. And then, the figure spoke.
"Don't you think you have slept enough, brother?"
Kay jerked awake, shaken by what he had witnessed in his dream."Stop meddling with people's heads, you blasted incubus..." he mumbled to himself before closing his eyes again.

This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50%.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot be sent away from the battlefield during an ally turn.

-This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.
-This will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

entries.name: Frankenstein
entries.title: Twin Horrors
entries.description: In a small, remote village, there once lived twin sisters—one curious and bright, but sickly, the other caring and helpful, but easily scared. They led a quiet life, doted on by the village residents. Until one day, a certain man appeared in their house, and a dreadful incident occurred.

localization.name: Sister Strike
localization.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is in the ally team, including reinforcements.

localization.name: Protective Sister
localization.description: For 100TU, the user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is among allies on the battlefield.

localization.name: Energy Infusion
localization.description:
Immediately give 1 other ally "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them a Power Charge.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

localization.name: It's Alive!
localization.description:
Adds "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" to the next in line of allied reinforcements. This Mary's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user.

Then if 4 allies are on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the Mary added to allied reinforcements. Usable only if the user doesn't have "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" in the ally team, including reinforcements. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use, and is usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Pulling the Strings
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit enters the battlefield, an ally "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" on the battlefield will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0 and will be Purified.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Frankenstein
entries.title: Twin Horrors
entries.description: Frankenstein was born with a heart disease, which made any kind of physical effort a serious risk to her life. But her feeble body harbored tremendous magical power—a threat of entirely different sort, lurking within her like a monster. Mary feared that power and always kept a close watch over her sister.

localization.name: Sister Substitute
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep. This unit cannot be Stunned or defeated by non-attack damage if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is among allies on the battlefield.

While there is a "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" among allies on the battlefield, if this unit would be defeated by an attack, this unit will be healed for 100% of max HP, and then the ally "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" will be sacrificed.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Mary
entries.title: Guardian Angel on Strings
entries.description:
Not so long ago, Mary took her frail, sickly sister and ran away from their monstrous father. The twins settled in a small, remote village, and thought they'd found their peace and happiness. Their past wasn't supposed to find them there, ever.
But one day, the monster came knocking on their door again.

entries.name: Genie
entries.title: Almighty Lamp Spirit
entries.description: Genie, the spirit inhabiting a certain magic lamp, shows up before those who have a sincere wish in their hearts. Though she wields magic no sorcerer on Erden could even dream of, once she's granted a person's three wishes, she gets locked away in her lamp for ten years.

localization.name: Golden Sandstorm
localization.description: 50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with another attack.

localization.name: Lamp Blast
localization.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 75%+. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Instant Give Turn
localization.description: Immediately give 1 other ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

localization.name: Big Awesome Move
localization.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy, and randomly grants that enemy either Stun for 200TU, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and revenge passive skills. If Ally Spirit is at 0, allies gain 5 Spirit. If Ally Spirit is at 10, allies lose 5 Spirit. Usable if allies have 0 or 10 Spirit.

Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: All Powerful?
localization.description:
This unit has a 33% chance to:

- have its TU reduced to 0 after dealing damage with an Attack (1 chance per hit).
- each turn, survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.
- ignore the incoming status effects Sleep, Poison, and Burn.
- ignore incoming Stun effects.
- ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
- enrage 1 random ally at the end of each turn.
- weaken 1 random enemy at the end of each turn.

The chance for each effect is determined independently each time they may occur. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Genie
entries.title: Almighty Lamp Spirit
entries.description: The time Genie can spend enjoying the outside world is limited, so whenever she isn't busy granting wishes, she tries to experience as much as possible. She pursues latest fashion. She collects gadgets. She learns new slang, and puts it to use without hesitation. And since she has to disappear for ten years every time her work is done, whenever she reappears, she seems a little out of date.

localization.name: Instant Give Turn
localization.description: Immediately give 1 other ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

localization.name: Big Awesome Move
localization.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy, and randomly grants that enemy either Stun for 200TU, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and revenge passive skills. If Ally Spirit is at 0, allies gain 5 Spirit. If Ally Spirit is at 10, allies lose 5 Spirit. Usable if allies have 0 or 10 Spirit.

Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: All Powerful?
localization.description:
This unit has a 33% chance to:

- have its TU reduced to 0 after dealing damage with an Attack (1 chance per hit).
- each turn, survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.
- ignore the incoming status effects Sleep, Poison, and Burn.
- ignore incoming Stun effects.
- ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
- enrage 1 random ally at the end of each turn.
- weaken 1 random enemy at the end of each turn.

The chance for each effect is determined independently each time they may occur. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Unlimited Healing
localization.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 75% of its max HP.

Purifies and heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of this unit's attack when another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cinderella
entries.title: Princess of the Beach
entries.description: The Princess of Fresalia and her personal attendant were in high spirits when they set out for the seaside—Cinderella had been saving money to buy a swimsuit specially for this occasion, and couldn't wait to show it off. However, when she emerged from the changing booth, Talia was nowhere to be seen.

localization.name: Stealth Blast
localization.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Waves of Sleep
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

localization.name: Knockout Storm
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are left with below 50% of max HP. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect or at the cost of consuming 1 charge if the user has no stealth. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

localization.name: Unending Nightmare
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. If the target is sleeping, deals 600% damage, grants them the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even though they have already slept while on the battlefield, and allies gain 4 Spirit.

localization.name: Cinderella's Resolve
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned.

This unit enters battle with Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and 3 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of its max HP. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Whenever a sleeping enemy gets the turn or this unit damages a sleeping enemy with an attack, this unit gains 1 charge.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Hammer Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Hammers in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cinderella
entries.title: Princess of the Beach
entries.description:
As it turned out later, Talia had been called to the dream world to deal with an emergency. Unaware of that at the time—and thoroughly displeased—Cinderella sat on the sand to stare at the sea. She stayed like that for a long while, ignoring occasional compliments and pick-up lines, and mulling over one concern.
"Is Talia...embarrassed to be seen with me?"

localization.name: Water Slaughter
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Each time this unit damages a sleeping enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn. This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit gains Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Hammer Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Hammers in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Unicorn
entries.title: Pure-Hearted Knight
entries.description: Since time immemorial, members of Unicorn's family have served individuals considered to be the saviors of the world. When Unicorn turned 14, she was sent on a journey to find the current generation's savior—the person destined to be her master—just like her father had when he had been her age. To aid her in her efforts, she was entrusted with her family's heirloom, a diadem adorned with a single horn—Chevalier's Grace.

localization.name: Discharge Strike
localization.description:
Damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted a Sleep Ward. If this hits an enemy with any Discharge Counters, they will be stunned for:

300TU if they have 3 Discharge Counters
200TU if they have 2 Discharge Counters
100TU if they have 1 Discharge Counter

Then, the target has 1 Discharge Counter removed. Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Instant Push Back
localization.description: Pushes 1 enemy away from the battlefield to be next in line of the enemy reinforcements. This skill can only be used if there are 1 or more enemy reinforcements left. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Magical Experience
localization.description:
Immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with an Attack. This skill cannot be used if this unit is alone on the battlefield.

localization.name: Rainbow Raid
localization.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

localization.name: Chevalier's Grace
localization.description:
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit gets the turn with less than 50% HP, this unit exchanges its current HP with the amount of HP it has currently lost.

Grants all other allies the Armor status effect, and all Enemies 3 Discharge Counters. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. New enemies entering the battlefield will be granted 3 Discharge Counters.

Armor will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. A unit can store a maximum of 3 Discharge Counters, and all are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Staff Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Staffs.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Unicorn
entries.title: Pure-Hearted Knight
entries.description: And so, Unicorn embarked on her long, solitary journey. Though many dangers lurked along the way, they weren't enough to discourage her. Chevalier's Grace protected her from physical injuries, poison, and other direct threats, and, more importantly, she wasn't doing it out of obligation, but because becoming a fine knight serving her own master has always been her dream.

localization.name: Electrostatic Field
localization.description:
Enemies entering the battlefield have a 20% chance to be immediately stunned for 50TU, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings).

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they are granted the Armor status effect.

This unit is granted a Sleep ward. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and whenever any unit (including this unit) enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

entries.name: Cthulhu
entries.title: Creature of the Void
entries.description: The girl's name was R'lyeh. She was born into a secret organization—a dark cult worshiping an evil deity, rejected by all other nations on Erden. Her parents treated her indifferently—everything they cared about was the doctrine. And so, starved for their attention, she volunteered to be the sacrifice needed to summon their dreadful god.

localization.name: Infect Reality
localization.description:
300% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Consumes 1 charge on the user and unlocks at random either Mind Piercer or No One Is Safe. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked if the user has no Charges.

localization.name: Mind Piercer
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 random enemy. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: No One Is Safe
localization.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. Sets both enemy and ally Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Reset Reality
localization.description: The user has all Sleep immunities, Sleep Wards and Stealth Shields removed. Then, the user is healed for 100% of max HP, granted 3 Charges, and Sleep for 100TU, even if they have already slept. A random enemy is also granted Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept. The next time the user is awake at the end of a turn, they will be healed for 100% of max HP, and have their current TU reduced by 100. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

localization.name: Cult of Cthulhu
localization.description:
Enemies damaged by an attack from this unit are Mega Poisoned for 200TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

If this unit is on 1HP at the end of a turn, it is healed for 100% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.

This unit gains 3 charges. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Axe Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Axes.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Cthulhu
entries.title: Creature of the Void
entries.description: When R'lyeh opened her eyes after the ritual, her parents were gone. Everyone was gone. There was only her, physically unharmed, with an incomprehensible voice echoing inside her head. It seemed the deity had refused the call, and decided to hide within her instead of manifesting. From the tone of its voice, R'lyeh got an impression that it was scared of something, though she had no way of knowing what of or why.

If this unit is on 1HP at the end of a turn, it is healed for 100% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.

This unit gains 3 charges. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

localization.name: The Great Old One
localization.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0, be Purified, and be granted Sleep Immunity until the end of the turn.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while this unit has no Charges, it will survive that attack and then enter Warped Reality for 200TU. While in Warped Reality, this unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, cannot be defeated by damage, has 90% damage reduction from attacks and is a Guardian.

Whenever this unit gets the turn in Warped Reality, it will lose the turn and Mega Poison all non-sleeping enemies for 200TU. Then if there is more than 1 enemy on the battlefield and no enemy is Hypnotized, this unit will hypnotize 1 random enemy on the battlefield. This unit cannot be Hypnotized while in Warped Reality. When Warped Reality ends, this unit will be sacrificed.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the hypnotizer is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units.

entries.name: Napoleon
entries.title: The Perfect Empress
entries.description:
Having scored 32 victories in 32 battles, the first Empress of Lugrasse celebrated her success by commissioning a portrait.
In a word, she's a genius. Undefeated as a military officer, she continued her string of triumphs after ascending the throne—whatever she declared she'd do, she was sure to achieve. And the people of Lugrasse loved her for it.

localization.description: 50% damage to all enemies, 200% damage if user has survived on the battlefield for 200TU or more. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy hit at 50+ TU in the turn order, or 2 Spirit for each at 100+ TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Stun Cannon

Targets 2 random enemies, they are each randomly granted either Stun for 50TU, 100TU, or 200TU. The user is granted 1 Charge. This skill is locked until the end of the user's next turn after each use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

For each target hit but not defeated by this attack, Stun 1 random enemy that was not hit by this attack for 100TU.

localization.name: Glorious Cannon
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% per Awakening the user has (800% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

localization.name: Flanking Maneuver
localization.description:
This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has no Charges and is not alone on the battlefield.

This unit will gain a Charge and be healed for 30% of its max HP each time another ally gets the turn.
Each time a Storm ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 30% of their max HP.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

entries.name: Napoleon
entries.title: The Perfect Empress
entries.description:
The girl Napoleon had been before she became a soldier, and later a monarch, didn't seem all that different from who she is now—and yet, she was not the same at all.
In her own words, she can grasp a thousand facts with a single glance; and with each glance, her mind gets flooded with information. The difference is, in the past it was all she could do not to fall apart when faced with her own uncontrollable intellect and the countless phenomena the world had to offer.

localization.name: Naval Tactician
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

This unit will have their TU costs reduced by 40% while this unit has 3 Charges. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Axe Mastery

entries.name: Dark Cleopatra
entries.title: Fallen Pharaoh
entries.description:
Aeon Lords aren't all created the same; some receive their Eternity simply to spread destruction during the Pandemonium, some for other purposes. Cleopatra was the latter—she was tasked with monitoring heads of state around Erden.
And so, she travels the world, asking the same question wherever she goes—a question that happens to mean a lot to her personally.
"What is a nation—its ruler or its people?"

localization.name: Draining Shadow
localization.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Steals up to 2 Spirit from enemies.

This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Dread Fumes
localization.description:
Grants all non-burning allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each Poisoned or Sleeping enemy on the battlefield. Then each non-burning enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

localization.name: Dread Serpent
localization.description: Damages all enemies, 600% damage instead to all Poisoned or Sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. All non-burning, non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Creeping Death
localization.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Usable only if the user has Stealth. This skill is locked for 150TU after use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Cold Blooded
localization.description:
Unless this unit is burning, this unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks and is immune to Stun effects.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greataxes.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Cleopatra
entries.title: Fallen Pharaoh
entries.description:
Cleopatra didn't only gaze into the void; she was marked by it.
Within the void, there was a creature of dread and madness. People who lay their eyes on it couldn't think clearly, and those who were touched by it were driven completely mad.
Aeon Lords can rely on their Eternity to heal physical wounds, but even it cannot easily mend a shattered mind. Caught in an endless cycle of death, rebirth, anxiety and madness, Cleopatra eventually forgot even her own name.

localization.name: Plague Queen
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stealth, and Stealth Shield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

This unit will have their TU costs reduced by 40% while there is a poisoned or sleeping enemy. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

Each time an enemy with Cursed Sleep, Mega Poison or Lethal Poison gets the turn:

- this unit heals for 30% of its max HP.
- this unit steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team at the end of the turn.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Hijikata
entries.title: Demon Vice-Commander
entries.description:
A warrior whose name alone would terrify even the fiercest oni into submission—the famed vice-commander of the Shinsengumi.
Righteous and relentless, she was as stern with her comrades as she was with herself. She was the one who created the group's strict code of conduct, and, by enforcing it, transformed a band of rogues into a warrior elite.
The truth is, strictness was her way of showing them her affection.

localization.name: Spirit Blast
localization.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and allies randomly gain either 3, 5 or 9 Spirit. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Stealth Punisher
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

localization.name: Excessive Force
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect, and allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

localization.name: Veil of Dread
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield, and there is a Guardian among enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use.

localization.name: Unwavering Demon
localization.description:
Poison cannot be applied to this unit while it has the Stealth status effect.

This unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements unless there is a non-Mori Guardian among allies on the battlefield.

Unless there is a non-Mori Guardian among allies on the battlefield, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Hijikata
entries.title: Demon Vice-Commander
entries.description:
She devoted her days and nights to her duty, and her fashion sense suffered for it. The fact that she looks so stylish now is only thanks to a certain comrade of hers.
"Soji, can I cut these frills off?"
"Are you kidding me? No!"

localization.name: Demonic Resolve
localization.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while its TU is 100 or less and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Then this unit will heal for 30% of max HP, and gain Stealth, even if it survived with 1HP. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

This unit enters battle with 3 Charges. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Whenever a Stealthed ally gets the turn, this unit gains 1 charge at the end of the turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

entries.name: Okita
entries.title: Shinsengumi's Finest
entries.description:
She was a sword prodigy, considered the best among the elite oni hunters of the Shinsengumi. Captain of the first unit, she could always be spotted leading the vanguard. When it came to swordsmanship, she made impossible possible on a daily basis. But the truth is, she had no real interest in the art of the sword.
"C'mon, that's boring! Let's talk about fashion! Or relationships!"

entries.name: Okita
entries.title: Shinsengumi's Finest
entries.description:
Okita has always distrusted people—after all, in a world terrorized by the oni, her parents were killed by humans. Abandoned by her relatives, she ended up growing up at a sword school. There, her extraordinary talent was discovered, but it didn't take long for the other disciples to start avoiding her, not even trying to match her in a duel. Soon, she was out of her mind with boredom.
And then one day, a certain girl joined the school—one not afraid to face Okita head on.
She would go on to become Shinsengumi's vice-commander, and the object of Okita's feelings.

Allies gain the Stealth status effect, a Stealth Shield, 2 Spirit and will become Enraged. All of these effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

entries.name: Kaguya
entries.title: Seaside Rabbit Princess
entries.description:
It's Kaguya's first time seeing the sea, and her first time wearing a swimsuit as well. She has spent most of her life isolating herself from the outside world, but she didn't mind missing out on things—not if it meant she could save Erden.
Now she is standing next to someone very special to her, and her eyes are sparkling with joy. It's hard to believe that making her smile once seemed as impossible as the tasks she gave all her suitors.

Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Usable if the user is not burning.

This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

All allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills gain the Burn status effect. Then if all allies have the burn status effect, this unit gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies.

If this unit is burning and has defeated 3+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

entries.name: Kaguya
entries.title: Seaside Rabbit Princess
entries.description:
Why did Kaguya ask Finn to bring her a moon stone? Because to her, the moon looked just as lonely as she felt. However, the moon wasn't alone at all—it could always count on the sun to lend it its light.
Kaguya, a rabbit from space, tries hopping around just like Erden's rabbits do, and then immediately turns bright red. Himiko must have put her up to it—which, when you look past the embarrassment, proves that Kaguya is no longer alone either.

- Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP)
- 100% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
