entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Avatar of Light
entries.description: At that moment, Ludmilla should have died. But even as she found herself falling to the bottom of the valley, she felt no fear. She only felt pride from saving her fellow Red Dragon Knights through her sacrifice, and she had no doubt that her comrades would be able to carry on without her.

localization.name: Divine Strike
localization.description:
75% Damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each charge the user has stored (600% max). Then the user is granted 1 charge and the Counter Stance status effect for 300TU.

Counter Stance will overwrite other status effects on the user. For 300TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Combo Drive
localization.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies. Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack if damage is dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Light's Embrace
localization.description: Immediately give all other allies that are below 50% of max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Then heals those allies for 100% of their max HP, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison). The user is granted 1 charge for each affected ally. Usable if at least 1 other ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP and if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield.

localization.name: Divine Purification
localization.description: Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 1 ally. Then grants them a Purify Chain if there is no Purify Chain among allies. A unit with a Purify Chain will Purify another random ally after their turn, then they will pass the Purify Chain to that ally. Purify Chains will end only if the unit with the Purify Chain is defeated, leaves the battlefield, or falls asleep. This skill becomes locked for 10TU after use.

localization.name: Barrier of Light
localization.description:
When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At end of each turn, if there is an ally Guardian on the battlefield, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks, and is not affected by damage reduction effects granted by ally Barrier type skills.

Grants all other allies 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield and there is no Guardian among allies. This effect does not stack with itself if another ally has this passive skill, or with other Barrier type skills.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, Weaken all enemies. If this unit survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will gain 1 Charge and heal 30% of max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Avatar of Light
entries.description:
And before she knew it, the ground below was right before her. The moment of her death had arrived. But in that very moment, she heard a voice, one that seemed divine and full of light. 
Then, all went dark.

localization.name: Divine Strike
localization.description:
75% Damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each charge the user has stored (600% max). Then the user is granted 1 charge and the Counter Stance status effect for 300TU.

Counter Stance will overwrite other status effects on the user. For 300TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Combo Drive
localization.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies. Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack if damage is dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Light's Embrace
localization.description: Immediately give all other allies that are below 50% of max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Then heals those allies for 100% of their max HP, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison). The user is granted 1 charge for each affected ally. Usable if at least 1 other ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP and if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield.

localization.name: Divine Purification
localization.description: Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 1 ally. Then grants them a Purify Chain if there is no Purify Chain among allies. A unit with a Purify Chain will Purify another random ally after their turn, then they will pass the Purify Chain to that ally. Purify Chains will end only if the unit with the Purify Chain is defeated, leaves the battlefield, or falls asleep. This skill becomes locked for 10TU after use.

localization.name: Barrier of Light
localization.description:
When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At end of each turn, if there is an ally Guardian on the battlefield, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks, and is not affected by damage reduction effects granted by ally Barrier type skills.

Grants all other allies 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield and there is no Guardian among allies. This effect does not stack with itself if another ally has this passive skill, or with other Barrier type skills.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, Weaken all enemies. If this unit survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will gain 1 Charge and heal 30% of max HP.

localization.name: Divine Intervention
localization.description:
If an acting enemy unit has had the turn 2 or more times already within the last 10TU, they are granted the Sleep status effect for 50TU at the end of their turn, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

Whenever a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit will gain the Counter Stance status effect for 300TU.

This unit enters battle with 1 Charge. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Tristan
entries.title: Troubadour of the Round Table
entries.description: "Like a gust blowing silver petals across the battlefield..." That is how the knights of other nations describe the beautiful, but also terrifying sight of Tristan in battle. The invisible blades of sound that she creates can cut through multiple enemies at once, painting the ground beneath them with crimson.

localization.name: First Blood
localization.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has not yet defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 30% of max HP. If an enemy is sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Disabling Pulse
localization.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit.

Then if that target is not asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), exchanges them with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This exchange will fail if the target is Immovable or if there are less than 4 enemies on the battlefield (no imposter will be added). This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill.

localization.name: Royal Fortissimo
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a sleeping target. If damage is dealt to 2 sleeping targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and this skill will become locked until the user damages an enemy with another attack.

localization.name: Royal Grandioso
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. This skill is usable if all enemies are sleeping or if the user has survived 200TU on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

localization.name: Symphony of Vigor
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. While this unit has 50% or more of max HP, it has 65% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time a sleeping enemy gets the turn, all allies heal for 30% of max HP.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit becomes Enraged, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP, Endure effects cannot stack. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Tristan
entries.title: Troubadour of the Round Table
entries.description: The noble house of Tristan has always served as the right hand of the king, and it was only natural that the young Tristan would be entrusted with being a companion and sparring partner of Princess Leidram. Despite being a confidante to the future king from a young age, even she hardly ever witnessed Leidram showing any genuine emotion.

If an enemy is sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and does not wake up sleeping enemies.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. While this unit has 50% or more of max HP, it has 65% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time a sleeping enemy gets the turn, all allies heal for 30% of max HP.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit becomes Enraged, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP, Endure effects cannot stack. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Deadly Tempo
localization.description:
When this unit is defeated by an enemy, 1 random non-sleeping enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This effect triggers again for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 4 triggers total). Then if all enemies are asleep, all allies on the battlefield will immediately get the turns by having their TU reduced.

This unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0 after the first enemy turn while this unit is on the battlefield. If this successfully triggers, the enemy unit that had the turn is also granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

When this unit defeats 1 or more enemy units with an attack:
- All allies are healed for 30% of max HP.
- If no enemies are sleeping, 1 random enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Spears.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Excalibur
entries.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
entries.description:
Excalibur's memories from before she was sealed reach far into the past.
There once was a girl she called a friend. They played together on the isolated island that was their birthplace and only home.

localization.name: Mori Sweep
localization.description: Damage to all enemies. Adds 3 Super Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements, and the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on the user.

localization.name: Sacred Blade
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or a Mori in the very back of allied reinforcements.

localization.name: Sword Storm
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy. This skill is also locked again if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Redemption Pulse
localization.description:
Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and Purifies (removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison) all allies. Unlocked each time a Mori ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, even if the Mori was Ephemeral. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Awakened Blade
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit heals for 10% of max HP, each time an ally hits an enemy with an attack.

Whenever an ally Mori enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit heals 10% of max HP.

Whenever a non-sleeping ally gets the turn, this unit will gain Stealth and a Stealth Shield at the end of that turn. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Light Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Light units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Excalibur
entries.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
entries.description:
One day, Excalibur's friend took her to the coast.
"Let's leave this place together," she said. They took a boat and went into the unknown, in search of adventure. But this is where Excalibur's memories come to an abrupt end—she was betrayed and sealed in a cave in a faraway land.

Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Sword and Shields
localization.description:
Adds 2 Super Kuromoris to the very front and 2 to the very end of ally reinforcements. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks, and its attack is increased to 1.25x if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or at the very end of allied reinforcements. If there is an ally Mori on the battlefield and one at the very end of allied reinforcements, this unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks, and its attack is increased to 1.5x instead. These Attack increases do not stack with Enrage effects.

If this unit is below 50% of max HP at the end of a turn, and there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed and all allies will be Purified, healed for 30% of max HP and become Enraged. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Light Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Light units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Super Kuromori
entries.description:
A guardian spirit with the power of Darkness.
Enjoys stargazing.

localization.name: Poison
localization.description: Grants the Poison status effect to 1 enemy. Allies gain 1 Spirit. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit.

localization.name: Fall Back
localization.description: Sends user away from the battlefield to the very end of allied reinforcements. Usable once per battle, and only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

localization.name: Auto Guard+
localization.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

entries.name: Dark Lancelot
entries.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
entries.description: When the power of the Last Faerie of Avalon warped Lancelot's soul, her preferences were completely reversed. She started inflicting pain just as enthusiastically as she had once sought it.

localization.name: Toxic Shot
localization.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user's HP is at 75%+. Grants the target the Super Poison status effect. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and steals up to 3 Spirit from enemies.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

localization.name: Time Desecrator
localization.description:
100% damage to 1 enemy. If the target has 50+ TU, deals 400% damage instead and grants the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. 600% damage instead with Mega Poison if the target has 100+ TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user is granted Poison and Burn wards.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Unleash Hell
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 450% damage if the user has defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefield, 600% if the user has defeated 2+ units. Grants all Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then, grants all Super Poisoned enemies Mega Poison for 200TU. Then grants Super Poison to all other enemies that were hit.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Toxic Shock
localization.description: Stuns 2 enemies for 100TU and grants them the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.name: Steady Aim
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield. Each time a poisoned enemy gets the turn, this unit heals for 20% of its max HP.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

If this unit damages at least one enemy with 100+TU with an attack, this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Lancelot
entries.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
entries.description:
Faces contorted in pain, voices begging for mercy, limbs shaking with fear—it all brought the new Lancelot pleasure. But whatever was left of the old her still screamed somewhere within her.
"Stop it! This is not who we are! We should be on the receiving end of thiiis!"

localization.name: Unholy Counter
localization.description:
When this unit gets a turn, it heals 50% of its max HP.

The first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn while on the battlefield, this unit will enter Unholy Trance for 30TU plus 30TU per Awakening (up to 150TU if this unit has 4 Awakenings). While in Unholy Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by damage, and cannot be Stunned.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. Enemy units that deal damage to this unit get stunned for 100TU and Super Poisoned. These are Skin effects. This unit cannot become a Guardian or Stun Absorber.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Lucifer
entries.title: Seed of Evil
entries.description: The Last Faerie of Avalon, once kept sealed deep beneath the island. She is the core of what has come to be known as the Curse of Avalon—hence her brother Morgan's decision to hide her from the world and those who'd be eager to abuse her power.

localization.name: Flame Sweep
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies, 250% damage instead if the user is burning, or to targets that are burning. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This is not considered a Burn Blast type skill.

localization.name: Binding Flames
localization.description: Burns 1 Enemy, then Stuns them randomly for either 50TU or 200TU if they are Burning. That target is granted a Stun Hex, which will stun all enemies for 100TU at the end of that targets next turn, then be removed. Allies gain 2 Spirit. This skill has no effect if it targets a Water enemy, and is usable only if there is no Stun Hex among enemies. Stun Hexes cannot be purified, and will be removed if the hexed unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Death Blow
localization.description:
750% damage to 1 enemy. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU if the user is not burning. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if all enemies on the battlefield are burning or if the user is not burning.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Hell's Judgement
localization.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

At the end of the turn, allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will gain the Burn status effect, and all other allies will have Burn removed. Unlocked each time a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Hellish Wildfire
localization.description:
At the end of each turn, this unit grants a random non-burning, non-water ally on the battlefield the burn status effect. Then a random burning ally will heal for 30% of their max HP.

At the end of each other ally turn, if all ally units are burning, this unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this effect cannot trigger again until 20TU advances.

All Fire Allies and Allies with Burn Blast and Burn Drive type active skills are Quickened by 30% when this unit enters the battlefield, or when those allies enter from reinforcements while this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Lucifer
entries.title: Seed of Evil
entries.description:
Her underground prison was a dark, lonely place. Even the faeries didn't all know about her existence, and she had no one to talk to aside from Morgan.
Until one day, a certain girl came into her life, and suddenly she wasn't alone anymore.

localization.name: Flame Sweep
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies, 250% damage instead if the user is burning, or to targets that are burning. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This is not considered a Burn Blast type skill.

localization.name: Binding Flames
localization.description: Burns 1 Enemy, then Stuns them randomly for either 50TU or 200TU if they are Burning. That target is granted a Stun Hex, which will stun all enemies for 100TU at the end of that targets next turn, then be removed. Allies gain 2 Spirit. This skill has no effect if it targets a Water enemy, and is usable only if there is no Stun Hex among enemies. Stun Hexes cannot be purified, and will be removed if the hexed unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

At the end of each turn, this unit grants a random non-burning, non-water ally on the battlefield the burn status effect. Then a random burning ally will heal for 30% of their max HP.

At the end of each other ally turn, if all ally units are burning, this unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this effect cannot trigger again until 20TU advances.

All Fire Allies and Allies with Burn Blast and Burn Drive type active skills are Quickened by 30% when this unit enters the battlefield, or when those allies enter from reinforcements while this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units.

localization.name: Bathe in Flames
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects. If this unit is burning, this unit has a 100% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will gain Endure. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while burning and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Gawain
entries.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
entries.description: When the power of the Last Faerie of Avalon warped Gawain's soul, the loyalty she had once had for King Arthur, but thought long gone, reawakened. That loyalty turned into blind faith, and anyone who opposed the king became her mortal enemy.

localization.name: Cursed Blade
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. If not burning, that enemy will also be granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, and the user will be granted Sleep Thorns. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This lock may be ignored if allies have 0 Spirit.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying.

localization.name: Cursed Battlecry
localization.description:
All non-burning allies are granted the Armor status effect, Sleep Thorns and become Enraged. Each non-burning, non-sleeping enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU. At the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy with Mega Poison or Cursed Sleep on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite other status effects and previous Enrage skills on affected units.

localization.name: Cursed Helioslash
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and the Stealth Status Effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Cursed End
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Killer Thorns
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

All non-burning allies gain Sleep Thorns. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield.

If this unit has Sleep Thorns, this unit cannot be granted Poison, Sleep, or Stuns. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Gawain
entries.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
entries.description: Arthur Leidram wasn't Gawain's king anymore, she was a mass murderer—and yet, some part of Gawain must have still wanted to believe in her. It was hard to accept the fact that the ruler she once knew—noble and ready to risk her life for the people of Camelot—was just an act all along.

localization.description:

localization.name: Omega Breaker
localization.description:
This unit has 10% plus 10% per Awakening (up to 50% max if this unit has 4 Awakenings) bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or sleeping.

If this unit damages at least one enemy that is poisoned or sleeping with an attack, this unit will get another turn and heal for 50% of its max HP. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Snow White
entries.title: Frost Flower Maid
entries.description:
"Welcome home, my lord!"
Snow White finds the work of a maid rewarding. She is glad she can offer her expertise in cooking and housekeeping to the master she adores.

localization.name: Poison Apple
localization.description:
Damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the target is poisoned or has 100+ TU. All non-poisoned enemies hit are then granted Super Poison.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

localization.name: Toxic Stun Random
localization.description:
Stuns 2 random enemies for 100TU and grants them the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. The user is granted a Sleep ward. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Deadly Magic
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Heals all allies below 50% of max HP for 100% of their max HP. Usable if at least 1 ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP.

localization.name: Survivor's Crash
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

localization.name: Ready To Serve
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

This unit has 15% damage reduction from attacks, plus 15% per Awakening (up to 75% max if this unit has 4 Awakenings) until Survivor's Crash is unlocked.

Once Survivor's Crash is unlocked, this unit has its TU costs reduced by 40%. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Snow White
entries.title: Frost Flower Maid
entries.description: "Welcome home...my lord..." Snow Black finds the work of a maid humiliating. How is it possible that she, Queen of Nightmares, has to serve some foolish lordling? Honestly, she should just smother him in his sleep...

localization.name: Electrotoxin
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will Stun all enemies for 50TU and Super Poison all enemies. This effect cannot trigger if this unit is alone on the battlefield. This is not a Skin passive skill.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Murasaki Shikibu
entries.title: Weaver of Tales
entries.description: Murasaki Shikibu was unmatched in her pursuit of knowledge from a very young age. Once she reached adulthood, her erudition was noticed by a certain powerful aristocrat, and he made her his daughter's tutor. While she held that position, her novel The Tale of Genji reached a million characters in length, and attained the status of a masterpiece.

localization.name: Last Word
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses Healing Words. This lock may be ignored if user is alone on the battlefield.

localization.name: Healing Words
localization.description:
Heals 2 allies for 800% of the user's attack, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

localization.name: Plot Twist
localization.description: Exchanges 1 enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to next in line of enemy reinforcements. Then add 1 Imposter to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. Usable only if there are 4 enemies on the battlefield. Usable once per battle, and will fail if the target is Immovable.

localization.name: Red Herring
localization.description:
The user becomes a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

After this skill is used, whenever the user is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 25% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of the user is added to next in line of ally reinforcements. The copy's Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

Unlocked the first time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: Epic Narrative
localization.description:
This unit gains Stealth, a Stealth Shield and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Allies gain Spirit until ally Spirit reaches 8. These effects are triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison status effects.

This unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0 after the first time an ally is defeated while this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greataxes.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Murasaki Shikibu
entries.title: Weaver of Tales
entries.description: Murasaki finished writing her magnum opus earlier than most historians believe, and her life was shorter than they assume as well. She faced death with a single regret in her heart: the fact that The Tale of Genji was the only work she ever completed.

localization.name: Venom Barrier
localization.description:
Unless this unit is burning, this unit is immune to Stun effects.

Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

entries.name: Little Mermaid
entries.title: Guardian of the Sea
entries.description: Eva was born as the sixth princess of the merfolk kingdom, far away from human dwellings on land. Her voice was the finest among her people, and sea creatures came from far and near just to listen to her sing. She was her country's most beloved treasure.

localization.name: Ocean Sweep
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each sleeping enemy (500% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects and removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from all hit targets.

localization.name: Pacifying Wave
localization.description:
Targets 2 enemies. Removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from them, then grants them Burn Wards and the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Endless Nightmare
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. All enemies hit are then granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Royal Trident
localization.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and adds 1 Super Suimori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Removes any Sleep Wards from the target.

This skill becomes locked after use until an ally Suimori gets the turn, or until there are no Suimoris in the ally team.

localization.name: Song of the Sea
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned or sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

At the end of this unit's turn, send 1 random sleeping ally that is not immovable to the front of allied reinforcements. Allies must have reinforcements for this to trigger.

Whenever another Water ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements:
- Removes the Sleep status effect from this unit.
- Grants 1 non-sleeping enemy with the lowest TU the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Little Mermaid
entries.title: Guardian of the Sea
entries.description: But the peaceful merfolk kingdom wasn't beyond the reach of the Pandemonium. Hordes of monsters raged under the sea as violently as they did on land; Eva's countrymen came under attack, and in the end, the kingdom fell. All the merfolk lost their lives—apart from one.

localization.name: Ocean Sweep
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each sleeping enemy (500% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects and removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from all hit targets.

localization.name: Pacifying Wave
localization.description:
Targets 2 enemies. Removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from them, then grants them Burn Wards and the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Endless Nightmare
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. All enemies hit are then granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Royal Trident
localization.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and adds 1 Super Suimori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Removes any Sleep Wards from the target.

This skill becomes locked after use until an ally Suimori gets the turn, or until there are no Suimoris in the ally team.

localization.name: Song of the Sea
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned or sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

At the end of this unit's turn, send 1 random sleeping ally that is not immovable to the front of allied reinforcements. Allies must have reinforcements for this to trigger.

Whenever another Water ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements:
- Removes the Sleep status effect from this unit.
- Grants 1 non-sleeping enemy with the lowest TU the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit.

localization.name: Breaking Tide
localization.description:
Whenever this unit gets the turn, if all enemies are sleeping, the next damage this unit deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances and cannot stack.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Coral Barrier for 100TU. A unit with Coral Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

While this unit is on the battlefield, at the end of this unit or an ally Suimori's turn, all allies will:
- Gain Coral Barrier for 100TU.
- have Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) removed.
- be healed for 30% of their max HP.

If this unit is not alone on the battlefield and has Coral Barrier, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Super Suimori
entries.description:
A guardian spirit with the power of Water.
Enjoys days at the beach.

localization.name: Sleep Attack
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy, with a 25% chance of granting that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU.  If applied, this will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Sleep cannot be applied to a unit that Has Slept while on the battlefield. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Force Sleep Bomb
localization.description: Sacrifices the user to grant 1 enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit.

localization.name: Auto Guard+
localization.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

entries.name: Sun Wukong
entries.title: Celestial Bride
entries.description:
Wukong was only too glad to wear the heavenly robe, but she wasn't aware of its original purpose. When she finally learned that it was a wedding outfit, her face flushed deep red.
"Whaaa??? It's that kind of robe!? No way!"

localization.name: Cursed Bouquet
localization.description:
Grants 1 non-burning enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth status effect.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Stealth Rampage
localization.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has defeated 1+ enemies with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect.

localization.name: Finishing Slam
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. Deals 200% damage for each time the user has used Stealth Rampage while on the battlefield, up to 600% max after 3 uses. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user uses Stealth Rampage. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

localization.name: Full Charge+
localization.description:
Heals the user fully. The user is granted 3 Charges, and a Poison Ward. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Clone Mastery
localization.description:
If this unit is not conjured, this unit enters battle with 3 Charges, and Counter Stance for 150TU. If this unit is conjured, this unit enters battle with 1 Charge and the Armor status effect.

If this unit is charged, not burning, and there are 2+ non-conjured allies on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with less than 50% of max HP, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP and add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.

Add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This effect triggers if this unit is not conjured and has a Charge. This is not considered a revenge passive skill.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack while charged, this unit will spend a charge to get another turn. This effect can trigger again against the same unit. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

All Sun Wukongs created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Sun Wukong
entries.title: Celestial Bride
entries.description: Wukong couldn't wrap her head around the idea of a robe only meant to be worn for one occasion—especially not for a ceremony performed to unite two people for the rest of their lives. Her mind was always occupied with food, training, Tianzhu, food, Nimbus, food, food, food... She couldn't even imagine herself falling in love.

localization.name: Cursed Bouquet

Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect.

If this unit is charged, not burning, and there are 2+ non-conjured allies on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with less than 50% of max HP, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP and add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.

Add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This effect triggers if this unit is not conjured and has a Charge. This is not considered a revenge passive skill.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack while charged, this unit will spend a charge to get another turn. This effect can trigger again against the same unit. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

All Sun Wukongs created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

localization.name: Heaven's Robe
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Grants all non-burning allies Stun Wards and Poison Wards. 1 random non-burning enemy is granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. These effects are triggered when this unit enters the battlefield as a conjured unit. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack:

- if charged, this unit spends a charge to add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.
- this unit will grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the next enemy that enters the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Goemon
entries.title: Legendary Thief
entries.description:
"I am the master thief, bringer of freedom!"
A woman's laughter echoes through the streets of Edo. She is Goemon Ishikawa—the elusive and fearless wanderer who shows up wherever people suffer oppression.

localization.name: Fireworks
localization.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements if a Shadow Double is not next in line in allied reinforcements. This Shadow Double's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the next unit in allied reinforcements. Usable if this unit's active skill Assassinate is locked.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Stealth Flank
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, and immediately gives 1 other random ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.

localization.name: Assassinate
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user enters the battle from reinforcements. This skill is locked again after each use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Art of Cloning
localization.description:
Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements, and adds another 6 Shadow Doubles to random places in allied reinforcements. These Shadow Doubles' Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessories will match the user.

Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user sends themself to the back of allied reinforcements.

Usable if the user has been on the battlefield since the very start of battle, or if there are no allied reinforcements. Cannot be used if there are any Shadow Doubles among allies on the battlefield or allied reinforcements.

localization.name: Master Thief
localization.description:
When this unit enters battle whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements:
- This unit gains Stealth, a Stealth Shield and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.
- Other allies on the battlefield with Stealth Strike type active skills are Quickened by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken effects on those allies. Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU Cost reduction is in effect.

When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants all non-sleeping enemies the Super Poison status effect.

At the end of each of this unit's turns, if this unit is not-sleeping, it will be granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Axe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Axes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Goemon
entries.title: Legendary Thief
entries.description: Goemon's Gang's true target was never money or treasure, only freedom. They helped people oppressed by corrupt authorities, earning a reputation as noble outlaws.

localization.name: Art of Invisibility
localization.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Stealth, and will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0.

When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants an ally with the lowest TU and a Stealth Strike type skill:

- Stealth
- a Stealth Shield
- the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants all non-sleeping enemies the Super Poison status effect.

At the end of each of this unit's turns, if this unit is not-sleeping, it will be granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Axe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Axes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kojiro
entries.title: Wandering Swordmaster
entries.description: Rumor has it that a certain gang of thieves has hired an exceptional swordmaster as their guard. Swinging a longsword with unprecedented ease and cutting opponents down without as much as a single sound, she strikes fear in the hearts of those who would rather see the gang gone.

localization.name: Clean Strike
localization.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead and this unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Sakura Storm since this skill was last used. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

localization.name: Sakura Storm
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% total damage). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Healing Blossom
localization.description:
Heals the user fully, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. If the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

Endure effects cannot stack. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Swallow's Flight
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has survived for 200TU or more on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if the user has 2+ Charges stored and only 3 times per battle. Consumes 2 Charges on the user.

localization.name: Legendary Resolve
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Endure and Counter Stance for 300TU. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction is lowered by 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with an attack while on the battlefield (to a minimum of 50% after defeating 3+ enemies).

When this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack while on the battlefield:

- this unit gains a Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.
- this unit gains Recovery Mist for 100TU. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.
- all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kojiro
entries.title: Wandering Swordmaster
entries.description: Kojiro Sasaki was born into a samurai household. After the untimely death of her mother, she lived alone with her father, whose forced retirement from the way of the warrior due to an injury prompted him to put all his unfulfilled dreams onto his daughter's shoulders. His fixation with raising the perfect swordsman resulted in extreme strictness, which kept young Kojiro constantly discouraged instead of motivating her.
