localization.name: Killer Focus
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot be Stunned until it has defeated 1 enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

This unit has 25% reduction to TU Costs if it has defeated 1 enemy with an attack while on the battlefield. This increases by 25% per additional enemy defeated, up to 75% max TU Cost reduction after this unit has defeated 3+ enemies.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Counter Stance for 300TU, and heal for 30% of its max HP.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Da Vinci
entries.title: Inventor Extraordinaire
entries.description: Leonardo da Vinci was raised in a Bergarian village surrounded by nature. She has displayed genius tendencies since early childhood. Her talents spanned from science to magic, poetry and art.

localization.name: Star Sweep
localization.description: 250% damage to all enemies and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Steals up to 1 Spirit from enemies for each enemy hit.

localization.name: Cosmic Cannon
localization.description:
Consumes a Power Charge. 400% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

localization.name: Astral Ascension
localization.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies, the user is granted Recovery Mist for 100TU and cannot be Stunned for 100TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. If damage is dealt to 2 targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Usable if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

localization.name: Grand Design
localization.description:
Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack. The user is granted a Power Charge.

The user gains one of the following effects at random:
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target(s) from being defeated.
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield immediately gives the user the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

localization.name: Master Inventor
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP, then until its next turn:
- this unit cannot be defeated or Stunned
- this unit heals for 10% of max HP at the end of every turn.
This is a Hold Ground+ effect, and ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, all allies gain the Armor status effect, heal for 30% of max HP and become Enraged. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Water Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Water units.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Da Vinci
entries.title: Inventor Extraordinaire
entries.description: Da Vinci was twelve when the rumors of her genius reached the capital and she was invited to work at the Imperial Research Institute. She started accumulating achievements, paying no heed to the envy and ridicule she got from her fellow researchers. She provided Bergaria with designs for various technological innovations, such as magical analysis goggles and antigravity engines for flying vessels.

localization.name: Adaptive Assault
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Whenever an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and loses a Power Charge.

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, this unit gains Sleep Immunity and all other allies gain Sleep Wards.
- Fire, this unit gains Burn Immunity and all other allies gain Burn Wards.
- Storm, this unit gains Stun Immunity and all other allies gain Stun Wards.
- Earth, this unit gains Poison Immunity and all other allies gain Poison Wards.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Water Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Water units.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Satan
entries.title: Petite Demon Overlord
entries.description: Demonfolk are a legendary race said to have once inhabited Erden. Due to their innately high magical power and physical strength, they ruled over all other races.

localization.name: Demon Hellball
localization.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% total damage). This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user and target are both granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Stuns for 50TU one other non-water, burning enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets).

localization.name: Mass Dismissal
localization.description: Immediately defeats all conjured, non-boss units on both sides of the battlefield. Allies gain 2 Spirit and the enemy team loses 2 Spirit for each unit defeated in this way. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated this way (even if they were Ephemeral). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

localization.name: Devil's Fury
localization.description:
200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% damage). This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, and effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield or if all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Ruler of the Damned
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit enters battle with the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

If all units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this unit has a 50% bonus to attacks.

Whenever a Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:

- All allies become Enraged.
- All enemies are granted the Burn status effect and become Weakened. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

localization.name: Infernal Charges
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with 2 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit defeats any number of units with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP, gains a Charge and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When this unit has:
- 1+ Charges stored at the start of this unit's turn, it will quicken all burning allies by 30% at the end of its turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills.
- 2+ Charges stored, this unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- 3 Charges stored, this unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

Whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit loses 1 Charge.

entries.title: Petite Demon Overlord
entries.description: However, even at the height of their short-lived glory, the demonfolk couldn't escape the clutches of the Pandemonium. The few who managed to evade the Eternal and his hordes of crazed monsters hid themselves in remote corners of the world, waiting for better times.

localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Shen Long
entries.title: Divine Dragon Lord
entries.description: Legends say there are six Dragon Lords, one per every element of Erden: Fire, Storm, Water, Earth, Light and Shadow. They all share the goal of defeating the Eternal, but the Dragon Lords of Light and Shadow are also destined to eternally clash with each other.

localization.name: Dragon Fang
localization.description:
Damage to 2 Enemies, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Incinerate since this skill was last used.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Burn will gain the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Dragon Breath
localization.description:
Enrages 2 allies, grants them the burn status effect, and heals them for 100% of max HP. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Incinerate
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Rising Dragon
localization.description: Grants all enemies the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Himoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Dragon's Focus
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be Stunned. If this unit is burning, this unit has Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).

Add a Super Himori to the end of allied reinforcements whenever:
- this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield.
- a non-conjured Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

Whenever a Himori ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source (even if Ephemeral), a random burning enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Whenever an ally Himori enters the battlefield from reinforcements, stun a random enemy for 50TU.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Shen Long
entries.title: Divine Dragon Lord
entries.description: Weary and covered in scars left by battles with her archenemy and countless adversities, the Dragon Lord of Light looked for a place to make her final lair. At last, she reached the mountains, and lived there in peace and solitude for years—until the day the silence of her home was broken by the sound of footsteps.

localization.name: Dragon Fang
localization.description:
Damage to 2 Enemies, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Incinerate since this skill was last used.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Burn will gain the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Dragon Breath
localization.description:
Enrages 2 allies, grants them the burn status effect, and heals them for 100% of max HP. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Incinerate
localization.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Rising Dragon
localization.description: Grants all enemies the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Himoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Dragon's Focus
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be Stunned. If this unit is burning, this unit has Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).

Add a Super Himori to the end of allied reinforcements whenever:
- this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield.
- a non-conjured Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

Whenever a Himori ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source (even if Ephemeral), a random burning enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Whenever an ally Himori enters the battlefield from reinforcements, stun a random enemy for 50TU.

localization.name: Burning Thunder
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU, and has 80% damage reduction from attacks until it damages an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

Stun a random burning enemy for 50TU. This effect triggers once for each burning unit on the battlefield when this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the unit, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Super Himori
entries.description:
A guardian spirit with the power of Fire.
Enjoys hot baths.

localization.name: Attack
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 1 Spirit.

localization.name: Auto Guard+
localization.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

entries.name: Hokusai
entries.title: Paintbrush Virtuoso
entries.description:
Hokusai Katsushika was an art prodigy with a promising future ahead of her. She started winning one art competition after another at a very young age.
And then, one day, she learned that she was a Vessel.

localization.name: Blot Out
localization.description:
Damage to 1 enemy and Weaken them. Then enemies lose Spirit equal to the number of Element types that remain on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Paint Fall
localization.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, the Stealth Status Effect, and the Counter Stance Status Effect. Randomly grants all allies either Stun Wards, or Sleep Wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Then heals all allies for 200% of the user's attack. This triggers once for each Element type that remains on the battlefield.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Stroke of Genius
localization.description: Damage 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. 300% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefiled. 400% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Masterpiece
localization.description:
Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all 6 Element types are on the battlefield. Usable twice per battle.

localization.name: Elemental Palette
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with a Stun Ward, and Sleep Ward. This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Element type on the battlefield. (e.g. Paint Fall: 50% => 350% damage when 3 Element types are on the battlefield)

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water or Dark, Stun them for 100TU.
- Fire or Light, grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm or Earth, grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Hokusai
entries.title: Paintbrush Virtuoso
entries.description: Hokusai's parents and everyone who knew her mourned the loss of a future master artist to the Requiem. Hokusai herself felt dejected too. But then, she met Hibiki. Though she had mostly focused on still life and abstract art before, she found new inspiration in the grace of Hibiki's movements.

localization.name: Legendary Artist
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks instead if all 6 Element types are on the battlefield.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 25% of its max HP. Then this unit will have Sleep status effects removed at the end of the turn.

Whenever another ally gets the turn, if there is a different ally (including Hokusai) that matches their Element on the battlefield, the acting ally will be healed for 25% of their max HP. Then allies gain 1 Spirit at the end of that turn.

When this unit enters the battlefield all allies are granted Elemental Quicken. Units with Elemental Quicken will have their TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20% while there is a different ally with a matching Element on the battlefield. Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they are also granted Elemental Quicken. Elemental Quicken will overwrite the effect of previous Quicken skills.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Divine Mecha Girl
entries.description: It was only a matter of time before the hundredth Vessel was going to be discovered, and Luther von Draclow—the head of the Red Dragon Organization—was growing anxious. Anticipating the worst, he approved a new set of equipment for Anya—knowing full well that it might put her in danger.

localization.name: Circuit Overload
localization.description:
Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU:
- Steals 1 Spirit from enemies if that target is hit.
- Deals 500% damage to that target instead.
- Deals 750% damage to that target instead if the target has 100+TU.

localization.name: Mass Surge
localization.description:
Heals the user for 30% of max HP, and the user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. All other allies heal for 100% of their max HP. Then all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and granted Recovery Mist for 200TU. Usable 10 times per battle.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

localization.name: Modular Shot
localization.description:
1250% damage to 2 enemies. Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated by an attack while this unit is on the battlefield. If that ally was:
- Water, this attack grants hit targets Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
- Fire, this attack grants all allies the Burn status effect.
- Storm, this attack grants hit targets Stun for 200TU.
- Earth, this attack grants hit targets Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
- Light, this attack heals all allies for 100% of max HP and Purifies them.
- Dark, this attack grants hit targets Mega Poison for 200TU.
Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. The Elemental effect will be determined at the time this skill unlocks. When multiple allies are defeated at the same time, only one Element will be considered.

localization.name: Ultimate Firewall
localization.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

When this unit is damaged by an enemy attack, that enemy's Active Skills are disabled for 30TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if this unit is defeated.

Until this unit has survived for 1000TU on the battlefield, every second time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of max HP, and be Purified.

localization.name: Quantum Barrier
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains Endure.

Whenever an enemy hits a non-Guardian ally with an attack, they will be Stunned for 50TU for each non-Guardian ally hit.

All other allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Axe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Axes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Divine Mecha Girl
entries.description: Anya's new equipment included a Quantum Amplification Unit—a device capable of forcibly awakening the girl's latent abilities by pushing her computational capabilities to their very limits. However, the rapid amplification drastically increased the load on her brain, raising fears that it could endanger her life.

entries.name: Yamato
entries.title: Invincible Battleship Maiden
entries.description: Yamato, was a child prodigy boasting extraordinarily excellence in everything she did, from academics to sports, and she devoted herself particularly to community service. Possessing a stronger sense of discipline and justice than anyone else, she was the type to charge headlong to prevent any wrongdoing she witnessed, heedless of the danger.

localization.name: Suppressing Fire
localization.description:
Weakens all enemies, and grants them a Rage Ward. Enrages all allies. Then immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Ironclad
localization.description: The user is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and healed for 100% of max HP. For 100TU, the user cannot be defeated and is immune to Poison, Burn and Sleep status effects. When this effect expires, all other allies will be healed for 100% of their max HP and be Purified. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield, and only if there is no other non-Mori Guardian on the battlefield.

localization.name: Victory Cannon
localization.description:
1500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy or non-conjured ally is defeated or sacrificed by any source other than the user. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

localization.name: Sound the Alarm
localization.description: Grants 2 random enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Suimori to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 3 if the user has only 1 other ally on the battlefield). Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and cannot be used if the user has no other allies on the battlefield.

localization.name: Unsinkable Guard
localization.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Whenever this unit or another non-Guardian ally takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn and this unit has any other allies left (even in reinforcements), this unit will:
- Heal for 25% of max HP.
- Gain a Charge.

Whenever this unit would gain a charge while already having 3 Charges, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements, and a random enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Then all Charges are removed from this unit, and it cannot gain any more charges until the following turn. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Yamato
entries.title: Invincible Battleship Maiden
entries.description: Even after being chosen as a Vessel, at the Shinano Academy—a training facility for Vessels—she naturally took on the role of guiding the other students and became their student council president. Although she was strict about rules, she was also compassionate and responsive to the students' circumstances, which earned her deep trust and popularity.

localization.name: Anchors Away
localization.description:
When this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements and there are no other non-Mori ally Guardians on the battlefield, all allies:
- Are healed for 1000% of this unit's attack.
- Have their current TU reduced by 50TU.
- Gain the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

This unit has 10% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% per Awakening (up to 50% reduction if this unit has 4 Awakenings) until the end of its first turn since entering the battlefield.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Zoro
entries.title: Great Phantom Thief
entries.description: Raised in a dazzling royal court as Princess of the Kingdom of Storano, Zoro possessed both  elegance and arrogance, a truly 'perfect young lady.' She had no patience for uncouth behavior, and cheap cuisine was absolutely out of the question—an attitude revealing her natural haughtiness. Even so, if someone clearly needed help, she would surreptitiously aid them.

localization.name: Tandem Takedown
localization.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if another ally on the battlefield has 50TU or less. Then immediately give an ally with the lowest TU (excluding the user) the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn. The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: En Garde
localization.description:
Weakens all enemies. The user is Enraged, granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Counter Stance for 150TU and 80% damage reduction from attacks until the end of its next turn. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Weak or Enrage skills on affected units, and other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Double Phoenix
localization.description: 700% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Unlocked for one use each time the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and can be used only three times per battle.

localization.name: One Step Ahead
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever another unit on the battlefield damages any unit(s) with an attack, this unit's current TU is reduced by 10TU per unit hit.

Each time an enemy unit gets the turn, if this unit has 150TU or more, this unit will gain the Counter Stance status effect for 150TU at the end of that turn.

localization.name: Steel Resolve
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time a unit gets the turn while their team has 5+ Spirit, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack:
- All allies will be healed for 100% of their max HP.
- All allies will have Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) removed.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Zoro
entries.title: Great Phantom Thief
entries.description: Her younger sister, Nicole, was her entire world. Though Nicole was diligent and Zoro was free-spirited, they read books together, romped across the fields, and were each other's closest friend. But tragically, Nicole lost her life to illness.

localization.name: Tandem Takedown
localization.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if another ally on the battlefield has 50TU or less. Then immediately give an ally with the lowest TU (excluding the user) the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn. The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Survivor's Blade
localization.description:
This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

localization.name: One Step Ahead

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery

entries.name: Kaguya
entries.title: Princess of the Black Moon
entries.description: A girl descended upon a land in a remote corner of Eastland. An old man who found her sleeping, eyes closed. When he went to help her, he soon realized the incurable disease afflicting him had vanished. In time, people came to worship her as a god, and a small village was established around her.

localization.name: Mega Poison Jolt
localization.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. All enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU and are Stunned for 30TU. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Shadow Rift
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. If an enemy is poisoned, deals 400% damage. If the user has survived for 200TU+ on the battlefield, 600% damage instead. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt.

localization.name: Crippling Toxin
localization.description:
Stuns 1 Mega Poisoned enemy for 200TU. Then, grants them a Burn Ward and the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. These effects can only apply if the target is Mega Poisoned. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. Usable only if there is no more than 1 enemy with the Lethal Poison status effect on the battlefield, and cannot be used if there is a non-Mega Poisoned enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield.

Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Lunar Hypnosis
localization.description:
Hypnotizes an enemy with the lowest TU and Mega Poisons them for 200TU. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end.

This skill becomes locked for 90TU after use (minus 10TU per Awakening the user has) and cannot be used if an enemy is already Hypnotized or if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the user is defeated or leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Lunar Venom
localization.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit heals for 20% of its max HP and is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth. Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

If no enemy is Mega Poisoned already, these trigger after each enemy turn:
- Grants a random enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.
- This unit is healed for 100% of its max HP.
- This unit is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kaguya
entries.title: Princess of the Black Moon
entries.description: Her true name is NA91. The cleansing power that led people to treat her as a god was originally given to her to neutralize the poison of her predecessor, NA88. She set foot on earth for one mission alone—to build a land where a new species could thrive after humanity perished.

- Grants a random enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.
- This unit is healed for 100% of its max HP.
- This unit is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth.

localization.name: Moon's Shadow
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit enters battle with Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has the Stealth status effect.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements and when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack:
- All enemies are Stunned for 50TU.
- All enemies are granted Mega Poison for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kirin
entries.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
entries.description: She was born into a tribe living deep in the eastern forest. But while she was still a newborn, the village was suddenly attacked and its people scattered. Cornered by the attackers and the advancing flames, her parents hid her in a dark part of the forest and there, they quietly lost their lives.

localization.name: Lightning Bolts
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the user becomes Enraged. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used any other active skill since this skill was last used.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

localization.name: Divine Winds
localization.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit, then ally Spirit is doubled. Enemy Spirit is halved (rounded down) then enemies lose 1 Spirit. (e.g. Enemies have 7 Spirit -> 3 then minus 1 = 2).

All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

localization.name: Divine Lightning
localization.description:
Targets all enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, all non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemies hit that have 1HP remaining have a 25% chance each to be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: Call the Storm
localization.description: Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Denmoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has used Divine Lightning while on the battlefield. Usable five times per battle.

localization.name: Lightning Rain
localization.description:
Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Stuns 2 random enemies for 150TU.
- Purifies all allies.
- Grants the ally with the lowest TU the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.

Once this unit survives until after the end of the turn in which it enters battle, 2 random enemies with less than 150TU will be stunned for 150TU.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kirin
entries.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
entries.description: Kirin—a sacred beast that is an Avatar of the Primordials—found the girl in the forest and raised her. When she reached her sixteenth spring, Kirin returned her to the living world. Time passed, and the now-grown girl once again appeared before Kirin, cloaked in the same loneliness as before.

localization.name: Kirin's Vigor
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield. This unit cannot be Stunned if there are any other Storm allies on the battlefield.

This unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP each time an ally gets the turn.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Super Denmori
entries.description:
A guardian spirit with the power of the Storm.
Enjoys rainy weather.

localization.name: Attack
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 1 Spirit.

localization.name: Stun Bomb
localization.description: Sacrifices the user to stun 2 enemies for 200TU. Locked for 100TU after user enters the battlefield.

localization.name: Lightning Rod
localization.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit is a Stun Absorber. Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

entries.name: Dark Ludmilla
entries.title: Marshal of Darkness
entries.description: The Greyford soldiers were filled with skepticism. "I heard that an instructor is being sent from Rigland to train us. And a woman at that." "Hah, a woman? Such an insult. Maybe we should show her a little affection."

localization.name: Dark Drain
localization.description:
Grants all allies Stealth, and a Burn Ward. Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each Poisoned enemy on the battlefield. The user will immediately get the next turn, then this additional turn effect cannot trigger again until TU advances.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Degrading Slice
localization.description:
Damage to 2 enemies depending on the enemy team's Spirit:
- 6+ Enemy Spirit: 250%
- 4-5 Enemy Spirit: 400%
- 1-3 Enemy Spirit: 550%
- 0 Enemy Spirit: 700%
This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Unleash Chaos
localization.description:
Heals all allies for 1000% of the user's attack. Steals all Spirit from the enemy team. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Then the user enters Chaos Rage for 100TU. While in Chaos Rage, the user's attack is increased by 1.5x (this does not stack with Enrage effects), and the user cannot fall asleep, or be stunned. The user cannot enter Chaos Rage while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills on the battlefield.

This skill is locked until the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and is locked again after each use. This skill can be used only three times per battle.

localization.name: Corrupted Guard
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated or stunned until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit has 25% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% per Awakening (up to 65% if this unit has 4 Awakenings). This unit will be healed for 50% of its max HP each time an enemy gets the turn while the enemy team's Spirit is at 2 or less.

This unit will become a Guardian:
- When this unit enters the battlefield, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield
- Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, and has any other allies left.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit stops being a Guardian each time it activates Unleash Chaos.

localization.name: Diabolic Knight
localization.description:
This unit's attacks:
- Ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent their targets from being defeated.
- Heal the user for 100% of total damage dealt.
- Weaken all enemies hit. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

New enemies entering the battlefield will be Weakened.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP and be granted Stealth. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers either after entering the battlefield or after using Unleash Chaos.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Ludmilla
entries.title: Marshal of Darkness
entries.description:
"She's a demon... She's come here to kill us all..."
The Greyford soldiers couldn't help but mutter this under their breath. But as for Ludmilla, she simply loved training and sincerely wished, more than anyone else, for them to become stronger.

localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user is not a Guardian.

localization.name: Corrupted Guard
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated or stunned until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit has 25% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% per Awakening (up to 65% if this unit has 4 Awakenings). This unit will be healed for 50% of its max HP each time an enemy gets the turn while the enemy team's Spirit is at 2 or less.

This unit will become a Guardian:
- When this unit enters the battlefield, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield
- Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, and has any other allies left.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit stops being a Guardian each time it activates Unleash Chaos.

localization.name: Diabolic Knight
localization.description:
This unit's attacks:
- Ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent their targets from being defeated.
- Heal the user for 100% of total damage dealt.
- Weaken all enemies hit. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

New enemies entering the battlefield will be Weakened.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP and be granted Stealth. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers either after entering the battlefield or after using Unleash Chaos.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Elizabeth
entries.title: Glorious Queen
entries.description: Elizabeth was born as the princess of the Kingdom of Greyford. She has little memory of her father, the king, as he succumbed to illness and passed away while she was still young. After his death, her mother ascended the throne, and with exceptional governance, rebuilt the desolate kingdom during her reign.

localization.name: Queen's Slash
localization.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 400% or 600% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Afternoon Tea
localization.description:
Grants all enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then for each enemy that is not asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 3 Spirit.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. If all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

localization.name: Dream Shatter
localization.description: Targets 1 enemy. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and does not wake sleeping targets. If the target is sleeping, deals 600% damage. Then if the hit target is sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral and has 1HP remaining, it is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

localization.name: Monarch's Will
localization.description:
When an ally, including this unit enters the battlefield at the very start of battle or from reinforcements, all allies other than this unit receive a Monarch Token. Monarch Tokens cannot stack. Any attack damage will remove Monarch Tokens.

Each time an ally with a Monarch token is damaged by an enemy attack (even if defeated), this unit will immediately have its TU reduced to 0.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Ally Spirit is doubled. If Ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.
- Then remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from 1 random non-sleeping enemy and grant them Sleep (Forced) for 200TU. This triggers an additional time for each 2 Spirit allies have (up to 5 additional times with 10 Spirit).
- Then if all enemies are sleeping, all allies have their current TU reduced by 100TU.

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, the ally team gains 2 Spirit, all allies gain Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on those units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Long Live The Queen
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks if allies have 6 or more Spirit.

Whenever this unit damages any number of units with an attack, ally Spirit is doubled at the end of the turn, if ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead. Then if allies have 10 Spirit, remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from 1 random non-sleeping enemy and grant them Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.

Whenever ally Spirit is at 10 at the end of any turn, all allies will be healed for 1000% of this unit's attack and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Elizabeth
entries.title: Glorious Queen
entries.description: However, when Elizabeth was only fifteen, her mother caught the same illness and slipped away from this world. From that day onward, the once crybaby, Elizabeth, changed. She never showed a single tear. She never uttered a word of complaint. She simply continued forward, determined to become like the great queen her mother was.

Usable only if allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 100TU.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Clarice
entries.title: Maid of Darkness
entries.description: A maid, by the name of Clarice, suddenly appeared in the Greyford palace. The silverware she polished was flawless, the morning tea was always at the perfect temperature, the hallways she cleaned did not have a speck of dust. She accomplished her every duty even before being ordered—truly, the perfect maid.

localization.name: Lethal Plague
localization.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Lethal Poison status effect, and Infects them with it.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

This skill is locked for 100TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

localization.name: Throw Knives
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 random enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit has its Poison Wards removed, burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Super Poison, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Massacre
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 400% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

localization.name: Toxic Maid
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack while there is a Poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit will survive with 1HP remaining instead. Then this unit will remove poison (including Lethal Poison) from a random poisoned enemy at the end of turn.

This unit heals for 50% of max HP whenever it damages a poisoned enemy with an attack (triggers once per poisoned enemy hit).

This unit's Attack is increased by:
- 1.25x if there is exactly 1 Poisoned enemy on the battlefield.
- 1.5x if there are exactly 2 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
- 1.75x if there are exactly 3 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
- 2.0x if there are exactly 4 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
These Attack increases do not stack with Enrage effects.

localization.name: Relentless Killer
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 10% of its max HP.

If no enemy is Poisoned at the start of an enemy turn, then at the end of that turn this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances (minus 20TU per Awakening).

After entering battle, for 200TU, this unit:
- Cannot be burned
- Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 100TU.
- Will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target all allies will not be ignored).

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greataxes.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Clarice
entries.title: Maid of Darkness
entries.description: However, her demeanor could hardly be called submissive. She would even defy the young queen. "You thought you could tame me? How utterly presumptuous." Stung by her words and thrown off by her whims, the courtiers soon formed a secret fan club.

Usable if all enemies on the battlefield are poisoned. Usable 3 times per battle.

entries.name: Nike
entries.title: Goddess of Victory
entries.description:
Nike's talent stood out even among the temple elite. At the mere age of seventeen, her pure magical power already rivaled that of the priests. Everyone believed she was destined to become an amazing Priestess of Time.
However, that very talent, coupled with her seeming aloofness, made her the target of envy. One would often find her alone on temple grounds.

localization.name: Storm of Blades
localization.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 400% damage instead and the user will immediately get the next turn. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Stun Barrage
localization.description: Stun a random enemy for 100TU, this effect triggers 4 times. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to trigger this effect 8 times instead. This skill locks after each use until the user defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack. Usable 3 times per battle.

localization.name: Divine Blast
localization.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. If at least one of the hit enemies is not defeated by this attack, the user gains a Power Charge. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Wings of Victory
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever this unit takes damage from an attack by an enemy unit that has defeated 0 units with attacks while on the battlefield, and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Victory Cry
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep.

When this unit enters battle, for 200TU, at the end of each turn an ally gets, the ally:
- will heal for 10% of their max HP, plus 10% per Awakening Nike has (up to 50% if Nike has 4 Awakenings).
- will have Sleep and Poison status effects other than Lethal Poison removed.
- may gain a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward and a Poison Ward (50% chance for each ward).
This effect will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

If all allies on the battlefield are at max HP when this unit enters battle, this unit gains a Power Charge and Intense Rage. Otherwise, all allies are healed for 100% of their max HP, Purified, and may gain a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and a Poison Ward (50% chance for each ward).

Intense Rage increases a units Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be by Weak effects.

entries.title: Goddess of Victory
entries.description: It was during such a time that she met Rolotia. In this caged world, the way Rolotia spoke of freedom became the embodiment of hope for Nike. Yet, the hope she embraced on that day deepened the unfathomable despair she felt when Rolotia vanished.
