localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Chronos
entries.title: Primordial of Time
entries.description: Chronos, the Primordial of Time, not only has the magical capacities that rival the gods, she is also able to manipulate all forms of time at will. Yet, she imposed strict rules upon herself, lowering herself to the level of a time mage. For the power of time is a force to be feared—wielded without restraint, it can unmake the fate of the world itself.

localization.name: Time Spears
localization.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If the target has 50TU or more, or if Time Stop is active, deals 600% damage.

If Time Stop is not active, Stuns the target for 300TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by Time Spears skill unless they leave the battlefield.

localization.name: Time Stop
localization.description:
Activates Time Stop For 100TU. While Time Stop is active, the user:
- Cannot be defeated by Poison or Burn damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Is immune to Poison, and Burn status effects.
- Has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This does not stack with Quicken effects.
- Disables the Active Skills of all other units on the battlefield (including new units that enter from reinforcements).

When Time Stop expires, all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and all non-boss enemies on the battlefield that are below 10% of their max HP will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Time Stop expiring may trigger before or after other effects.

Usable once per battle. The effects of Time Stop cannot be Purified and will be cancelled if the user is defeated. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping.

localization.name: Undo Existence
localization.description: Immediately defeats 2 non-boss enemies that have 300TU or more, (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). Then for each enemy that is defeated, Allies gain 2 Spirit. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if 2 or more enemies have 300TU or more and only once per battle.

localization.name: Sands of Time
localization.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Ruler of Time
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, be stunned or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

After each ally and enemy turn, if this unit is on the battlefield and Time Stop is not active, there is a 25% chance for a random enemy to be Stunned for 25TU and a random ally to have its TU reduced by 25TU. This Stun cannot be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Light Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Light units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Chronos
entries.title: Primordial of Time
entries.description: As a Primordial, except in extremely rare circumstances, she forbade herself from interacting with humans. Her will and words were always conveyed to the world through Rolotia. Over time, Rolotia became more than just a conduit to the mortal world, she became one Chronos could call a true friend.

localization.name: Time Spears
localization.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If the target has 50TU or more, or if Time Stop is active, deals 600% damage.

If Time Stop is not active, Stuns the target for 300TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by Time Spears skill unless they leave the battlefield.

localization.name: Time Stop
localization.description:
Activates Time Stop For 100TU. While Time Stop is active, the user:
- Cannot be defeated by Poison or Burn damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Is immune to Poison, and Burn status effects.
- Has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This does not stack with Quicken effects.
- Disables the Active Skills of all other units on the battlefield (including new units that enter from reinforcements).

When Time Stop expires, all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and all non-boss enemies on the battlefield that are below 10% of their max HP will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Time Stop expiring may trigger before or after other effects.

Usable once per battle. The effects of Time Stop cannot be Purified and will be cancelled if the user is defeated. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping.

localization.name: Undo Existence
localization.description: Immediately defeats 2 non-boss enemies that have 300TU or more, (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). Then for each enemy that is defeated, Allies gain 2 Spirit. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if 2 or more enemies have 300TU or more and only once per battle.

localization.name: Sands of Time
localization.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Ruler of Time
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, be stunned or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

After each ally and enemy turn, if this unit is on the battlefield and Time Stop is not active, there is a 25% chance for a random enemy to be Stunned for 25TU and a random ally to have its TU reduced by 25TU. This Stun cannot be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers.

localization.name: Primordial Might
localization.description:
Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever an ally on the battlefield damages any number of units with 100TU or more with an attack, Allies gain 2 Spirit at the end of the turn. Then If Allies have 10 Spirit, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Light Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Light units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Rolotia
entries.title: Corrupted Sorceress of Time
entries.description:
That day, that moment, Rolotia chose life over death. But what awaited her was no blessing, it was a curse.
Imprisoned by the one she loved, her powers exploited, her sanity eroded away... losing even her soul.

localization.name: Magical Barrage
localization.description:
200% damage to all enemies. If an enemy is poisoned or sleeping, deals 400% damage instead. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each poisoned and sleeping enemy hit. If no enemies are poisoned or sleeping already, each enemy hit is randomly granted either the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU or the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Dark Shroud
localization.description:
All non-burning allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a random ward (either Poison, Stun, or Sleep), and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Rewind Time
localization.description: Removes all Poison and Sleep wards from enemy units on the battlefield. Then pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Chimori's to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Magical Ruin
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping or poisoned. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Cursed Sleep or Lethal Poison status effects. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All non-burning, non-poisoned, non-sleeping enemies hit are then randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

localization.name: Dark Timeline
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield:
- This unit is immune to Poison and Sleep status effects.
- This unit is immune to Stun effects unless it is burning.
- Unless it is burning, this unit has 80% damage reduction and has a 60% chance, plus 10% chance per Awakening (up to 100% if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Until the end of this unit's second turn while on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy is immediately granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, then a random non-burning enemy immediately becomes Lethal Poisoned for 999TU. This is not a Skin passive skill.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Dark Rolotia
entries.title: Corrupted Sorceress of Time
entries.description:
"Come on, gimme more sweets! If you don't...I'll throw a tantrum!"
Once again, Chronos holds her head in her hands, terrorized by the little devil that has taken up residence in the Temple of Time.

localization.name: Time Warp
localization.description:
Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit will become a Guardian.
- All allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- All other allies that are at max HP have their TUs reduced to 0. This has no effect on allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills. These extra turns may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

After each enemy turn, a random sleeping or poisoned ally will have their Sleep or Poison (including Lethal Poison) removed and be granted a ward for the effect removed (a Poison Ward or Sleep Ward).

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Super Chimori
entries.description:
A guardian spirit with the power of Earth.
Enjoys tending gardens.

localization.name: Attack
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 1 Spirit.

localization.name: Toxic Bomb
localization.description:
Sacrifices the user to grant 1 enemy either the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU or the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Auto Guard+
localization.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

entries.name: Clare
entries.title: Knight of Silver
entries.description: Clare was raised in a peaceful village under the loving care of her parents. Though shy by nature, she had a love for adventure. One day, when lost in the forest, she was rescued by Rizette from the neighboring village. From that day on, the two became close friends. Clare admired Rizette for being a highly skilled hunter and viewed her as a dependable big sister.

localization.name: Heating Up
localization.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user has survived for 150TU on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 300TU on the battlefield. 800% damage instead if the user has survived for 450TU on the battlefield. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Blaze Onward
localization.description: Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. Then immediately give 2 other random burning allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

localization.name: Deadly Burn Blast
localization.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Silver Sky Slash
localization.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Burning Bond
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Whenever there are 3 or more burning allies on the battlefield, this unit will survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

Each time this unit gets the turn, all allies will heal for 30% of their max HP.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- If this unit has a Power Charge, all allies will become Enraged, then the Power Charge is removed from this unit.
- Otherwise, this unit will gain a Power Charge.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Axes.

localization.name: Axe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Axes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Clare
entries.title: Knight of Silver
entries.description: From then on, Rizette would visit Clare's home, sometimes bringing her younger brother along with her. Clare admired the siblings. One, the brave sister and the other, the clever brother. Gradually, the two became irreplaceable family to her. However, a single misunderstanding tore the relationship to shreds.

localization.name: Explosive Drive
localization.description:
This unit has 10% bonus to attacks for each burning unit on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- This unit and another random ally are granted Instant Death Wards.
- All units on the battlefield are granted the Burn status effect. This effect triggers 2 times.
- Then all burning units on the battlefield are Stunned for 50TU. This effect triggers 2 times.

An Instant Death Ward prevents a unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

entries.name: Zhuge Liang
entries.title: Raging Dragon
entries.description: Zhuge Liang was born into a prestigious family. However, at the time, the ruling elite used the pretext of national survival and prosperity to oppress tribal and minority groups. As a child, Zhuge Liang dedicated herself to both scholarly pursuits and martial training—but deep in her heart, she harbored quiet doubts about the injustice surrounding her.

localization.name: Rings of Fire
localization.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% damage). The user is then granted the Burn status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Heat Paralysis
localization.description: All non-water units on the battlefield are stunned for 150TU. Ally Stun Absorbers do not redirect this stun, and allies will not be stunned by this effect if there is an enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

localization.name: Piercing Heat
localization.description:
Targets 2 other random allies. Those allies are healed for 100% of max HP, are granted the Burn status effect, and Piercing. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Dragon Slam
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. 600% damage instead if the user has 3 Charges. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that were Burning at the start of the turn. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

localization.name: Burning Passion
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be Stunned. This unit enters battle with the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

This unit gains 20% damage reduction from attacks for each burning ally on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

When another non-conjured unit (ally or enemy) on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains a Charge. Certain skills are affected by charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the unit, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Zhuge Liang
entries.title: Raging Dragon
entries.description: In time, Zhuge Liang happened upon irrefutable evidence of large-scale corruption involving high-ranking government officials. Driven by her sense of justice, she resolved to reveal the truth. Yet, due to a political conspiracy, she was branded a traitor, accused of plotting to overthrow the state, and was forced to flee for her life. After exposing the truth to the people, she escaped, eventually crossing the sea and arriving on this continent.

This will not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will:
- Grant a random non-burning ally and non-burning enemy the Burn status effect. This is not a Skin passive skill.
- Then heal for 10% of max HP (up to 80% max) for each burning unit on the battlefield.

entries.name: Pinocchio
entries.title: Automaton of Memories
entries.description:
Pinocchio's earliest memory was the sight of many adults surrounding her.
"You have a special talent. Use it for the sake of our nation."
That is all they told her. Pinocchio couldn't go against those words. She had no choice but to obey.

localization.name: Lock Breaker
localization.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the target does not have the Burn status effect. Grants the user Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Randomly grants either Stun Wards, Sleep Wards, or Poison Wards to all allies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Cursed Roots
localization.description:
Steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each non-burning enemy on the battlefield, and all non-burning allies are granted Sleep Thorns. Then heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

localization.name: Poison Memories
localization.description:
Removes all Poison wards and Stealth Shields from enemy units on the battlefield. Then all non-sleeping enemies have a 50% chance each to be granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then all non-sleeping enemies are granted Mega Poison for 200TU. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Memory Collapse
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. 600% damage instead to targets that have the Mega Poison status effect. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Lethal Poison status effect. All non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Cursed Automata
localization.description:
This unit is immune to Poison status effects, and reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they are granted Sleep Thorns.

Whenever a non-conjured enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they are granted Super Poison. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Pinocchio
entries.title: Automaton of Memories
entries.description:
"Where are my mama and papa?"
But no one would answer. Forced to delve into the memories of others over and over, Pinocchio's heart was gradually overwritten. Even so, she continued to believe that her parents were surely somewhere in her sealed memories.

localization.name: Imprinted Ego
localization.description:
Each time a Poisoned or Sleeping unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

While a unit on the battlefield is Poisoned, this unit has:
- A 100% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 40%. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Masamune
entries.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
entries.description: Masamune was raised on a small island called Takagashima. Naturally quiet, she would hide whenever traveling merchants came to visit. However, she held deep affection for the other islanders, and they in turn were fond of the awkward Masamune.

localization.name: Lightning Strike
localization.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. 400% damage instead if the target has 150TU or more. 500% damage instead if the target has 200TU or more. 600% damage instead if the target has 250TU or more. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then if the target is a non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy and had 500TU or more at the start of the turn, they will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect can only trigger 3 times per battle, and will ignore Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

localization.name: Storm Relay
localization.description:
Immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU, heal them for 50% of their max HP and Purify them (remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Increase the number of targets by 1 for each enemy with 100+TU (up to 3 targets). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

localization.name: Thunderclap
localization.description: Triggers 2 times: Stun all enemies for 25TU. If the user has another Storm ally on the battlefield, stun them for 50TU instead. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

localization.name: Skybreaker
localization.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

localization.name: Lightning Wielder
localization.description:
Enemy units that deal damage to this unit get stunned for 100TU, this is a Skin effect.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Grants all enemies 3 Discharge Counters. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements they will be granted 3 Discharge Counters. A unit can store a maximum of 3 Discharge Counters, and all are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

When this unit hits an enemy with any Discharge Counters with an attack, they will be stunned for:
- 300TU if they have 3 Discharge Counters
- 200TU if they have 2 Discharge Counters
- 100TU if they have 1 Discharge Counter
Then, the hit enemy will have 1 Discharge Counter removed.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Axes.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Masamune
entries.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
entries.description:
One summer night on the island, amidst the clamor of the festival, Masamune accepted a juice handed to her by a certain foreigner and drank it without a care.
But in the next moment, her consciousness sank into darkness—and when she awoke, she had lost the light in her left eye. What's more, her beloved island companions had transformed into oni.

localization.name: Undying Storm
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit gains 20% damage reduction from attacks for each ally on the battlefield (up to 80% max). Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack, a random enemy will be stunned for 100TU.

If this unit has survived on the battlefield for 300TU or more, this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Ryoma
entries.title: Blade of Tomorrow
entries.description: Ryoma Sakamoto was born and raised in a small village tucked away in a corner of the Eastern Continent. Far from developed and with a modest population, the village was home to gentle and kind-hearted people. Thanks to her natural cheerfulness and friendly personality, she was loved by the villagers from a young age and spent her days as a beloved figure among them.

localization.name: Rising Blade
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 600% total damage). If not burning, the user will be granted Sleep Thorns. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

localization.name: One Thousand Cuts
localization.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to targets that do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Dancing Leaves
localization.description:
Removes Poison (including Lethal Poison) and Sleep from all allies on the battlefield. For each status effect removed in this way, Allies steal up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team, and a random enemy is granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Then all allies on the battlefield:
- Heal for 800% of the user's attack.
- Gain Stealth, a Stealth Shield, Poison Ward and Sleep Ward.
- Are granted Stun Resist Lv5 for 50TU (Reduce the amount of any stun effects against the unit by 50TU).

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Autumn's End
localization.description:
20% chance to immediately defeat 1 non-boss enemy, plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings). The user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

The user can no longer be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU, and Purify them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Locked for 250TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all enemies on the battlefield have the Cursed Sleep status effect. Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Pacifying Blade
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with Sleep Thorns. Unless this unit is burning, this unit is immune to Stun effects.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of its max HP, and will have its TU reduced to 0.

This unit's attacks:
- will not wake sleeping enemies.
- heal this unit fully when they deal damage to a target with Cursed Sleep.
- grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to non-burning units hit after damage is dealt. This effect cannot trigger if Ryoma has no other allies on the battlefield.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Light Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Light units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ryoma
entries.title: Blade of Tomorrow
entries.description: However, one day, the village was suddenly attacked by an Oni known as Hoshikuma-Douji and her followers. Ryoma was ordered by her mother to hide under the eaves, where she held her breath, remaining perfectly still. When all was quiet, she fearfully stepped outside. There, she found the lifeless bodies of the villagers — including her parents — strewn across the ground.

localization.name: Unbroken Vow
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While there is another Earth ally on the battlefield, this unit has 75% damage reduction instead.

When another non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit heals for 100% of max HP and if not burning is granted Sleep Thorns.

This unit has burn removed and is granted Burn Immunity for 100TU whenever:
- This unit enters battle, and there is a Water ally on the battlefield.
- A Water ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Perry
entries.title: Admiral of Debt
entries.description: Perry was born in a prosperous, civilized nation far away. There, advanced technology thrived—rivaling or even surpassing that of Bergaria. Perry's father, both an adventurer and a scientist, played a part in its progress.

localization.name: Water Barrage
localization.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. If an enemy on the battlefield is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead to both targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt.

localization.name: Sleep Torrent
localization.description:
Removes all Sleep wards and Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from enemy units on the battlefield.

Then grants 1 random enemy a burn ward, and the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. This effect triggers 4 times.

If no enemies were sleeping at the start of the turn, the user will immediately get the next turn. Usable if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are sleeping. Usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Concussive Blow
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield, and heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

localization.name: Tides of Fortune
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each burning or sleeping enemy on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

When this unit takes damage from an attack, if there are 2 or more enemies that are burning or sleeping on the battlefield, this unit has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to be immediately Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed, new status effects may still apply following this effect), and get the next turn.

When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At the end of each turn, if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

localization.name: Captain's Orders
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 20% of their max HP. If that ally is Water and survives until after the end of the turn, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

When this unit's attacks hit a sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

When this unit enters battle all allies will be granted Sleep Wards. After the end of this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies will have Burn removed and be granted Burn wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Perry
entries.title: Admiral of Debt
entries.description: The eyes of the young Perry always sparkled at the sight of the exotic treasures and minerals her father brought back from his expeditions. She worked hard toward her dream, determined to one day become an adventurer who would explore unknown lands. A year ago, she finally obtained government approval and set out as an adventurer. But around that time, her father, Ganon, vanished without a word, leaving no trace.

localization.name: Water Barrage
localization.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. If an enemy on the battlefield is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead to both targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt.

localization.name: Sleep Torrent
localization.description:
Removes all Sleep wards and Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from enemy units on the battlefield.

Then grants 1 random enemy a burn ward, and the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. This effect triggers 4 times.

If no enemies were sleeping at the start of the turn, the user will immediately get the next turn. Usable if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are sleeping. Usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Concussive Blow
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield, and heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

localization.name: Crashing Anchor
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead to sleeping targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Tides of Fortune
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each burning or sleeping enemy on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

When this unit takes damage from an attack, if there are 2 or more enemies that are burning or sleeping on the battlefield, this unit has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to be immediately Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed, new status effects may still apply following this effect), and get the next turn.

When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At the end of each turn, if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

localization.name: Captain's Orders
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 20% of their max HP. If that ally is Water and survives until after the end of the turn, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

When this unit's attacks hit a sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

When this unit enters battle all allies will be granted Sleep Wards. After the end of this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies will have Burn removed and be granted Burn wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Hibiki
entries.title: Cursed Demon Princess
entries.description: Hibiki Himeno was never discouraged. Not when she became a vessel. Not when the false requiem began. Even in the depths of despair, she laughs, her eyes always lit with the light of the future.

localization.name: Demonic Defiance
localization.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, Poison Ward, Stun Ward and Burn Ward. Unlocks at random either Toxic Reign or Demon Blast. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses the Toxic Finale skill or leaves the battlefield.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

localization.name: Toxic Reign
localization.description:
Removes Burn (including Mega Healing Burn) and Stealth Shields from all enemy units on the battlefield. Then all enemies are granted Mega Poison for 200TU, and Burn Wards. Then 1 random enemy is granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Demonic Defiance, and unlocks Toxic Finale upon use. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Demon Blast
localization.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Demonic Defiance, and unlocks Toxic Finale upon use. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Toxic Finale
localization.description: 350% damage to 2 enemies. 700% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. All non-poisoned enemies hit are then granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Toxic Reign or Demon Blast. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill unlocks Demonic Defiance after use.

localization.name: Dark Divinity
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

While there is a poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit is not affected by stun effects.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random ally on the battlefield is healed for 30% of max HP.
- A random ally on the battlefield is Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects.
- A random ally on the battlefield will have its TU costs for all of its skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Hibiki
entries.title: Cursed Demon Princess
entries.description:
But what if this body itself was a fabrication?
What if her memories had been forged?
What if there was no actual future in the first place?
Could she still overcome that despair?

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Divine Darkness
localization.description:
This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each poisoned enemy on the battlefield (up to 75% max).

When this unit takes damage from an attack:
- If this unit survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of max HP and be granted Stealth.
- If at the start of the turn there were no poisoned enemies and this unit had another ally on the battlefield, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random enemy on the battlefield is granted Super Poison.
- A random enemy on the battlefield is Weakened.
- This unit steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Elmina
entries.title: Moonveiled Agent
entries.description: Elmina works in the shadows as an special agent of the Red Dragon Organization. An existence of shadows, her missions are primarily espionage and infiltration... at times, even assassination. Only Luther and the upper echelons of the organization know her name. Her very existence is shrouded in secrecy.

localization.name: Photon Splitter
localization.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 150% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 650% total damage). This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, and skin passive skills. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

localization.name: Limiter Release
localization.description: The user will Overclock for 150TU. If the user is conjured, the user will Overclock for 75TU instead. While Overclocked, this unit heals for 25% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and has its Attack increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: CODE: DELETE
localization.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 750% total damage). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Cyber Doubles
localization.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

When this unit enters battle:
- If this unit is not conjured, it will have Hold Ground (If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).
- If this unit is not conjured and if there are 4 allies on the battlefield, an Elmina will be added to the front of allied reinforcements.
- If this unit is conjured, this unit will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

This unit will gain a Charge each time it attacks and does not defeat any non-conjured enemies.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack:
- An Elmina will be added to the front of allied reinforcements. This effect cannot trigger if there are 8 or more "Elmina, Moonveiled Agent" in the ally team.
- Then all charges are removed from this unit.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. All Elmina's created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories.

localization.name: Hyper Drive
localization.description:
If this unit entered from reinforcements, the following effects are triggered when this unit activates Limiter Release, and the first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn:
- All allies will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 100% of max HP.
- Then all other ally units will be given the next turns by having their TU reduced. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by those allies until after they have had the turn.

Each time this unit damages at least one enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances.

Effects that influence TU order may interrupt extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greataxes.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Elmina
entries.title: Moonveiled Agent
entries.description: In the past, Elmina was taken in by the Church as an orphan, tasked with finding and bringing back vessels. Yet, as she came to learn the truth behind the Requiem, she began to feel sympathy for the girls. Eventually, she was taken in by Luther and the Red Dragon Organization, which proclaims the goal of creating a world without vessels. There, she began her path as a special agent.

localization.name: Phase Out
localization.description:
Exchanges 1 random enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to the front of the enemy reinforcements. This exchange will fail if the target is Immovable or if there are less than 4 enemies on the battlefield (no imposter will be added).

Then pulls the user away from the battlefield to the front of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Elmina's (max 3) to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, and there are 2 non-conjured allies on the battlefield.

entries.name: Momotaro
entries.title: Peachy Big Sister
entries.description: Momo Fujiwara shared the same father as Reina, yet she was born to a woman who was never his wife. Because she was acknowledged by her father, her family name in the registry was Fujiwara, but Momo and her mother were kept at a distance from the main family, living in a detached house on the Fujiwara estate.

localization.description:

This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The first time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, the user will get the next turn by having their TU reduced to 0. Then this skill becomes usable only if the user's party has 2 or less Spirit.

localization.name: Heartful Push
localization.description: Exchanges 1 random non-sleeping, non-immovable enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 200TU, minus 25TU per awakening (100TU if the user has 4 Awakenings). Usable only if there are 4 enemies on the battlefield, at least 2 of them are not Imposters, and a valid target exists. Usable 15 times per battle.

This will not trigger if the target is Immovable or if there are less than 4 enemies on the battlefield (no Imposter will be added), and cannot trigger more than 3 times per battle.

entries.name: King Arthur
entries.title: Revenant of the Round Table
entries.description: Arthur Leidram entered an endless dream woven by Merlin's magic, there she took her final breath. Yes, she had shed the blood of many. But she had striven for her ultimate goal. There were no regrets.

localization.name: Infectious Evil
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each turn the user has gotten and survived until after the end of the turn on the battlefield (max of 600% total damage). If that enemy is not burning, they will also be granted the Lethal Poison status effect, and become infected with it. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

localization.name: Dark Rebirth
localization.description:
Heals all Dark allies for 100% of max HP. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. The user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again.

When the user activates this skill a third time, a random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on or below 25% of max HP and on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

This skill is locked until the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and is locked again after each use. This skill can be used only three times per battle.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Regal Cataclysm
localization.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 500% total damage). The user and another random ally are granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Tainted King
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated or stunned until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

This unit enters battle with 10% HP Regen for 200TU, and an Instant Death Ward.

An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. A unit with 10% HP Regen will heal for 10% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects.

localization.name: King's Dawn+
localization.description:
This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50%.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

-This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.
-This will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: King Arthur
entries.title: Revenant of the Round Table
entries.description: The forbidden arts of the Uzlavian queen led King Arthur to her awakening. In the depths of the dream, she realized that the Knights of the Round Table still carried a vast emptiness in their hearts.

localization.name: Infectious Evil
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each turn the user has gotten and survived until after the end of the turn on the battlefield (max of 600% total damage). If that enemy is not burning, they will also be granted the Lethal Poison status effect, and become infected with it. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. localization.name: Devouring Eclipse
localization.description:
Immediately defeats 1 random non-boss, non-conjured enemy. Then all remaining non-boss, non-ephemeral enemies on the battlefield have a 25% chance each of being immediately defeated. These effects ignore Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated by any of these effects.

Unlocked after 5 or more non-conjured units on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield. Usable if a valid target exists, and once per battle.

localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated or stunned until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Don Quixote
entries.title: Relentless Knight
entries.description: Don Quixote grew up in a small village on the outskirts of the northern continent. She was shy and clumsy. She always felt left behind by the other children, whether it was studying or sports. She never had any confidence in herself.

localization.name: Heated Lance
localization.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. 1000% damage instead if all units on the battlefield are burning. Then another random ally is granted Piercing. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Overflowing Burn
localization.description:
Burns all units on the battlefield, and grants them a Burn Shield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then the user is granted Healing Burn for 300TU, all other allies heal for 1000% of the user's attack, and Allies gain 1 Spirit for each unit on the battlefield that is burning. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

localization.name: Burning Path
localization.description:
Targets all enemies. 1500% damage to 1 random enemy. 500% damage to all other targets. Then all allies heal for 500% of the user's attack. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Hero's Journey
localization.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot be defeated if it has the Mega Healing Burn status effect.

This unit enters battle with Mega Healing Burn for 100TU, and an Instant Death Ward.

At the end of each of the first 3 turns this unit gets on the battlefield:
- Burn all units on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Then this unit is granted Mega Healing Burn for 100TU.
- Then this unit is granted an Instant Death Ward.

An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Unwavering Strength
localization.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

At the end of each ally unit's turn while this unit is on the battlefield, if there are 4 or more burning units on the battlefield, a random burning non-water enemy will be stunned for 25TU. This may trigger before or after other effects.

Until this unit has survived for 150TU on the battlefield, this unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. Afterwards, this unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn:
- this unit will heal for 10% of max HP for each burning ally on the battlefield (max 40%).
- a random burning non-guardian ally will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Don Quixote
entries.title: Relentless Knight
entries.description: However, as she diligently chopped firewood every day to help her parents, the villagers began to notice that she possessed extraordinary strength. From then on, the village came to rely on her whenever monsters appeared. She felt truly happy to have discovered a talent that allowed her to help others.
