localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Thor
entries.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
entries.description: The true reason the giants were imprisoned in the Abyss was to serve as scapegoats, should the Worst God ever break free of her seal. The giants had no knowledge of Thor's existence, yet they felt it. Laughter mingled with the silence of the night and there was the unbearably cold scent of death.

localization.name: Hammering Blade
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Then stuns the target for 100TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by Hammering Blade unless they leave the battlefield.

localization.name: Thunder Shield
localization.description:
For each ally on the battlefield that is Sleeping or on or below 95% of max HP, Allies gain 1 Spirit, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Then all allies on the battlefield heal for 1000% of the user's attack, are Purified (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and granted a Stun Ward and Sleep Ward.

Usable if any ally on the battlefield is on or below 95% of max HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Disabling Bolts
localization.description:
The enemy with the lowest current TU and the enemy with the highest current TU have their Active Skills disabled for 50TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

Usable only if there are at least 2 non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield and becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

localization.name: Thundering Wrath
localization.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Usable if the user is not a Guardian, and only 3 times per battle.

localization.name: God of Thunder
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit enters battle with an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

This unit will become a Guardian for 100TU:
- When this unit enters the battlefield.
- Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

While this unit is a Guardian:
- It has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- This unit has Stun and Sleep immunity.
- Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 100% of its max HP.

While this unit is not a Guardian, this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Unshackled Power
localization.description:
The first time this unit is damaged by an enemy attack, that enemy's Active Skills are disabled for 20TU, plus 20TU per Awakening (up to 100TU if this unit has 4 Awakenings), and this unit has its current TU reduced by 50TU. Whenever this unit uses Thundering Wrath, this effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, 2 random enemies are Weakened and granted Rage Wards. Then all non-burning allies are Purified. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again, then all allies become Purified and gain the Armor status effect. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Swords.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ruvi
entries.title: Faithful Red Dragon
entries.description: To the young Ruvi, Callen was her savior. Her parents were slain by demons during the Pandemonium, leaving the dying young dragon in the cold nest. It was none other than Callen who saved and raised her.

localization.name: Dragon Prism
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning enemies on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Roaring Ignition
localization.description:
Heals all burning allies for 800% of the user's attack, and Enrages them. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Then 1 random ally and 1 random enemy are granted the Burn status effect and become infected with it.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Each infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

localization.name: Combo Blaze
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if all allies on the battlefield are burning. This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Scorching Descent
localization.description:
When this unit enters battle, all allies are granted Instant Death Wards. Then at the end of the turn, all enemies on the battlefield will be granted the Burn status effect. An Instant Death Ward prevents a unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

This unit cannot be Stunned if any ally on the battlefield is burning.

While all enemies on the battlefield are burning, this unit has 0.5x of their original Attack added to their Attack. This does stack on top of Enrage effects, and other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.5x => 2.0x total)

At the end of each of this unit's turns, all burning enemies on the battlefield will be stunned for 25TU.

Each time this unit damages a burning enemy with an attack, a random burning ally will have their TU reduced to 0 at the end of the turn. This cannot trigger unless there are 2 burning allies on the battlefield.

Each time an ally unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit will gain a Charge. If that enemy was burning, a random ally will be granted Piercing. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Everburning Devotion
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction is lowered by 10% for each time this unit is hit by an enemy attack while on the battlefield (to a minimum of 30% after being hit by 5 enemy attacks).

Burns all allies on the battlefield when this unit is defeated by an enemy, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

When this unit enters the battlefield, this unit is granted Mega Healing Burn for 100TU, and all allies that are either Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills. Whenever another ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on this unit, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ruvi
entries.title: Faithful Red Dragon
entries.description: Even without words, Ruvi possessed the intelligence to grasp Callen's intentions from a single expression. When Callen broke a magic-powered tool, it was Ruvi who fixed it. When she got a craving for sweets, it was Ruvi who thoughtfully hid them away.

entries.name: Freya
entries.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
entries.description: Battle was the entirety of her world. It was the ultimate way to speak heart to heart, to convey love, and to etch her existence into the world.

localization.name: Passionate Cleave
localization.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage). The user will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Meteor Call or Tides of War since this skill was last used.

Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying.

The first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will enter War Frenzy for 100TU, and have its TU reduced to 0. While in War Frenzy:
- This unit's attacks ignore damage reduction effects.
- When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. This is a Skin effect.
- This unit becomes Enraged at the end of its turns if this unit is Burning. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Spark of Yggdrasil
localization.description:

This unit has Stun immunity. Whenever this unit gets the turn, if this unit's Active Skills are not disabled, this unit can't have its Active Skills disabled until the end of its turn.

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with attacks while on the battlefield (max of 80% after defeating 3+ enemies with attacks).

If this unit takes damage from an attack while not sleeping, and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of max HP.

The first time damage from one of this unit's attacks defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated. This effect is reset so it can trigger again whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated while this unit is on the battlefield.

entries.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
entries.description: However, now that she has to lead survivors and protect the weak, her values have wavered for the first time. The muffled sobs she hears on sleepless nights, the laments of those who have lost their homes, the small voices crying out in hunger... these were things her power, no matter how great, could not defeat.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Harmonic Maiden
entries.description:
Today we've got a very special guest!

Right as the Super Idol Mirai finishes her introduction, the Ultra-Super Idol Anya makes her grand appearance. The cheers are deafening. Some fans even faint on the spot just from seeing Anya standing there.

"All right, let's do our usual song!"

In perfect unison, the crowd raises their glow sticks and braces themselves in silence. Anya grips the microphone. One deep breath.

"Boom-boom, tss-tss, chicka-chicka-tss!"

Anya—the idol who rose to the very top of the industry through sheer vocal percussion!
And today's performance? She's in top form!

localization.name: Prismatic Voice
localization.description:
Targets 1 enemy. This skill will randomly deal either 300%, 600% or 900% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill unlocks Spirited Beat upon use.

When this attack damages a:
- burning enemy, all non-Fire element enemies without Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will be granted the burn status effect at the end of the turn.
- sleeping enemy, all non-poisoned enemies will be granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU at the end of the turn, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- poisoned enemy, all non-sleeping enemies will be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU at the end of the turn.

Burn, Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Spirited Beat
localization.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. This skill unlocks Disabling Chorus upon use.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 1, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.
- At least 5, also another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0 at the end of the turn. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.
- At 10, also adds 500% to the damage % of this user's next attack (e.g. Disabling Chorus: 300% => 800% damage when Center Stage has not been used 3 times).

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Prismatic Voice. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Disabling Chorus
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has used Center Stage 3 times in this battle. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

All enemies hit have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Spirited Beat. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Center Stage
localization.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, and Fortifies them.

Usable only if the user is not alone, and 1 or more allies on the battlefield are not Fortified. Usable 3 times per battle.

A Fortified unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction cannot be ignored by attacks that do not specifically ignore Fortify. Fortify will be removed after reducing damage 3 times since applying, and will be reset if reapplied. This is not a status effect.

localization.name: Harmonic Maiden
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has Sleep immunity and Stun immunity.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 50% of its max HP.

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit is healed for 100% of max HP.

entries.name: Anya
entries.title: Harmonic Maiden
entries.description:
Ultra-Hyper-Super Idol Anya's solo concert! The Anya & Astrid duo is the most popular act in the entire world!

On the big day, fans flood in from across the globe! Every mode of transportation is jammed to a standstill! Not a single person can make it to the venue!

Anya agonizes. "I want everyone to see the show... isn't there something I can do...?"

But Astrid remains perfectly calm. "You don't need to do anything at all."

Anya, who always thinks of her fans first, murmurs in distress. "How can you say that...!?"

"Because streaming tickets are a thing."
Anya was too busy worrying about her fans that she had completely forgotten about the streaming tickets.

And so, the livestream was a massive success!

localization.name: Prismatic Voice
localization.description:
Targets 1 enemy. This skill will randomly deal either 300%, 600% or 900% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill unlocks Spirited Beat upon use.

When this attack damages a:
- burning enemy, all non-Fire element enemies without Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will be granted the burn status effect at the end of the turn.
- sleeping enemy, all non-poisoned enemies will be granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU at the end of the turn, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- poisoned enemy, all non-sleeping enemies will be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU at the end of the turn.

Burn, Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Spirited Beat
localization.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. This skill unlocks Disabling Chorus upon use.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 1, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.
- At least 5, also another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0 at the end of the turn. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.
- At 10, also adds 500% to the damage % of this user's next attack (e.g. Disabling Chorus: 300% => 800% damage when Center Stage has not been used 3 times).

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Prismatic Voice. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Disabling Chorus
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has used Center Stage 3 times in this battle. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

All enemies hit have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Spirited Beat. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Center Stage
localization.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, and Fortifies them.

Usable only if the user is not alone, and 1 or more allies on the battlefield are not Fortified. Usable 3 times per battle.

A Fortified unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction cannot be ignored by attacks that do not specifically ignore Fortify. Fortify will be removed after reducing damage 3 times since applying, and will be reset if reapplied. This is not a status effect.

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit is healed for 100% of max HP.

localization.name: Super Star
localization.description:
When this unit enters battle, all allies are Fortified. Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they are Fortified.

This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks. This unit has 70% damage reduction from attacks instead if it isn't Fortified.

This unit enters battle with an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Axes.

localization.name: Hammer Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Hammers in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Chopin
entries.title: Maestro of Reveries
entries.description:
She and Washington had been close collaborators since their student days. Together, they took on countless robotics competitions, sweeping up awards left and right.
Whenever they were called a genius duo, she would tease Washington to hide her own embarrassment—and be promptly scolded by her friend. That was happiness for her. Chopin wished those days could go on forever.
And yet, deep in her heart, she knew her illness was quietly but steadily getting worse. But even as her mind lingers on her approaching mortality, she nevertheless spent her days teasing Washington like usual.

localization.name: Grand Finale
localization.description:
400% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

localization.name: Sharp Note
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Then the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

This skill unlocks Broken Chord upon use, and becomes locked after use until the user uses Broken Chord or Grand Finale. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

localization.name: Broken Chord
localization.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies, and the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

If Ally Spirit is less than 5, raises Ally Spirit to 5. If Enemy Spirit is more than 5, lowers Enemy Spirit to 5.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Sharp Note. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Chopin's Reverie
localization.description:
When this unit enters battle, this unit is granted an Instant Death Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and Burn Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

When this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield, at the end of the turn this unit is healed for 100% of max HP and gains one of the following Melodies at random:
- Water Melody: Grants this unit Sleep Immunity.
- Storm Melody:  Grants this unit Stun Immunity.
- Earth Melody: Grants this unit Poison Immunity.
- Fire Melody: Grants this unit Burn Immunity.

Melodies do not end unless Chopin is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Chopin can have multiple Melodies active at once, but is not guaranteed to gain one she does not already have when a Melody is randomly gained by her skills.

localization.name: Musical Warfare
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each unique Melody this unit has active (e.g. Grand Finale: 400% => 900% damage with all 5 Melodies active).

At the end of each enemy turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Light Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Light units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Chopin
entries.title: Maestro of Reveries
entries.description:
After graduation, the two were conscripted by the RDO and tasked with leading the "Dragon Head Project."
Together, they were able to perfect the theoretical basis for the device, as well as almost completing the construction of the device itself. But one final obstacle stood in their way: the device required a computational core on par with a human brain. This became the single, glaring void in their otherwise perfect blueprint.

In that moment, an answer flickered in Chopin's mind.

—Of course. They could just extract someone's actual brain to use as a substitute.
And with so little time left anyway, she was more than willing to be that someone.

localization.name: Inspiring Song
localization.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants each of  them a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Burn Ward, and Intense Rage.

The user gains the Recovery Melody. If the user already has Recovery Melody active, the user randomly gains either the Water, Storm, Earth or Fire Melody instead. While active, Recovery Melody will heal Chopin for 25% of max HP each time an ally gets the turn.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Locked for 50TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

Intense Rage increases a unit's Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be overwritten by Weak effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

entries.name: Washington
entries.title: Always the Number One!
entries.description:
Washington was an ordinary girl with unremarkable grades — the kind you could find anywhere. Then she met Chopin, a dazzling, almost blinding genius.

Strangely enough, they clicked. And for some reason, she alone could understand Chopin's outrageous ideas. Before she knew it, the two had become inseparable.

She never once doubted that she would stay by Chopin's side forever.

localization.name: Compounding Shot
localization.description:
100% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each sleeping or frostburned enemy (max of 500% total damage). The user is granted a Power Charge. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Stars of Victory
localization.description:
Weakens all enemies. Enrages and heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack.

Then immediately give all other allies that are burning or the Water element the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Missile Storm
localization.description:
Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Each enemy hit is then randomly granted either the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU (even if they have already slept while on the battlefield), or Frostburn. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Unyielding Liberty
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

After this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and healed for 100% of max HP. Then there is a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) for this unit to grant Frostburn to all enemies on the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 25% of its max HP.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Naval Barrier for 200TU. A unit with Naval Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

While this unit has Naval Barrier, this unit will survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

localization.name: Spirited Genius
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

At the end of each enemy turn, if Ally Spirit is less than 8, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

Whenever this unit damages any number of units with an attack, ally Spirit is doubled at the end of the turn, if ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.

Whenever ally Spirit is at 8 or more at the end of any turn, this unit will be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and have its TU reduced to 0. This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Washington
entries.title: Always the Number One!
entries.description:
As they grew older, Chopin's brilliance began to bloom at an astonishing pace.
As she merrily spoke of increasingly complex scientific theories, Washington felt more and more distance between them.
She used to understand Chopin. She had believed she was the only one who truly could. But the reality that she — the ordinary girl that she was — was slowly getting left behind frightened her...

entries.name: Snow White
entries.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
entries.description: Light and shadow — Snow White and Snow Black. The soul of the shadow had begun to sense her own existence gradually fading away. This was because of emotions that had unexpectedly taken root within her, born from her interactions with the hero and Snow White.

localization.name: Soul Fragment
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 700% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 1000% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The target hit has its sleep and burn removed (including Deep Sleep, and Mega Healing Burn) and is granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

Then the user will add a Kuromori to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This will not trigger if there were no enemy reinforcements at the start of the turn.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Blood Cycle
localization.description:
If there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed, if that Mori's Element was:
- Water, Fire or Light, all non-fire enemies on the battlefield are granted the burn status effect. Then all enemies on the battlefield are granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. These effects will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm, Earth or Dark, all allies on the battlefield will have their current TU reduced by 50TU, and gain Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Otherwise, if a Mori was not sacrificed, adds 3 Super Mori's to the very end of allied reinforcements (these will be Super Kuromoris and/or Super Shiromoris at random).

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Super Stealth will overwrite other Status effects. Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

localization.name: Fateful Snow
localization.description:
Removes Poison and Sleep (including Deep Sleep, and Lethal Poison) from all allies on the battlefield. All allies on the battlefield heal for 500% of the user's attack.

Then a random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on or below 25% of max HP and on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This health threshold is increased by 25% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 100% of max HP after being used 3 times or more). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Dark Reckoning
localization.description:
800% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, and enemy damage reduction effects. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Unlocked after 5 or more units (including ephemeral ally units) on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: Seeds of Fate
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot be poisoned or be immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy.

Whenever a Mori enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

When this unit enters battle:
- If there are at least 5 non-conjured units in the ally team (including reinforcements), this unit adds 1 Super Kuromori to a random place in allied reinforcements for each non-conjured Storm, Earth and Dark ally on the battlefield, and adds 1 Super Shiromori to a random place in allied reinforcements for each non-conjured Water, Fire and Light ally on the battlefield.
- If there are at least 5 non-conjured units in the enemy team (including reinforcements), this unit adds 1 Kuromori to a random place in enemy reinforcements for each non-conjured enemy on the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Snow White
entries.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
entries.description: As though exploiting the opening left in her heart, the "other shadow" that was supposed to have been sealed away returns to life once more. She is the black witch, steeped in malice and hatred — the one who was vanquished by Snow Black after attempting to steal her body.

localization.name: Soul Fragment
localization.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 700% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 1000% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The target hit has its sleep and burn removed (including Deep Sleep, and Mega Healing Burn) and is granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

Then the user will add a Kuromori to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This will not trigger if there were no enemy reinforcements at the start of the turn.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Blood Cycle
localization.description:
If there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed, if that Mori's Element was:
- Water, Fire or Light, all non-fire enemies on the battlefield are granted the burn status effect. Then all enemies on the battlefield are granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. These effects will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm, Earth or Dark, all allies on the battlefield will have their current TU reduced by 50TU, and gain Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Otherwise, if a Mori was not sacrificed, adds 3 Super Mori's to the very end of allied reinforcements (these will be Super Kuromoris and/or Super Shiromoris at random).

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Super Stealth will overwrite other Status effects. Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

localization.name: Fateful Snow
localization.description:
Removes Poison and Sleep (including Deep Sleep, and Lethal Poison) from all allies on the battlefield. All allies on the battlefield heal for 500% of the user's attack.

Then a random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on or below 25% of max HP and on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This health threshold is increased by 25% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 100% of max HP after being used 3 times or more). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Dark Reckoning
localization.description:
800% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, and enemy damage reduction effects. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Unlocked after 5 or more units (including ephemeral ally units) on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: Seeds of Fate
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot be poisoned or be immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy.

Whenever a Mori enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

When this unit enters battle:
- If there are at least 5 non-conjured units in the ally team (including reinforcements), this unit adds 1 Super Kuromori to a random place in allied reinforcements for each non-conjured Storm, Earth and Dark ally on the battlefield, and adds 1 Super Shiromori to a random place in allied reinforcements for each non-conjured Water, Fire and Light ally on the battlefield.
- If there are at least 5 non-conjured units in the enemy team (including reinforcements), this unit adds 1 Kuromori to a random place in enemy reinforcements for each non-conjured enemy on the battlefield.

localization.name: Black and White
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Burn Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Super Stealth. At the end of each of this unit's turns, this unit is granted a Burn Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Super Stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Each time this unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 25% of its max HP for each ally on the battlefield (max of 100% if 4 allies are on the battlefield).

This unit has 30% damage reduction, plus 10% for each ally Mori on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements (max of 70% while 4 Moris are on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements).

If this unit is below 50% of max HP at the end of a turn, and there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed and all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and become Enraged. Then this unit will have its TU reduced to 0. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Sleep Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the duration of any enemy sleep effects on this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Super Shiromori
entries.description:
A guardian spirit with the power of Light.
Enjoys basking in the sun.

localization.name: Attack
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 1 Spirit.

localization.name: Heal Bomb
localization.description: Sacrifices the user to heal 1 other ally on the battlefield for 100% of max HP.

localization.name: Auto Guard+
localization.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: Ephemeral
localization.description:
This unit is never considered to be defeated by attacks and does not trigger any skills of other units whenever it is defeated or sacrificed by any source while on the battlefield.

This unit will be fully healed after each turn if it takes damage but is not defeated. This unit will be defeated after any ally or enemy turn if this unit has any of the Burn, Super Poison, or Mega Poison status effects.

Damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

entries.name: Beauty & Beast
entries.title: Pair of Morphean Flowers
entries.description:
Belle was born in a small town. She was raised by her parents, but financial ruin tore the family apart—and Belle was left behind.
With nowhere else to go, she found herself among a group of urchins in the backstreets. Thanks to her natural dexterity and street smarts, it wasn't long before she had made a name for herself among the backstreet's shady residents.

localization.name: Poisonous Axe
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. If any enemy on the battlefield is poisoned, deals 600% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

localization.name: Budding Gifts
localization.description:
All non-burning allies are healed for 500% of the user's attack, and Enraged. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

If 2 or more enemies on the battlefield are poisoned, all allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%, this will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills. Otherwise, if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are poisoned, all enemies on the battlefield are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

localization.name: Belle of the Ball
localization.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. Then grants that enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This attack ignores Guardians, and damage reduction effects.

Usable only if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 25TU.

localization.name: Dreams Entwined
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever a Dark ally named Aigis enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

If there is not already a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit adds Aigis to next in line of allied reinforcements at the end of the turn whenever:
- Another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, so long as this unit is not defeated or sacrificed at the same time.
- This unit defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack.

Aigis's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be stunned if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

localization.name: Unshackled Strength
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be poisoned, or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn. This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

When this unit enters battle, this unit is granted an Instant Death Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Beauty & Beast
entries.title: Pair of Morphean Flowers
entries.description:
Aigis had no family either. As an infant, she was abandoned in the forest near a town. Though taken in by a local family who found her, she was treated as little more than labor—and in the end, she was cast aside once again.
Because of her distinct appearance and her timid nature, she remained alone for as long as she could remember.

Until she met Belle.

localization.name: Beastly Uppercut
localization.description:

This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Then the target hit has its burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

localization.name: Briar Barrage
localization.description:
500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All enemies hit are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable if there are 0 or 1 poisoned enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 30TU after use.

localization.name: Undying Blossom
localization.description:
Adds a Belle to next in line of allied reinforcements, then exchanges 1 other ally with her if there are already 4 allies on the battlefield. Usable only if there is at least 1 other ally on the battlefield, and there is not already an Earth ally named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements.

This Belle's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user.

localization.name: Belle's Protector
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, or be immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy.

This unit becomes a Guardian and cannot be defeated. These effects begin when this unit enters the battlefield, and end after this unit's third turn on the battlefield. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP and be granted Super Stealth. This healing is increased to 100% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers after entering the battlefield.

Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Aigis
entries.description:
Aigis had no family either. As an infant, she was abandoned in the forest near a town. Though taken in by a local family who found her, she was treated as little more than labor—and in the end, she was cast aside once again.
Because of her distinct appearance and her timid nature, she remained alone for as long as she could remember.

Until she met Belle.

localization.name: Beastly Uppercut
localization.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Then the target hit has its burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

localization.name: Briar Barrage
localization.description:
500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All enemies hit are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable if there are 0 or 1 poisoned enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 30TU after use.

localization.name: Belle's Protector
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, or be immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy.

This unit becomes a Guardian and cannot be defeated. These effects begin when this unit enters the battlefield, and end after this unit's third turn on the battlefield. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP and be granted Super Stealth. This healing is increased to 100% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers after entering the battlefield.

Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth.

localization.name: Morphean Dreamers
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, or be stunned.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements:
- All enemies on the battlefield are granted Mega Poison for 200TU.
- All Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will have their TU reduced to 0, and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- Then this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, all Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will immediately have their TU reduced to 0. This is not a skin effect.

When this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield, at the end of the turn:
- This unit steals Spirit from the enemy team until enemy Spirit reaches 0.
- All Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will have their TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.
- Then this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.
Effects that influence TU order may interrupt these extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Stun Resist Lv3
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 20TU.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kintaro
entries.title: Sugar, Spice, and Brute Force
entries.description:
The third head of a distinguished lineage that inherits the title of "Locksmith" in the world of dreams.
Locksmiths make their living by breaking through the barriers of a dream world and rescuing the souls trapped within.
Most of her day-to-day work come from requests by Hypnos and Alice.

localization.name: Heavy Swing
localization.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each sleeping, burning or poisoned ally on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 affected allies). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

localization.name: Intimidate
localization.description:
Enrages the user. Weakens, and removes Stealth from all enemies on the battlefield.

If Ally Spirit is less than Enemy Spirit, raises Ally Spirit to 10. If Ally Spirit is higher than Enemy Spirit, lowers Enemy Spirit to 0 instead.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Golden Will
localization.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 500% of the user's attack, and grants each of them a Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and Sleep Thorns.

Then the user is granted 3 Charges, cannot be defeated for the next 100TU, and has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50% for 100TU. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs. This alone will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.

Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

localization.name: Golden Powerhouse
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with 3 Charges, and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

After entering battle, this unit cannot be defeated for 100TU.

This unit's attacks:
- will not wake sleeping enemies.
- heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.
- grant the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU to non-sleeping units hit after damage is dealt. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with attacks while on the battlefield (max of 80% after defeating 3+ enemies with attacks).

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Counter Stance for 150TU, then become Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 50% of its max HP. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

localization.name: Brute Force
localization.description:
This unit cannot be stunned or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot fall asleep if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield.

Each time this unit damages any number of non-burning enemies with an attack while charged, this unit will spend a charge to get another turn. This effect can trigger again against the same unit. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

While this unit is on the battlefield, whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, add 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks (max of 300% after 3 enemies have entered the battlefield from reinforcements. e.g. Heavy Swing: 700% => 1000% damage after 3 enemies have entered the battlefield from reinforcements, and no allies are sleeping, burning or poisoned).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Storm Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Kintaro
entries.title: Sugar, Spice, and Brute Force
entries.description:
Kintaro loves embroidered handkerchiefs, ribbons, lace accessories, fluffy stuffed animals, floral pouches...
After finishing a good day's work, there's nothing she enjoys more than hugging her cherished items closely and gushing "Awwww, soooo cute!"

localization.name: Golden Cleave
localization.description:
700% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to burning targets. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user is damaged by an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Storm units.

localization.name: Mace Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Maces in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Red Dragon Dancer
entries.description:
Long ago, when she had witnessed a ballet performance as a child, she saw it as something purely beautiful—something from a world far removed from her own.
But as she began living and training alongside the troupe, sharing meals with them and sweating in the same rehearsal hall, she realized she had been wrong.
Even within graceful movements and quiet steps, there lay the same resolve and discipline as when she practiced her sword.

localization.name: Quick Strike
localization.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Then the user has their current TU reduced by 50TU. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

localization.name: Elegant Thrust
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward.

Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, Deadly Dance is unlocked.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Deadly Dance
localization.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Then the user has their current TU reduced by 50TU.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Elegant Thrust. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Dancing Knight
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of their max HP.

This unit's attacks ignore Guardians, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, Earth or Dark, Stun them for 100TU, and grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU.
- Fire, Storm or Light, Weaken them, and grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified. Then all other allies are given the next turns by reducing their current TU. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

If this unit has defeated a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, Clarice is added to the very front of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This is not considered a Revenge passive skill. Clarice's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

Mega Poison and Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Charged Performance
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Charge, Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit is granted a Charge.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Charge stored on this unit (e.g. Deadly Dance: 700% => 1000% damage while 3 Charges are stored on this unit).

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each Charge stored on this unit (max of 80% while 3 Charges are stored on this unit).

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack, and survives until after the end of the turn, if this unit is charged, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP. Otherwise, if this unit is not charged, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Ludmilla
entries.title: Red Dragon Dancer
entries.description:
Even on an unfamiliar stage, Clarice danced with a skill far beyond her own. And yet, not a trace of jealousy stirred in Ludmilla's heart.
What she felt instead was pure joy—that her dear friend had been recognized and found new bonds.
Determined to catch up in her own way, Ludmilla once again commits to her training with maximum gusto.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 5 but less than 10, a random ally is granted Intense Rage, and given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.
- 10, all allies are granted Intense Rage, and given the next turns by reducing their current TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. Intense Rage increases a units Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be by Weak effects.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

entries.name: Clarice
entries.description:
Clarice watched it all unfold—others derided Ludmilla as someone with no talent for dance.
But even without any talent, she would not stop—stumbling, falling, sweating, and still rising again with a smile.
The sight stole Clarice's heart again and again.
Even if her movements were far from graceful, to Clarice, Ludmilla's dance was more noble—and more beautiful—than anyone else's.

Otherwise, if this unit is not charged, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
