localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Clarice
entries.description:
Clarice watched it all unfold—others derided Ludmilla as someone with no talent for dance.
But even without any talent, she would not stop—stumbling, falling, sweating, and still rising again with a smile.
The sight stole Clarice's heart again and again.
Even if her movements were far from graceful, to Clarice, Ludmilla's dance was more noble—and more beautiful—than anyone else's.

localization.name: Dancing Maid
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of their max HP.

This unit's attacks ignore Guardians, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, Earth or Dark, Stun them for 100TU, and grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU.
- Fire, Storm or Light, Weaken them, and grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified. Then all other allies are given the next turns by reducing their current TU. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

If this unit has defeated a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, Ludmilla is added to the very front of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This is not considered a Revenge passive skill. Ludmilla's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

Mega Poison and Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Charged Performance
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Charge, Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit is granted a Charge.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Charge stored on this unit (e.g. Deadly Dance: 700% => 1000% damage while 3 Charges are stored on this unit).

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each Charge stored on this unit (max of 80% while 3 Charges are stored on this unit).

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack, and survives until after the end of the turn, if this unit is charged, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP. Otherwise, if this unit is not charged, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Dark Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Dark units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Victoria
entries.title: The Crowned Étoile
entries.description:
Victoria was born as the eldest daughter of the long-standing Royal House of Wellmund.
Raised from childhood to one day succeed her father, the king, she received a thorough royal education. Combined with her exceptional talent, she has mastered horsemanship, etiquette, diplomacy, and politics.

localization.name: Downpour
localization.description:
Targets all enemies. Deals either 900%, 600%, or 300% damage, chosen at random for each target. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if the user has used Étoile's Fury since this skill was last used. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: Spreading Chill
localization.description:
Allies gain 2 Spirit for each non-sleeping enemy on the battlefield.

Then a random enemy has their Burn removed, and is granted Frostburn and infected with it. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Frostburn to a random non-Frostburned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

localization.name: Étoile's Fury
localization.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 900% total damage if this skill has already been used 3 times or more). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Crowned Étoile
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies, and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever another ally takes damage from an attack, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

If this unit has another ally on the battlefield, whenever this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit grants a random enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This is not a Skin passive skill.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

localization.name: Queen's Grace
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with 10% HP Regen for 200TU, a Power Charge and an Instant Death Ward. This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks for 100TU.

If this unit would be defeated while it has a Power Charge, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. The Power Charge will be consumed when this effect is triggered.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies on the battlefield are healed for 100% of their max HP, and granted an Instant Death Ward.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will become Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of that turn.

Each time an enemy gets the turn, this unit will become Enraged at the end of that turn. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on this unit.

An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. A unit with 10% HP Regen will heal for 10% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Staff Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Staffs in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Victoria
entries.title: The Crowned Étoile
entries.description:
She also joined the Royal Ballet Troupe, one of Wellmund's proudest cultural institutions. There, she quickly blossomed as a skilled dancer and rose to the prestigious position of étoile—the very face of the entire troupe.
But when her father, the king, fell gravely ill and could no longer carry out his duties, Victoria had to inherit the throne. From that day on, she found herself consumed by the endless demands of being a queen.

localization.name: Height of Power
localization.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 500% of the user's attack, and grants them the Armor status effect. The user gains a Power Charge.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Usable 10 times per battle. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

entries.name: Lupin
entries.title: Moonlight Phantom Thief
entries.description:
Lupin is master thief whose exploits span the entire world.
With a deep love for works of art and national treasures, she steals any target she sets her sights on—no matter how impenetrable its security may be.
She is also known as a master of disguise, and no one knows her true face...except for one.

localization.name: The Setup
localization.description:
Removes all Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from enemy units on the battlefield. The user is granted a Charge, Super Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Then grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then steals up to 2 Spirit from the enemy team for each Poisoned enemy on the battlefield.

Usable if the user does not have the Stealth status effect. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

localization.name: Sneaky Shot
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted a Charge. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores Guardians, any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

The user steals all Sleep Wards, Stun Wards, Poison Wards, and Instant Death Wards from the hit target even if they are defeated by this attack. Then the user has their current TU reduced by 10TU for each type of ward stolen. Usable if the user has Stealth or if The Setup is locked.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Stolen wards will still be removed from the target even if the user already had them.

localization.name: The Ultimate Heist
localization.description:
600% damage to all enemies. 750% damage instead if the user has survived for 100TU or more on the battlefield. 900% damage instead if the user has survived for 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

localization.name: Phantom Thief
localization.description:
This unit cannot be poisoned or burned.

Whenever an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 25% of its max HP.

This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks. This unit has 70% damage reduction from attacks instead if this unit has any Ward (e.g. an Instant Death Ward, Sleep Ward).

This unit enters battle with a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and an Instant Death Ward.

This unit gains the Super Stealth status effect, and a Stealth Shield. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Super Stealth will overwrite other Status effects. Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

entries.name: Lupin
entries.title: Moonlight Phantom Thief
entries.description:
Three years ago, she infiltrated the Kingdom of Wellmund in pursuit of the national treasure known as the "Swan Crown". Unable to break the final seal, she was just preparing to withdraw in defeat when Victoria, still a princess at the time, offered her assistance. With her aid, the theft was successful.
From that day on, Lupin began referring to the future queen as her one and only "accomplice".

localization.name: The Backup Plan
localization.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 100% of their max HP, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison).

The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Instant Death Ward, 3 Charges, and will enter Phantom Form. Then if 2 or more non-conjured allies are on the battlefield, the user will add another Lupin to the end of allied reinforcements. This Lupin's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user.

Usable if at least 1 ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP or if a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

While in Phantom Form, the user has their Attack increased to 1.5x, and has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs. This alone will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.

entries.name: Jeanne
entries.title: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
entries.secondName: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
entries.description: And just like that, the voice of her sister—who had always been by her side—could no longer reach her. No matter how many times she called or prayed to her, she was answered only with silence. For the first time since her sister's death long ago, Jeanne once again felt what it was like to be truly alone.

localization.name: Soaring Strike
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if 2 or more enemies on the battlefield have their Active Skills disabled. 900% damage instead if all enemies on the battlefield have their Active Skills disabled. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

localization.name: Healing Wings
localization.description:
The user and 1 other ally are:
- Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed)
- Enraged
- Healed for 100% of their max HP
- Granted a Poison Ward and Burn Ward

Unlocked each time the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable only if there is at least 1 other ally on the battlefield.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Waves Of Light
localization.description:
Stuns all enemies for 100TU. This Stun cannot be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers.

Then if 2 or more non-conjured allies are on the battlefield, the user will add another Jeanne to the very front of allied reinforcements.
Then if 3 or more non-conjured allies are on the battlefield, the user will add another Jeanne to the very end of allied reinforcements.
Then if 4 non-conjured allies are on the battlefield, the user will add another Jeanne to a random place in allied reinforcements.

Locked for 50TU if the user enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements. Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Saint's Deliverance
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, or be stunned.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, and a Burn Ward.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Stuns 2 random enemies for 50TU.
- Then disables 2 random enemies' Active Skills for 10TU, plus 10TU per Awakening (up to 50TU if this unit has 4 Awakenings).
When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if this unit is defeated.

Whenever this unit or another ally "Jeanne, The Saint of a Lost Kingdom" enters the battlefield, this unit is purified and healed for 100% of its max HP.

localization.name: Unending Grace
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever another ally named "Jeanne, The Saint of a Lost Kingdom" enters the battlefield, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 50% of its max HP.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack, this unit adds another Jeanne to the next in line of allied reinforcements. All Jeannes created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories.

If this unit is conjured, damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Hammer Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Hammers in addition to their original preferred weapon type.

entries.name: Jeanne
entries.title: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
entries.secondName: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
entries.description: When she was little, Jeanne would run around within the remains of an old tower with her sister and their childhood friend. Whenever they played hide-and-seek, her sister would always be the first to do the seeking, smiling and laughing as she looked for Jeanne and the friend. But now, no matter where Jeanne hides, she will never again hear those cheerful footsteps or that joyful voice calling out her name. "Mikaela...please find me," Jeanne whispers.

localization.name: Soaring Strike
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if 2 or more enemies on the battlefield have their Active Skills disabled. 900% damage instead if all enemies on the battlefield have their Active Skills disabled. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

localization.name: Healing Wings
localization.description:
The user and 1 other ally are:
- Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed)
- Enraged
- Healed for 100% of their max HP
- Granted a Poison Ward and Burn Ward

Unlocked each time the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable only if there is at least 1 other ally on the battlefield.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Angelic End
localization.description:
700% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated and enemy damage reduction effects.

Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 100TU after each use. Usable only if there is at least 1 other "Jeanne, The Saint of a Lost Kingdom" ally on the battlefield.

localization.name: Saint's Deliverance
localization.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, or be stunned.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, and a Burn Ward.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Stuns 2 random enemies for 50TU.
- Then disables 2 random enemies' Active Skills for 10TU, plus 10TU per Awakening (up to 50TU if this unit has 4 Awakenings).
When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if this unit is defeated.

Whenever this unit or another ally "Jeanne, The Saint of a Lost Kingdom" enters the battlefield, this unit is purified and healed for 100% of its max HP.

localization.name: Unending Grace
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever another ally named "Jeanne, The Saint of a Lost Kingdom" enters the battlefield, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 50% of its max HP.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack, this unit adds another Jeanne to the next in line of allied reinforcements. All Jeannes created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories.

If this unit is conjured, damage dealt to this unit is increased to 2.5 times the normal amount.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Attack Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 300 to this unit's Attack.

localization.name: G.sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Hammer Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Hammers in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
